Name: Plantar
Description:
Fundado em 1967, o Grupo Plantar mostrou-se capaz de expandir e inovar no setor florestal e de siderurgia a carvão vegetal.

O nosso crescimento é baseado em investimentos voltados para a modernização de nossas atividades, com o desenvolvimento de novas tecnologias e constante aprimoramento profissional e pessoal de nossos colaboradores, tendo sempre como foco principal, a satisfação de nossos clientes. 

Nos orgulhamos de nossos investimentos que contribuem diretamente para o fomento e avanço das economias regionais das quais fazemos parte, com a geração de empregos, desenvolvimento de tecnologia, conhecimento, educação e bem estar social.

Name: Komaza
Description:
Combining high-scale operations with digital intelligence, Komaza is revolutionizing African forestry - unlocking the potential for small-scale farmers to serve booming wood markets.
 
We’re currently planting commercial-grade forests at a rate of over 1 million trees per year, expanding our farmer-base by 5,000+ – and we’re growing fast. To date, we’ve planted over 7 million total trees with 22,000 farmers, making us Kenya’s largest industrial tree planter. We hold the only sustainable blueprint for meeting Africa’s $30B wood supply crisis. Smallholder farms offer nearly limitless land, and can establish a hectare of trees for far less than big plantations.
 
We have been recognized with numerous awards and investments, including The Climate Policy Initiative, The Nature Conservancy, Forbes, and Novastar Ventures.

Name: Rayonier
Description:
Rayonier is a leading land resources company deeply invested in sustainable forestry, thoughtfully-planned real estate, and land-based solutions that support the transition to a low-carbon economy.

We responsibly manage approximately 2 million acres of timberlands, supporting clean air, clean water, vital wildlife habitats, and the dependable jobs that strengthen rural communities across the Southeast and Pacific Northwest.

At Rayonier, we empower our people, prioritize safety above all else, and value teamwork to ensure the long-term health of our forests and the prosperity of our communities.

Name: Reflorestar Soluções Florestais
Description:
A Reflorestar é uma das empresas do Grupo Emília Cordeiro. A vocação  para trabalhar a terra nos levou a direcionar nossa atuação aos setores de cerâmica, madeira e serviços florestais.

Como matéria-prima e motivação, temos a terra e as pessoas que nela vivem e trabalham; como motor, temos o apoio da tecnologia; e como princípio, temos o compromisso de manter o meio ambiente rico, produtivo e sustentável, hoje e para as futuras gerações.

Desde nossa fundação, em 2004, somos guiados pela visão inovadora, pela aplicação de tecnologia de ponta e pelo investimento contínuo na capacitação técnica e comportamental dos nossos colaboradores.

O conhecimento de nossa equipe sobre a terra e seus processos é responsável pela alta produtividade dos nossos serviços.

O compromisso com nossos clientes é a garantia de que somos a escolha mais racional para soluções confiáveis e seguras em colheita florestal e logística de madeira.

Name: EMFLORS EMPREENDIMENTOS FLORESTAIS LTDA
Description: Prestar serviços especializados em silvicultura e manejo florestal, identificar e atender as expectativas dos clientes com comprometimento e sustentabilidade na busca de ferramentas tecnológicas, e recursos humanos para prestar serviços de excelência e rentáveis.

Name: Holmen Skog
Description: Holmen är en av Sveriges största skogsägare. Vi brukar skogen aktivt och hållbart för att den ska växa optimalt och ge oss den bästa råvaran. Långsiktigt tar vi ansvar för skogens kretslopp från frö till återplantering och värnar den biologiska mångfalden. Våra medarbetare sköter våra skogar, köper virke och hjälper privata skogsägare över hela landet med skörd och skogsvård.

Name: The Westervelt Company
Description: Whether it's a walk in the woods, wood product manufacturing, mitigation banking, or a unique sporting experience in New Zealand, we stand for quality. We focus on providing the highest quality products & services without compromising our stewardship to the land.

Name: Forest Machine Magazine
Description:
Our magazine is at the cutting edge of the forest industry.  We are the only forestry publication that can honestly state it is written edited and owned by a second generation forest professional. 
We give our readers good honest, unbiased reports on equipment, events and technology that improve efficiency and safety. We trial equipment, workwear and accessories and give impartial constructive feedback in real working conditions with our pool of skilled professionals.

Name: Tūrama
Description:
Tūrama enables the monetization of remote forests through its global export program.
Utilizing their proprietary export management systems, buyer market place and decades of experience in forestry logistics to deliver outcomes for their clients

www.turama.io

Name: TRC - Teak Resources Co.
Description:
De Floresteca a Teak Resources Company.

Por mais de 20 anos, a gestão da Teak Resources Company – “TRC” – ganhou uma reputação internacional através da produção de teca no Brasil, gerenciando de forma sustentável os recursos do grupo de empresas Floresteca. Em 2016, expandimos nossa expertise em silvicultura para as áreas de gestão e comercialização da cadeia de suprimentos, cobrindo as fronteiras do mercado internacional.

Da união dessas competências, foi criada a TRC, Teak Resources Company. Uma marca que já nasce forte, sendo considerada uma das empresas líderes mundiais na indústria.

Consolidamos a credibilidade e transparência desta jornada, mantendo um compromisso firme com a sustentabilidade de nossas operações. Este é mais um passo na consolidação da missão de produzir e comercializar madeira de teca de forma sustentável, maximizando o retorno econômico.

-

Nossos diferenciais.

Biotecnologia: Nossa madeira é originária de excelentes árvores genéticas de maior produtividade e qualidade comprovada.

Madeira de origem responsável: Nós apenas fornecemos, gerenciamos e comercializamos madeira produzida em floresta certificada, garantindo que a madeira oferecida atende aos mais altos padrões de manejo florestal responsável.

Padronização da qualidade: Nossa gestão adequada e permanente das florestas contribui para a produção de madeira uniforme.

Localização privilegiada: A madeira que estamos gerenciando e comercializando é cultivada sob as melhores condições de solo e clima, adequado para o desenvolvimento em larga escala.

Tecnologia: Know-how desde a produção de sementes e mudas, áreas de prospecção, plantio, manejo florestal e colheita até processamento, comercialização e entrega dos produtos.

Logística: Fornecimento contínuo e estável de madeira ao longo do ano, com entregas programadas para favorecer o fluxo de caixa dos clientes e otimizar a cadeia de suprimentos.

Name: NCT Forestry Agricultural Co-operative Limited
Description: NCT is a vibrant Forestry company based in KZN, with district offices throughout the province and further afield and manufacturing facilities in Durban and Richards Bay.  NCT employs 700+ staff, and with an annual turnover of more than R3 billion, is a major force in the forestry sector in Africa.  Established in 1949 as an agricultural co-operative, NCT markets its members’ timber to both domestic and international markets.  NCT prides it self as being the preferred market choice for independent timber growers in Southern Africa.

Name: F&W Forestry
Description: Since 1962, F&W Forestry Services has led the way in forestland management. We provide localized services with professionalism and quality, empowering our clients to maximize the value and enjoyment of their land. We offer comprehensive forestry services to help you grow. We can assist you with timber sales, property management, field support services, forest inventory and mapping, forestland accounting, technical and analytical services, real estate, and natural capital.

Name: Green Diamond Resource Company
Description:
Green Diamond Resource Company is a sixth-generation, family-owned forest products company. With headquarters in Seattle, we own and manage forests in California, Washington, Montana, and Oregon. We manage our lands in an environmentally responsible manner (FSC and SFI certified), as sustainable and productive working forests. Our subsidiary, Green Diamond Management Company, manages forests in Alabama, Florida, Georgia, Mississippi, South Carolina, and Washington.

At Green Diamond, a well-managed forest is more than just trees – it’s our people.  We are a dedicated team deeply rooted in integrity, innovation, and sustainability.  Your decisions matter to our forests, our communities, and our future.  Join us and be part of our legacy.

We encourage you to learn more about us on our website!

Name: GARRUCHOS
Description: Somos una empresa foresto-industrial de capitales argentinos líder en la producción de madera sólida de alta calidad, con hectáreas forestadas en el norte de la Argentina y en Paraguay.

Name: ECO BRASIL BIOENERGIA
Description: Eco Brasil Bioenergia é uma empresa especializada na prestação de serviços de colheita florestal mecanizada, produção e transporte de cavaco, locação de máquinas e no comércio de cavaco e toras.

Name: EFISA
Description:
EFISA es la empresa más importante del rubro forestal paraguayo. Desde el año 2012, diseñamos y ejecutamos proyectos forestales para satisfacer una demanda nacional e internacional de productos madereros de forma sostenible.

Trabajamos únicamente con madera proveniente de fuentes 100% renovables como lo pueden ser las distintas especies de eucalipto; creemos firmemente en la preservación de las especies nativas y nuestra principal misión es satisfacer la demanda de productos madereros a partir de fuentes renovables.

Ofrecemos productos elaborados a partir de estas especies renovables; somos los mayores productores y proveedores de biomasa para fines energéticos a nivel nacional, así mismo, contamos con el aserradero más moderno del país, del cual derivan productos como pallets, embalajes, cajas y madera aserrada para usos variados. 

Somos los representantes paraguayos de las empresas fabricantes de maquinaria forestal más importantes de Sudamérica y expertos en brindar soluciones eficientes a nuestros clientes.

Con 9 años de existencia, EFISA se posicionó como una de las empresas forestales más relevantes de la región, especializándose también en procesos logísticos eficaces y forjando alianzas a nivel nacional e internacional para impulsar el mercado forestal en todas sus aristas, cumpliendo sus políticas y objetivos de forma impecable.

Name: Infiniti Agro
Description: Founded in 2019, INFINITI AGRO is committed to driving sustainable development in the forestry sector. Operating in the states of Mato Grosso and Mato Grosso do Sul, the company manages a total area of over 60,000 hectares, with more than 18,000 hectares planted with eucalyptus. We are dedicated to promoting an innovative and sustainable Integrated Crop-Livestock-Forestry System (ICLFS), providing solutions for the bioenergy sector and supporting the country’s energy transition through environmental responsibility, innovation, and high productivity.

Name: Cluster da Madeira e o Deseño de Galicia
Description:
El Cluster da Madeira e o Deseño de Galicia se constituye en el año 2001 por iniciativa de las empresas vinculadas al sector de la madera junto al Centro Tecnológico de la Madera (CIS Madeira) y la Universidad de Vigo.

Desde sus inicios, el CMD aglutina a empresas y agentes vinculados a toda la cadena de valor de la madera, comprendiendo a empresas relacionadas con la explotación forestal, aserraderos, empresas de chapa y tablero, pasta de papel, papel, empresas de carpintería y mobiliario, canal Contract, empresas de servicios, centros tecnológicos, ingenierías, universidad y prescriptores.

En la actualidad, el volumen de facturación de las empresas asociadas al CMD representa más del 90% de la facturación de la cadena de valor industrial de la madera.

En estos más de 20 años de actividad, desde el CMD se han llevado a cabo más de 10.400 acciones que le ayudaron, en el año 2014, a obtener la Gold Label, medalla de oro de excelencia en gestión, siendo el primer CLuster de la industria de la madera de Europa en obtener este reconocimiento y que certifica que los proyectos desarrollados están al máximo nivel competitivo.

Desde el año 2009, el CMD cuenta con la figura del socio de honor que tiene por objetivo destacar la labor de las personas físicas o instituciones que promueven activamente el sector de la madera gallega en todas sus manifestaciones y usos: arquitectónicos, tecnológicos, mobiliarios y decorativos.

Además, el CMD actúa como editora de libros para promover los beneficios de la madera y difundir sus bondades.

Name: PT Itci Hutani Manunggal
Description: PT Itci Hutani Manunggal (PT IHM) merupakan perusahaan yang bergerak dibidang Hutan Tanaman Industri (HTI) dengan Acacia mangium dan Eucalyptus sp. sebagai tanaman utama yang mempunyai luasan konsesi ±161.127 Ha terletak di Provinsi Kalimantan Timur yang telah mendapatkan legalitas pengelolahan hutan (SK IUPHHK-HTI) melalui Keputusan Menteri Kehutanan No. 184/Kpts-II/1996 tanggal 23 April 1996.

Name: Gaia AI
Description: Gaia AI is an MIT & Harvard startup using LiDAR, computer vision, and satellite data to collect high-quality biomass data in forests, helping land owners, project developers, and investors understand the carbon stock and timber content of their land.  By measuring the carbon content of a forest with high accuracy, we give carbon credit buyers confidence that their credit was backed by a ton of carbon sequestered, and thus create trust in and help unlock the carbon credit market.

Name: MTO Group
Description: The origin and essence of the MTO Group is forestry and manufacturing, with additional business activities in Biomass, Agriculture and Ecotourism. These business activities depend on that origin while also contributing to our success by enabling a totally integrated approach to sustainable land use.

Name: Faculty of Forestry Sciences, University of Chile
Description: Dedicated to form forestry engineers since 1952

Name: Skogligajobb.se
Description:
Följ oss här på LinkedIn och få tips om lediga jobb i skogsbranschen.

Skogligajobb.se är sajten för dig som är verksam i skogsbranschen. Du kan även gilla oss på Facebook samt få mailutskick.

Name: Mellanskog
Description:
Tillsammans för starkare skogsägare och rikare skogar 

Följ oss för att hålla dig uppdaterad om vårt arbete, nyheter, jobberbjudanden och inspiration från branschen. Tillsammans bygger vi en bättre framtid för våra skogar och den gröna näringen.

Name: AgroProgreso
Description: Guatemala nos inspira a seguir cultivando un mejor futuro para todos, a través de la industria agroforestal y el turismo.

Name: The State Forests National Forest Holding
Description: The State Forests is the largest organization in the European Union managing forests owned by the State Treasury. We manage one-fourth of Poland's area – a particularly valuable part because it is covered with forests. More importantly, this area is steadily increasing, as the efforts of foresters lead to the expansion of forested areas.

Name: Skovdyrkerne
Description:
Since its founding in 1904, the Danish Forest Owners Associations (DFOA), has grown into the biggest service provider in Danish private forestry.
 
We are organising and servicing more than 5.000 forest owners in all sizes - from 1/2 hectare to more than 1000 hectares.

The Danish Forest Owners Associations (DFOA), in Danish: Skovdyrkerne, is a Danish association that is 
owned and governed by small scale forest owners/farmers in Denmark. It has practiced extension work among Danish forest owners based on advocacy and participatory principles since 1904. Around 25% of all Danish forest owners are members of DFOA. The approximately 5,000 members all together constitute circa 20% of the total private Danish forest cover. 

DFOA is organised into seven local units, the Local Forest Growers Associations, each lead by a board of directors, which is democratically elected by the members. The seven local units are in turn represented by the Secretariat, which is elected by the general assembly. The secretariat does marketing and advocacy work for the whole organisation, while also developing the political and economic framework. DFOA works on a non-profit basis, but with a certain net worth in order to ensure all payments to members and in order to make room for investment and development.

Name: Deutsche Säge- und Holzindustrie (DeSH)
Description:
Seit über 125 Jahren vertritt der Deutsche Säge- und Holzindustrie Bundesverband e.V. (DeSH) die Interessen der Säge- und Holzindustrie auf Bundes-, Landes- und europäischer Ebene.

Mit ihren vielfältigen Produkten aus dem nachwachsenden Rohstoff Holz bilden die 350 Mitgliedsunternehmen des DeSH das Scharnier zwischen dem Wald und der Holzverarbeitung bis zum Holzbau. Sie sind ein wesentlicher Pfeiler für die Bioökonomie und Schlüssel für die nachhaltige Transformation von Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft.

Der DeSH steht für die nachhaltige Verarbeitung und Verwendung des Roh- und Werkstoffs Holz als Beitrag zu Klimaschutz, Beschäftigung und Wertschöpfung für einen zukunftsfähigen Wirtschaftsstandort Deutschland.

Name: Faculty of Forestry Sciences, University of Chile
Description: Dedicated to form forestry engineers since 1952

Name: PF Olsen Limited
Description:
PF Olsen is the leading provider of independent professional forestry services in New Zealand.

At PF Olsen we pride ourselves on our reputation for delivering a wide range of professional forestry services to a diverse range of clients including TIMOs, farmers, investors, Maori groups, government agencies and others.

The services we provide include forest and harvesting management, log sales, consulting, due diligence, valuations, feasibility studies, investment and provision of tree stocks and Radiata pine seed.

Name: GN Empreendimentos
Description: Há 40 anos realizando atividades florestais, trazendo soluções inovadoras com comprometimento e atendendo as necessidades do seu negócio

Name: ABR Brasil
Description:
ABR Brasil

Com cerca de 22 anos de história, a ABR Brasil é parte de um grupo que se destaca pela excelência, construída por uma equipe altamente qualificada. Estamos sempre em busca da melhoria contínua dos processos através de equipamentos e tecnologia de ponta, assegurando a qualidade e a segurança dos serviços prestados. 

Áreas de Atuação: Nossas atividades englobam uma ampla gama de serviços e produtos florestais, além de operações em supermercados e no setor imobiliário.

Name: Forest Forward
Description:
Forest Forward is een 𝗱𝘂𝘂𝗿𝘇𝗮𝗮𝗺𝗵𝗲𝗶𝗱𝘀𝗽𝗮𝗿𝘁𝗻𝗲𝗿 voor bedrijven en zorgt ervoor dat ondernemingen, organisaties en overheden impact kunnen creëren. 

Hoe? Bijvoorbeeld met een eigen 𝗯𝗲𝗱𝗿𝗶𝗷𝗳𝘀𝗯𝗼𝘀. Niet aan de andere kant van de wereld, maar vlak bij huis. Waarom? Simpel. Als bedrijf je eigen bos verwerven, is om vele redenen goed: om maatschappelijk impact te hebben, om te compenseren (in the laste mile), voor je personeel, je klanten, je reputatie ... 

We denken altijd mee als ondernemers en beschikken over diverse bedrijfsvriendelijke formules. Eens je eigen bedrijfsbos een feit is, zorgen wij voor het beheer en gaan we je bos 𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗲𝗻, zodat je het helemaal ten volle kan 𝗯𝗲𝗹𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗻.

Ons motto: 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘬 𝘨𝘭𝘰𝘣𝘢𝘭, 𝘢𝘤𝘵 𝘭𝘰𝘤𝘢𝘭.

Name: AMATA | FLORESPAR
Description:
A AMATA é uma empresa brasileira que nasceu em 2005 com o propósito de manter as florestas em pé. Opera há mais de 15 anos, sendo a primeira empresa a conseguir uma concessão florestal na Amazônia.

Reforçando o propósito de oferecer ao mercado madeira com garantia de origem. 

A operação da AMATA no Paraná está focada no plantio de Pinus, por meio do manejo voltado ao múltiplo uso da floresta e a comercialização da madeira produzida, no corte final e nos desbastes. Desta forma, são garantidas a produção e a comercialização constante e sustentável das espécies escolhidas, que gera benefícios e garante a viabilidade econômica dos plantios.

Name: Forêt d'ici
Description:
Forêt d'ici :  une nouvelle coopérative forestière issue de la fusion entre Forêt et Bois de l’Est, Nord Seine Forêt 2A et Cosylval.
Notre modèle de sylviculture est de ne pas en avoir. Seuls comptent le diagnostic, le souhait des propriétaires et leurs moyens.

Name: Symbiosis Investimentos e Participações S.A
Description:
Brazilian company, focused on defining a new standard for the timber industry. We control and manage the whole process, from selecting species, mother trees, seeds, seedlings, forming and managing forest stands, to the final product that reaches customers. By using native species, we maximize biological growth and appropriate adaptability to the environment.
In the formation of commercial stands, different consortia with native and exotic species are used. These consortia, besides providing benefits to the system’s elements, offer different colors and textures of the timber spectrum, diversify marketing risks, minimize the effects of tropical monocultures, and have a positive impact on biodiversity. This means that we have access to essential genetic variability to ensure the right supply of seeds, enable the formation of areas for seed collection, implement forest improvement programs and establish an “ex situ” genetic reserve for each of these species. 
To meet society’s need for wood products without altering the mechanisms by which the ecosystems are sustained.

Name: AGDW - Die Waldeigentümer
Description: Die AGDW - Die Waldeigentümer vertritt die Interessen der rund 2 Millionen privaten Waldeigentümer und körperschaftlichen Waldeigentümer in Deutschland. Zusammen bewirtschaften und pflegen sie rund 67 Prozent des Waldes in Deutschland. Die Pflege dieser Wälder basiert auf der nachhaltigen Waldbewirtschaftung, die Mehrheit der Waldeigentümer ist PEFC-zertifiziert.

Name: PLATERO Energía Forestal
Description:
La Empresa Platero se inició en 1970, manteniendo hasta la fecha los mismos socios (hoy Directores). Su principal línea de negocios comenzó siendo el suministro de leña a nivel domiciliario. Pocos años después, y debido al éxito de la empresa (basado en la calidad de la leña provista y del cumplimiento en el servicio) se incorpora la segunda línea de negocios: el abastecimiento de leña a la industria para generación de vapor. Estos dos pilares fueron los que a través de los años han consolidado el nombre de la empresa en plaza.

El crecimiento de la Empresa ha sido permanente, lo que ha llevado a la generación de nuevas líneas de negocios, basadas todas en generación de energía a través de Biomasa. Ello está avalado no sólo por su crecimiento propio sino también por las asociaciones estratégicas que ha logrado en los últimos años, producto de ser percibido como un jugador importante en el mercado de la generación de energía en Uruguay. Hoy el Grupo Platero está conformado por las empresas Platero Cosecha Forestal y Pionero Energía Forestal.

Name: Kijani Forestry
Description: Kijani Forestry is combating deforestation, poverty and the energy-crisis through innovative agroforestry, permaculture, and introducing new technologies to grow a better future. We empower communities by establishing rural nurseries to give shareholder farmers access to valuable fruit and fuelwood trees. Through holistically caring for the land and partners we can lead the way people consumption our natural resources and create energy for the future.

Name: Georgia Forestry Association
Description:
The Georgia Forestry Association (GFA) is the leading advocate for a healthy business and political climate for Georgia’s forest environment, forest landowners and forest-based businesses. 

GFA serves its members with a promise to keep them protected, connected, and empowered. For their protection, we advocate for local, state, and federal policies that accommodate the needs of Georgia forest owners, and we work aggressively to protect private property rights, ensure healthy markets, and secure sensible tax policy and regulatory guidelines. 

To keep members connected, we provide a network of member groups that fosters personal relationships; keeps them informed on policy initiatives, market opportunities, forest fire conditions, and much more; and engages related industries (banking and investments, commercial builders, mills and loggers, etc.) in an open forum to establish a strong network of support. 

Finally, we empower our members by supporting their growth and success through the Georgia Forestry Foundation (GFF). GFF seeks to promote the economic and environmental sustainability of its working forest ecosystem for the well-being of the state and its citizens. GFF accomplishes these goals through leadership programs, policies studies and research about forests, and public education about why forestry matters to all.

Georgia’s landowners and forest industries continue to face pressure from growing global competition, local property taxes, and sprawling urban and suburban development. Georgia’s forests have the capacity to meet increased demands for goods and services, now and in the future, but the correct mix of stewardship, market opportunities, and commitment to public policy must come together to support forest landowners, organizations and communities that hold these forests in trust for future generations.

Name: GD Holz
Description: Der Gesamtverband Deutscher Holzhandel e. V. (GD Holz) ist kooperationsübergreifender und repräsentativer Branchenverband des deutschen Holzfachhandels. Er bündelt die wirtschaftlichen Interessen von rund 800 Mitgliedsunternehmen und vertritt diese gegenüber Politik, Organisationen, Medien und Gesellschaft. Der Organisationsgrad des GD Holz erreicht nach eigenen Schätzungen ca. 60 % der Unternehmen und 80 % des Branchenumsatzes.

Name: Duraplay
Description:
En Duraplay nos sentimos orgullosos de ser la empresa líder en fabricación de tableros de madera en México.

Nuestro compromiso en Duraplay es trabajar en una empresa responsable con el medio ambiente y nuestra comunidad, para cada día ofrecer un producto de mejor calidad y seguro para uso residencial, a la vez que cuidamos la sustentabilidad de la industria.

Name: Ontario Forest Industries Association
Description: The Ontario Forest Industries Association (OFIA) is the provincial trade association for Ontario’s forest industry, representing over 40 member companies located throughout Ontario. For over 80 years, the OFIA has been the united voice of its members. By working with the government to address key competitiveness issues, the OFIA aims to position Ontario as a global leader in producing sustainable forest products.

Name: Alba Trees Ltd
Description:
Alba Trees nursery based in East Lothian began growing in 1988. The nursery specialises in Forestry trees - both for native woodland creation and timber production, growing 30 million trees annually. 

Our location allows our trees to take advantage of the highest sunshine hours in Scotland and exposes them to traditional Scottish winters - ensuring they are fully hardy and ideal for woodland planting throughout the UK.

We specialise in growing native trees and have access to seed sources across the UK to ensure we can satisfy most customers’ needs. We grow almost all tree species native to the UK, in addition to an extensive collection of native shrubs.

Name: AVA Bioenergia
Description: Somos um grupo com forte atuação nos setores agrícola, florestal e de bioenergia, administrando cerca de 15 mil hectares de terras com grande potencial produtivo no Vale do Araguaia, entre as cidades de Água Boa e Canarana (MT). Nossas operações combinam parcerias agrícolas e produção própria, em um ambiente de inovação e crescimento constante.
Location: Rio De Janeiro, Rio De Janeiro

Name: Carbon Forestry NZ
Description:
Carbon Forestry is an industry-led event discussing the future of forestry and carbon markets. It covers new opportunities and policies in carbon planting, investment and the growing carbon offset markets.

Event Details
In August 2024, over 250 industry leaders, corporate emitters and investors attended the event in Rotorua, New Zealand and virtually online. This annual event has become the place to meet and learn about what’s happening in this expanding investment class.

This event continues to grow, especially when we look at how important forestry is in New Zealand’s response to climate change.

In 2024, the then Climate Change Minister, Hon Simon Watts, reinforced that forestry plays an essential part in New Zealand’s Emissions Trading Scheme (ETS) and the Government’s commitment to the sector.

Key Topics Covered
What are the “dynamics” of New Zealand’s carbon forestry market?
Who are the key players in driving demand?
In what ways is the forestry industry increasing supply?
What is the upcoming hurdle, and how should the sector address it?
How will carbon forestry unfold in the long run?

Name: Tornator Oyj
Description:
Tornator Oyj is a leading company specialised in sustainable forest management in Europe. It owns forests in Finland, Estonia and Romania. The Group has about 190 employees. In total, its forests directly provide work for the company’s employees as well as contractors and their staff worth some 1600 person-years. Tornator is among the 60 largest corporation tax payers in Finland. The parent company’s shareholders are Finnish investors, mostly institutions. Tornator’s mission is “generating sustainable well-being from the forest”.

Avec une production annuelle de 70 000 m3, nous représentons actuellement 60 % de l’exploitation forestière réalisée en Guyane.

Nos moyens humains et matériels, ainsi que notre forte implication dans les démarches d’Exploitation à Faible Impact et de certification forestière (PEFC) reflètent nos valeurs de compétence, d’innovation et de développement durable.

Le Groupe Arborys est également constitué d’une entité de distribution de matériel forestier « Forestière Ingénierie & Distribution » (exclusivité de la marque canadienne TIGERCAT), d’une unité de maintenance fixe et mobile « Mekazonia », ainsi qu’une filiale de travaux publics en milieu forestier « Mataroni TP ». Name: WESSEX WOODLAND MANAGEMENT LIMITED
Description:
Wessex Woodland Management  
We are dedicated to helping woodland owners achieve their goals, whether it be for maximising productivity, recreation, sporting potential or enhancing biodiversity.  With a deep understanding of sustainable forestry practices, timber markets and woodland ecology, we offer a range of expert services designed to nurture, protect, and enhance woodlands.


Our key areas of expertise include:
•	Tree planting and restocking: Establishing woodlands by harmonising species composition with specific site conditions, ensuring future growth and native biodiversity.
•	Woodland Creation (EWCO): Offering advice and support in securing funding and designing and implementing woodland creation design plans.
•	Woodland management plans: Producing tailored long-term strategies that provide structured woodland care and growth, based upon owners’ objectives.  
•	Timber harvesting: Efficient timber harvesting and extraction that balances economic returns with sustainability.
•	Grants and subsidies: Expert advice and support in securing funding through government forestry schemes.
•	Woodland ecology: Ensuring the health and diversity of woodland habitats and their fauna through our ecological assessments 
•	Training: Professional courses in woodland management, including qualifications in chainsaw use, tree climbing and forest machine operations.


Our mission is to support the growth of healthy, productive woodlands, balancing timber production with environmental sustainability to secure their future and that of the forestry industry.

Name: Brandbu og Tingelstad Almenning
Description:
Om oss

Brandbu og Tingelstad Almenning org.nr 954 575 152 eies av 475 allmenningsberettigede eiendommer med bruksrett i allmenningen. Kriteriet for at en eiendom skal ha bruksrett er at den ut fra dyrket areal, beliggenhet, bebyggelse og bruk har karakter av jordbruk.

Almenningen ledes av et styre valgt av og blant de bruksberettigede.
 
BTA er et resultat av en fusjon mellom tidligere Brandbu og Tingelstad almenninger med virkning fra 2004. Almenningen er privat eiendom som eies av de bruksberettigede, og omfatter et areal på ca 143.000 daa skog og utmark. Hovedvirksomheten er forvaltning og drift av disse arealene, samt annen eiendoms- og entreprenørdrift, herav hyttetomtutvikling på Lygna. Almenningen har videre et stort engasjement med 51 % eierandel i Almenningsbutikken AS. Almenningen er også medeier i Miljøvarme Hadeland AS med 17% og er andelseier i Viken Skog SA og G3 Gausdal Treindustrier SA. 
 
Gjennom medeierskapet i sagbruks- og høvleribedriften G3 Gausdal Treindustrier SA, som foredler 362.000 m3 tømmer pr. år er almenningen også engasjert i trelastproduksjon.
 
Almenningen inngikk i 2020 et samarbeid med Tinde Hytter om utvikling og bygging av hytter og leiligheter på Lygna www.hyttetomterlygna.no. Samarbeidet skjer gjennom selskapet Lygnagrenda AS, der partene har en 50 % eierandel hver. Styreleder og bestyrer representerer BTA i styret.
 
Gjennom BTA Invest AS, som er et 100 % eid datterselskap, har almenningen 37,5 % eierskap i Andfossen Eiendom AS.

Brandbu og Tingelstad Almenning er en bygdealmenning der virksomheten er underlagt Lov om bygdeallmenninger av 19. juni 1992. Administrasjonen holder til på Jaren i Gran kommune.

Name: Forum Nachhaltige Holzenergie
Description:
Der Klimawandel ist in Deutschland angekommen. Lasst uns im Rahmen der Energiewende handeln. Wir brauchen jetzt Lösungen, die fossile Energieträger ersetzen und zusätzliche Emissionen verhindern. Hierzu leisten nachwachsende Rohstoffe einen wichtigen Beitrag. Durch die Verwendung von nachhaltigen Holzpellets aus Restholz, können wir die Dekarbonisierung unserer Energie- und Wärmeerzeugung beschleunigen. Wir wollen den Kohleausstieg im besten Sinne nachhaltig gestalten und Ökologie, Gesellschaft und Ökonomie miteinander verbinden. Macht mit!

Erstmals haben sich Vertreter der gesamten Wertschöpfungskette von Holzpellets, vom Waldbesitzer bis zum Kraftwerksbetreiber, zusammengeschlossen, um untereinander Erfahrungen auf dem Gebiet der Holzenergienutzung und Pelletherstellung auszutauschen, und um gegenüber Entscheidungsträgern und der Öffentlichkeit das Potential von erneuerbarer, grundlastfähiger Holzenergie für die schnelle Erreichung der deutschen Klimaziele aufzuzeigen.

• Collapse of the Pulpwood Market in SC
• Out of balance growth to drain ratio
• Antiquated Paper Mill network under pressure by EPA
• Milling Capacity not adequate to meet growing wood supply

FLAG Solutions:
• Growing home markets;
• Engaging and expanding global markets;
• Exploring alternative uses for forest products for sustainable aviation fuel, fuel pellets, etc.;
• Coordinating with industry partners, regulatory agencies, and others to boost the market;
• Advocating before the Governor, General Assembly, and other policy makers on legislation that affects the forest industry.

FLAG is educating legislators and policy makers on the reality that the state is losing hundreds of millions of dollars annually in export opportunities due to market barriers, including fumigation requirements, international bans, lack of a bulk loading facility, and tariffs.

FLAG is engaging with importers/exporters, economic development leaders, and others who can assist with the trade of forest products in other countries as well as bring biofuel focused companies to South Carolina.

FLAG will facilitate other income streams for landowners with a focus on low carbon/environmental economies.

FLAG provides members with regular reports updating advocacy efforts and political action relevant to the forest industry.

FLAG was created to serve the members and will respond to members’ requests that are within the purview of the organization.

Name: Regionalstudie Harz - ReHa
Description:
Ziel des Projektes ist es, Entscheidungsgrundlagen für die Entwicklung einer größeren Region zu erarbeiten, um sie aus einer akuten Krise in eine ökologisch und sozioökonomisch nachhaltige Zukunft zu führen. Dies erfolgt durch die Integration waldökologischer, forsttechnischer, holztechnologischer, touristischer und wirtschaftswissenschaftlicher Aspekte in einer Szenarioanalyse.
Die Projektpartner sind die Georg-August-Universität Göttingen mit den Abteilungen Wildtierwissenschaften, Arbeitswissenschaften und Verfahrenstechnologie, Holzbiologie und Holzprodukte sowie Humangeographie; die Nordwestdeutsche Forstliche Versuchsanstalt, das Fraunhofer-Institut für Holzforschung, Wilhelm-Klauditz-Institut, das Thünen-Institut für Waldwirtschaft, der Tourismusverband Harz e.V. und die Niedersächsischen Landesforsten.

Das Bundesministerium für Bildung und Forschung (BMBF) fördert das Projekt im Rahmen der Fördermaßnahme „Regionale Innovationsgruppen für eine klimaschützende Wald- und Holzwirtschaft (REGULUS)“*. Nach der Forschungsphase von 2024 – 2027 erfolgt die Umsetzungsphase von 2027 – 2029.

*„REGULUS – Regionale Innovationsgruppen für eine klimaschützende Wald- und Holzwirtschaft“ verfolgt als wichtigstes Ziel die Entwicklung konkreter Lösungskonzepte und Handlungsansätze zu großen aktuellen Fragen der Waldbewirtschaftung und der Holzwirtschaft. Die durch REGULUS geförderten Vorhaben tragen zur Stärkung der disziplinübergreifenden Zusammenarbeit und zur Vernetzung wichtiger Akteure innerhalb regionaler Wald- und Holzforschungs-Cluster in Deutschland bei. Ein weiteres Anliegen von REGULUS ist die gezielte Förderung wissenschaftlicher und fachlicher Nachwuchskräfte.

Su interfaz incorpora herramientas como dibujo interactivo, trazado de incendios, georreferenciación, cálculos precisos de superficies, perímetros y velocidad de propagación del fuego, entre otras herramientas, proporcionando una visión detallada desde perspectivas técnico-operativas y estratégicas.

Permite gestionar recursos logísticos y personal de atención de incendios forestales de manera oportuna según los niveles de riesgo. Genera variables e índices de riesgo, instrucciones e información técnica específica para diversos actores en la gestión de incendios forestales. 

Facilita la toma de decisiones con una experiencia personalizada de reportes y notificaciones basadas en índices y niveles de riesgo obtenidos. Con una transmisión eficiente de información crítica en pocos minutos, esta herramienta versátil y de fácil uso contribuye de manera significativa a la prevención y control de incendios forestales.

Forest Fire Assistant ha sido seleccionado como una de las 50 innovaciones por el consorcio FIRE-RES para participar en el Desafío de Innovación Abierta "Open Innovation Challenge (OIC)".

The latest research performed here include silviculture effectiveness analyses, climate change research plots, Hemlock woolly adelgid trials, LiDAR plot calibration measurements, among many others. Operations Manager and Registered Professional Forester, Elizabeth Cobb, has dedicated many hours into the advancement of this research while maintaining the health of this beloved forest. It has been instrumental to Algonquin College as an outdoor classroom for various of their environmental programs and is shared with the Canadian Armed Forces for various military exercises.
 
As for public usage, walking, cycling, and passive recreation on the trails throughout the PRF are welcome, but please respect the forest environment and do not light fires. Take note of the rules posted on Kiosk signs on site.

Description:
I Skogskraft jobber vi med trær og skog. Og helst det som står tett på kritisk infrastruktur som strømnett, vei, jernbane eller bebyggelse. Tjenestene våre inkluderer linjerydding for nettselskaper, maskinell hogst, arboristtjenester og rådgivning- og prosjektledelse.

Vi er opptatt av å være et kompetansesenter for trær og skog, og er godkjent lærebedrift. Alle våre ansatte har praktisk erfaring med skogs- og trearbeid. Vi tror at kombinasjonen av praktisk erfaring og teoretisk kunnskap gir de beste og mest selvstendig ansatte som kan løse våre kunders problemer, enten det gjelder våre linjeryddere, arborister eller rådgivere.

Vi hjelper alt fra store virksomheter til privatpersoner og er 30 dedikerte ansatte som står klare til å hjelpe deg.

Skogskraft ble etablert i 2013. Fra 2020 til 2024 har vi opplevd betydelig vekst, og i 2023 og 2024 har vi vært Gasellebedrift.

Selskapet er stiftet og er eid av Robert Østreng som har mastergrad i skogfag fra Norges Miljø og Biovitenskaplige Universitet (NMBU) på Ås. Robert skrev master om risikotrær langs kraftlinjer.

On peut dire que l’Afrique possède encore dans ses forêts des ressources capables de contribuer amplement à son développement futur. En outre, les forêts constituent des ressources qui jouent plusieurs rôles dans l’économie, fournissant à l’état brut du combustible et du matériel de construction, ou la matière première des diverses industries de transformation du bois ou encore par leur fonction protectrice. C’est donc notre devoir de prendre en main nos ressources, par le processus d’une transformation et d’exportation.

Ainsi, nous croyons en l’avenir, nous investissons pour l’avenir et nous développons des stratégies pour rester compétitif, au-delà des attentes de nos clients et partenaires, nous contribuons à construire un environnement durable. Ceci dit, la pratique de la responsabilité sociétale des entreprises est ancrée dans notre management au quotidien. Nous assurons un environnement de travail stimulant et épanouissant à notre personnel, mais aussi, nous contribuons au développement des localités dans lesquelles nos entreprises sont implantées à travers des œuvres sociales.

En outre, respecter nos engagements envers l’Etat et les partenaires est fondamentale dans notre démarche.

Work boot styles are forever evolving so the ranges on our safety shop website are updated frequently to ensure the selection offered is always up-to-date with current trends and standards.

The Terrain Wire Rope Warehouse (situated on the same site as our main safety supply company) holds stocks of wire rope in excess of 100 tonne to suit every forestry requirement. Offering a 24/7 service to contractors both in-store and in the bush nationwide to rig your hauler, means we help you keep costly downtime to an absolute minimum.

Order today, and your goods will be delivered the next day after payment has been received (allow an extra 2 days for rural deliveries).

Or you can visit our store at 6 Miro Street, Taupo from Mon to Fri 8.00am till 5.30pm and Sat mornings 9.00am till 12.00pm. Come in and see us for excellent products and service.

With over 15 years in the industry, I deliver all aspects of arboriculture from precise pruning and crown reductions to technical dismantles, felling, stump grinding, hedge cutting, and woodland/vegetation management. I routinely liaise with Local Authorities on Tree Preservation Orders (TPOs) and conservation area permissions, ensuring your project is compliant and handled efficiently.

Why choose Alt Arb Ltd:
• Qualified and insured — with personal accountability on every job
• BS3998:2010 standards applied to all tree work
• Professional safety culture (PPE, rescue planning, traffic management)
• Responsive, tidy and respectful of your property and habitat

Services:

With growing demand for timber, revenue potential from carbon offsets, and significant tax advantages, our portfolio is designed for sustainable growth. We focus on a diversified mix of fast-growing conifers mainly in Scotland and high-value broadleaf trees primarily in Northern France, carefully selected through rigorous due diligence. Partner with us to cultivate sustainable returns and build a lasting legacy.

Name: GANCEDO LUMBER CO
Description:
Gancedo Lumber Co stands out in the logging and lumber industry not just for our exceptional quality products, but also for our commitment to sustainable practices and climate-friendly operations.

 Founded on the principles of environmental stewardship and responsible forestry, Gancedo Lumber Co has become a pioneer in the industry, setting new standards for sustainable logging and lumber services. One of the key pillars of Great South's approach is our dedication to selective logging techniques globally. Rather than clear-cutting entire forests, which can have devastating ecological impacts, we employ methods that target only mature trees for harvesting, while leaving younger trees and the overall ecosystem intact. This ensures the regeneration of forests and maintains biodiversity, preserving habitats for various species of plants and animals. 

Moreover, at Gancedo Lumber Co we prioritize the use of renewable energy sources and efficient technologies in our logging operations. We have invested in modern machinery and equipment that minimize fuel consumption and emissions, reducing our carbon footprint significantly.

Name: Skógarkolefni
Description:
This voluntary carbon code encourages a consistent approach to afforestation carbon projects and offers clarity and transparency to customers.

While society must make every effort to reduce its CO2 emissions, tree planting can also play a role by removing carbon dioxide from the atmosphere. The potential of forests to soak up CO2 from the atmosphere while providing a host of other benefits for society and biodiversity is increasingly recognized, and many individuals and businesses wish to contribute to tree planting to help society soak up the carbon it emits. But before investing in such projects people want to know that schemes will deliver the carbon savings that they claim.

Skógarkolefni - Forest Carbon Code provides reassurance about the carbon savings that customers' contributions may realistically achieve.

The Forest Carbon Code Secretariat function is provided by Icelandic Forest Service.

The Icelandic Forest Service is the Icelandic government agency responsible for forestry policy, support, and regulation as well as forest protection, research and managing the National Forests.

Financia @FBiodiversidad #ProyectosPRTR #NextGenerationEU

BIOVALOR propone el desarrollo del potencial de obtención de aceites esenciales y extractos a partir de especies forestales y plantas aromáticas y medicinales (PAM) cultivadas en tierras agrícolas marginales de baja productividad.

BIOVALOR cuenta con el apoyo de la Fundación Biodiversidad del Ministerio para la Transición Ecológica y el Reto Demográfico (MITECO) en el marco del Plan de Recuperación, Transformación y Resiliencia (PRTR), financiado por la Unión Europea-NextGenerationEU. Se desarrollará hasta diciembre de 2025 y está dotado con una subvención de 1.858.863,35 euros.

Name: Racines - Experts Forestiers
Description:
Racines, c’est la réunion du cabinet Gourmain-Barthélemy et du cabinet Goutorbe : deux cabinets reconnus dans le domaine de la gestion, l’expertise et la transaction forestière.
 Nous sommes une communauté de professionnels animés par les mêmes valeurs et les mêmes objectifs : la transmission, le partage, l’exigence, l’intégrité et la transparence. Ces vertus fixent notre cap au quotidien ; grâce à elles, nous nourrissons des relations durables avec nos clients.

Nous sommes et resterons farouchement indépendants.
Par conviction. Par intérêt : cette indépendance nous offre l’objectivité et la liberté d’arbitrage dont la forêt a toujours eu besoin, d’autant plus aujourd’hui, alors qu’elle est soumise aux aléas du changement climatique et secouée par des transformations majeures.

Nous sommes ancrés dans la forêt, le terrain est notre raison de travailler. Nous apportons constamment des améliorations à nos services, agiles et connectés aux nouvelles technologies. Nous avons développé des outils innovants et des méthodologies de pointe grâce auxquels nous augmentons considérablement la qualité de notre travail.

Nous sommes forestiers de métier, d’expertise, mais surtout de cœur. Que vous vouliez faire expertiser ou gérer votre forêt, ou que vous souhaitiez vendre ou acheter un massif, Racines a l’expertise et l’expérience qui en font un cabinet référence.

Éperdument forestiers, indéniablement experts,

Bienvenue chez Racines !

Name: Forestry, Land Use and Value Chains Development in Tanzania (FORLAND)
Description:
FORLAND Background:
Forestry, Land Use, and Value Chains Development in Tanzania (FORLAND) is a four-year (2025-2029) bilateral initiative between Finland and Tanzania to consolidate their previous PFP and FORVAC projects and ensure sustainability. The Tanzanian Ministry of Natural Resources and Tourism (MNRT) will implement the project with a multidisciplinary Technical Assistance team supplied by NIRAS and INDUFOR.

The FORLAND Project, which spans four contiguous regions in southern Tanzania (Iringa, Njombe, Ruvuma, and Lindi), is rich in both natural and plantation forest resources. The project will assist and capacitate duty bearers in government departments, rights holders (such as village communities, smallholder tree growers, and MSMEs) who have legal rights to use forests.

The Project’s Outcome and Outputs:
The outcome of the Project is: Increased income and improved livelihoods of communities, smallholder tree growers and MSMEs from viable and sustainable forest-based value chains.

The Outcome will be achieved through four results and related outputs as follows:

Result 1: Tree growers and organisations effectively manage plantations.

Result 2: Communities implement sustainable CBFM systems.

Result 3: CBFM communities, tree growers and MSMEs run viable forestry enterprises.

Result 4: Improved enabling environment for the forestry sector, supporting smallholder forestry, CBFM, and MSMEs in the forest value chain.

Currently, we have about 70 hectares of planted and maintained forest in Hungary on the privately owned lands of the Silvanus Group. 

Our varieties are planted and are thriving globally in a variety of environmental conditions by our partners and customers. 

Our mission is to provide a solution for climate change adaptation and mitigation by applying climate-smart plantation forestry in challenging conditions.

Name: Global TREE Project AG
Description:
Nachhaltige Investments in Paraguay für eine grüne Zukunft:

Bei Global TREE Project AG setzen wir auf nachhaltige Investments, 
die ökologische Verantwortung mit langfristigen wirtschaftlichen Vorteilen verbinden. Unsere Aufforstungsprojekte in Paraguay bieten eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, den wachsenden globalen Holzbedarf zu decken und gleichzeitig aktiv zum Klimaschutz beizutragen.

 Warum Paraguay?

Paraguay ist nicht nur ein Land mit enormem Wachstumspotenzial, sondern bietet auch ideale klimatische Bedingungen für die Aufforstung. Wir nutzen ungenutzte Flächen und fördern das Wachstum von Eukalyptus, einem schnell wachsenden Hartholz, das in der Bauholz- und Zelluloseindustrie gefragt ist. Durch diese Projekte tragen wir zur Reduktion von CO2 bei und schaffen gleichzeitig stabile, langfristige Erträge.

 Unsere Lösungen:

Unsere Investitionsmöglichkeiten richten sich sowohl an Privatpersonen als auch an Unternehmen, die einen nachhaltigen und wirtschaftlichen Mehrwert suchen. Für Unternehmen bieten wir maßgeschneiderte Projekte, die nicht nur ökologischen Nutzen bringen, sondern auch als Symbol für unternehmerische Verantwortung stehen.

 Unsere Vision:

Wir glauben fest daran, dass die Zukunft in nachhaltigen, realen Vermögenswerten liegt. Mit unseren Projekten schaffen wir einen positiven ökologischen Einfluss und bieten unseren Investoren gleichzeitig solide Renditen. Gemeinsam gestalten wir eine nachhaltige Welt, in der Umwelt und Wirtschaft im Einklang stehen.

Name: Sots Verds
Description:
At Sots Verds, we firmly believe in the ability to transform what is considered waste, into valuable resources. Our mission goes beyond the simple management of pruning waste; we strive to create a more sustainable and efficient future through the circular economy. This approach allows us to reduce environmental impact while promoting a more balanced and environmentally friendly economic system.

We are committed to continuous innovation, integrating advanced technology to optimize our processes and ensure that each autonomous station we install operates efficiently and effectively. Our work involves reusing and valorizing gardening waste, contributing to smart and responsible waste management.

At Sots Verds, we value new ideas, positive energy, and a passion for nature. We seek dedicated individuals who want to contribute their bit to this ambitious project. Being part of the team means working in a dynamic environment with a clear purpose: to make our surroundings a better place for everyone.

We collaborate with academic studies and institutions to advance research and the development of innovative solutions. This collaboration helps us stay at the forefront of new technologies and practices in sustainability, ensuring that our projects are as effective as they are respectful of the environment around us.

Join us and contribute to an initiative that bets on a greener future. With Sots Verds, every day is an opportunity to innovate, learn, and help build a more sustainable world.

Name: KBA Land Clearing

We utilize the latest forestry mulching equipment to grind up your vegetation, take down unsafe trees, or clear your property to whatever finish you desire! Forestry mulching is the only land clearing method that uses a single machine to cut, grind, and clear vegetation. A forestry mulching machine uses a rotary drum equipped with steel chipper tools or blades to shred vegetation.

Con materia prima de producción propia y mediante un equipo de colaboradores especializados y comprometidos, brindamos soluciones integrales de calidad a los diversos requerimientos del mercado, con tecnología de avanzada y una logística de calidad.

VALORES
Ofrecer una amplia variedad de productos y servicios de calidad, asesoramiento y atención personalizada son los pilares que guían la empresa.
La materia prima con que se elaboran los envases es producto de tala de árboles propios sembrados para tal fin, asegurando el cuidado del medio ambiente en todos los aspectos y reduciendo el impacto ambiental.

Name: Société de Conservation de la Nature en Côte d'Ivoire
Description:
Notre Objectif:
Notre principal objectif est de faciliter l'instauration d'une culture de gestion durable des forêts et la bonne gouvernance forestière en Côte d'Ivoire. Nous travaillons sans relâche pour préserver la richesse écologique de nos forêts tout en soutenant le développement socio-économique de nos communautés locales.

 Notre Impact:
Le Groupe National de Travail joue un rôle crucial dans la préservation de notre patrimoine naturel. Grâce à nos efforts concertés, nous contribuons à réduire la déforestation, à protéger la biodiversité unique de la région et à promouvoir des pratiques forestières durables.

 Notre Mission:
Notre mission est de faciliter la collaboration entre les parties prenantes clés, y compris les gouvernements, les entreprises forestières, les communautés locales et les organisations environnementales. Ensemble, nous visons à élaborer et à mettre en œuvre des politiques et des stratégies qui garantissent la gestion responsable des forêts et la certification forestière.

 Notre Vision:
Nous aspirons à un avenir où les forêts de la Côte d'Ivoire prospèrent en harmonie avec les besoins humains et la faune locale. Nous rêvons d'un paysage forestier durable, où chaque arbre compte, chaque écosystème est préservé et chaque génération à venir peut bénéficier de la beauté et des avantages de nos forêts.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette noble quête de durabilité! Ensemble, nous pouvons créer un impact positif durable pour les générations actuelles et futures. Partagez cette mission, faites partie du changement et contribuons à la construction d'un avenir forestier meilleur.

Name: Bioeco2

Nous y pratiquons une sylviculture douce et proche de la nature afin de produire du bois d'oeuvre, que nous valorisons en circuit court. 25% de nos forêts sont laissées en libre évolution.

Description:
The UK Nature Projects Association has been established to bring together developers of nature-based projects across the UK. With an aim of fostering a thriving, high integrity market for all types of nature-based solutions; the Association will seek to leverage its combined knowledge and experience to support the evolution of a trusted, respected, and sustainable market for all types of nature-based projects across the UK in order to support and accelerate the UK’s efforts to effectively combat the climate and biodiversity crises.  

Whilst the Association has been founded by an initial core of active Woodland Carbon Code and Peatland Code project developers, it is the aim of the Association to grow its membership and ensure that it represents a wide variety of project developers working across the nature-based solutions sector.

Name: Holzmühle Westerkamp GmbH
Description:
Das international tätige Unternehmen Holzmühle Westerkamp GmbH ist fest im Oldenburger Münsterland verankert. Seit hier vor über einem Jahrhundert die erste Mühle, noch als Getreidemühle, entstand, hat sich viel bewegt. Heute sind unsere innovativen Produkten wie Holzmehl, Holzfasern und Holzgranulate und Rezepturen in der Holzmehlverarbeitung in der ganzen Welt gefragt und wir sind ein moderner Industriebetrieb, der mit viel Know- How und modernen Anlagen, vielfältige Basisprodukte für die Weiterverarbeitung zu hochwertigen Qualitätsprodukten anbietet.
Daher lautet unser Leitspruch: „Produkte von Westerkamp – Von Norddöllen in die ganze Welt!“ Die Produktpalette reicht von Holzmehl für die Glukose-, Stärke-, Wasser- und Fettfiltration bis hin zu Holzfasern für die Herstellung von Biokunststoffen, Faserverbundstoffen und WPC. Außerdem werden die Holzfasern in ökologischen Reinigungsprodukten, der Herstellung von Bodenbelägen und für Angelbedarf eingesetzt.
Eine Besonderheit ist die patentierte Aufbereitung des Holzmehles zu Lignocellulose. Hieraus entstehen Einzelfuttermittel, Mischfuttermittel oder Vormischungen in der Tierernährung. Eine Einstreu für Nutztiere ergänzt diese Produktlinie, die durch unseren Vertriebspartner AGROMED AUSTRIA GMBH exklusiv vermarktet wird. 
Die hohen Qualitätsansprüche an die Rohwarenbeschaffung und den Herstellungsprozess sowie der effiziente Umgang mit den Ressourcen stehen im Vordergrund unserer Arbeit. Die Einhaltung der Kundenvorgaben durch zufriedene, gut qualifizierte Mitarbeiter mit hohem Verantwortungsbewusstsein für die hergestellten Produkte hat oberste Priorität. Wir sind offen für neue Projekte, Produkte, Prozesse und Wege, das zeichnet uns aus. Denn nur wer nicht stehen bleibt, schafft Raum für neue Ideen und entwickelt sich weiter.

At Siya Forestry LP, we are proud to stand at the forefront of the forestry sector, guided by the wisdom and leadership of the Osoyoos Indian Band. Our mission is rooted in a profound respect for our traditional lands and a commitment to managing them with integrity and innovation.

Join us as we forge a path to sustainability, guided by tradition and inspired by the endless possibilities of tomorrow.

We do not buy, sell, broker, or process timber. We are focused on our core business, which is mechanized timber harvesting. In this industry, we are one of the largest companies in the world.

Our main office is located in Hämeenlinna, Finland. Our operations in Sweden are managed by our subsidiary MKP Sverige AB, with its office in Eksjö, Sweden.

Nous y pratiquons une sylviculture douce et proche de la nature afin de produire du bois d'oeuvre, que nous valorisons en circuit court. 25% de nos forêts sont laissées en libre évolution. 

Nous acceptons de nouveaux associés et de nouvelles associées tout au long de l'année, afin de faire grossir notre capital et de nous porter acquéreur de nouvelles parcelles forestières.

Name: Bäume für Morgen
Description:

Anstatt spenden an ausländische Aufforstungsorganisationen zu geben fokussieren wir uns darauf selbst Hand anzulegen. Wir Pflanzen Bäume mit der Hilfe von Einheimischen in Österreich.

Sensibilisierung durch Pflanzen:
In unserer Welt ist es einfach sich in den Routinen und Normen zu verlaufen. Das Gespür für unsere Umgebung verlieren wir dabei. Daher ist es umso wichtiger wieder Erde anzufassen und zurückzufinden.

Gemeinschaft:
Bei Bäume für Morgen steht das Gemeinsam im Fokus. Die Klimakrise ist einer der komplexesten Probleme der Menschheitsgeschichte und viele wollen positives leisten, wissen aber nicht wie. Wir vernetzen Helfer und schaffen eine Umgebung der Veränderung

Name: Vesterskoven I/S
Description:
Vesterskoven er en privat skov, beliggende nord for Ringsted. Skoven har siden 2015 har været ejet af Familien Følsgaard. 

Det samlede areal er på 565 ha. fordelt på 477 ha. skov og 88 ha. ager.  Skoven er en gammel mosaikskov og består af 2/3 løv- og 1/3 nåletræer.

Carsten Følsgaard, som i dag ejer skoven, tog allerede fra første færd hul på bæredygtig udvikling, ved at stoppe al brug af kemi. 

I dag drives skoven så bæredygtigt som muligt og der arbejdes aktivt på at kombinere trædyrkning til produktion med en høj biodiversitet.  

Som led i dette arbejde, er Zoologisk Have, København og Skovdyrkerne, Øerne, vores vigtigste samarbejdspartnere. 

Vesterskoven er FSC-, PEFC- og Økosystemtjenestecertificeret.

Logrithm exists to unlock the value that’s tied up in these inefficient systems and processes, so it can be leveraged to drive innovation and growth in the Forestry industry.

Name: Interior Logging Association
Description:
About the ILA

ILA members are your neighbours in communities from the Fraser Valley to the East Kootenays, North to Fort St John and West to Smithers. Our association’s strong and influential voice in the forest industry represents independent loggers’ interests throughout this region.

We work to keep the timber harvesting industry thriving, promoting the benefits of a robust and sustainable industry, raising awareness and educating our youth about the importance of forestry and ensuring our members continue to be a strong economic force in the province.

Through our solid alliance with other forest sector organizations, the ILA has contributed to the growth and cultivation of a healthy, sustainable and vibrant forest resource in British Columbia that will support our communities, families and economy today and always.
What We Do

Logging has been a mainstay of the provincial economy for more than a century. Interior Logging Association members make a substantial contribution to this economy through their business activities, providing high paying jobs in communities throughout the southern Interior region and enhancing our quality of life.

The ILA works with the provincial and municipal governments to ensure our members’ interests are recognized in policy and regulations that impact our industry, our businesses and the communities we live and work in.

The association works with the BC Forest Safety Council to ensure our members are operating to the highest standards of safety and their workers come home well to their families each and every day.

Committed to growing a thriving and sustainable industry, the ILA is a strong supporter of education and training programs that help prepare the next generation of forestry workers for the greenest workforce in our province.

Name: Way Key Limited Partnership
Description:

This partnership between We Wai Kai and the ROGA Group will provide lasting benefits to the community through provision of meaningful employment and capacity building. Way Key LP will build capacity through equity in assets and through the training the work force. Current clients include Western Forest Products, Mosaic Forest Management, and BC Hydro. 
  
Way Kay LP can leverage wider ROGA group competencies to complete various projects including right of way clearing, road building, grubbing and stripping,  basic earthworks, and a variety of utilities related services.

Name: New England Society of American Foresters (NESAF)
Description:
The New England Society of American Foresters (NESAF) is a multi- state society within the national Society of American Foresters. NESAF is composed of four divisions representing the six New England states of Connecticut (CT), Maine (ME), Massachusetts (MA), New Hampshire (NH), Rhode Island (RI), and Vermont (VT). The Divisions are Green Mountain (VT), Granite State (NH), Maine (ME) and Yankee (RI, CT and MA).

Our mission as foresters is to be responsible stewards of the earth’s forests while meeting society’s vital needs. The challenge of our mission lies in keeping forest ecosystems healthy and intact while concurrently drawing on their resources. We will meet this challenge by carefully monitoring and managing the effects of natural and human forces on the forest. Our decisions will be guided by our professional knowledge, our compassion for all living things, our desire to improve citizens’ lives, and our respect and concern for the entire forest ecosystem. By advancing forestry science, education, technology and the practice of forestry, the New England Society of American Foresters will provide the leadership to achieve its mission.

Description:
K&D Logging, a Meraki Company, had humble beginnings but has evolved into an industry-leading company deeply embedded within the communities in which we operate.

The evolution of K&D Logging serves as a testament to a company that has expanded while preserving its local identity and demonstrating an unwavering commitment to the community and safety.

Name: Berliner Forsten
Description:
Berlin – die Hauptstadt der Wälder

Ein Fünftel von Berlin ist bewaldet. Mit fast 30.000 Hektar verfügt die Stadt über so viel Wald, wie kaum eine andere Metropole Europas. Berlins Wälder sichern nachhaltig nutzbares Trinkwasser für die Stadt, sorgen für saubere Luft und ein besseres Stadtklima und liefern den wertvollen Rohstoff Holz. Darüber hinaus sind sie unverzichtbarer Lebensraum für unzählige Tier- und Pflanzenarten und dienen vor allem der Erholung. 

Mehr als 1800 Kilometer Waldwege, 14 Waldspielplätze, kilometerlange Uferwege an Flüssen und Seen stehen allen für Erholung, Sport und Entspannung zur Verfügung. 

Als waldpädagogische Einrichtungen stehen das Lehrkabinett Teufelssee und die neun Berliner Waldschulen als „grüne Lernorte“ zu Verfügung.

Seit über 100 Jahren pflegen, schützen und gestalten die Berliner Forsten mit ihren rund 250 Beschäftigten in 28 Revieren und vier Forstämtern sowie dem Landesforstamt den Wald nachhaltig.

Name: Tees Community Forest
Description:
Our mission is to create a thriving, resilient landscape across the Tees Valley, planting woodlands that tackle climate change, restore nature, and enrich local lives.

We care about:

People - by creating accessible, high-quality green infrastructure to support wellbeing

Nature - by enhancing biodiversity, improving soil health, and reducing air pollution

Climate - by delivering nature-based solutions for carbon capture and flood resilience

We provide free guidance and support to landowners, land managers and partners to plan, fund and deliver woodland creation. From large-scale planting to low-density schemes, mixed habitats, hedgerows, orchards and woodland pasture.

Whether urban or rural, every site we help plant unlocks benefits for people, wildlife, and the planet.

We proudly help deliver the Trees for Climate grant, the Government’s flagship woodland creation programme, and we’re one of fifteen brilliant community forests in England.

Description:
PT Karya Nusantara Selatan (KNS), is a prominent player in the timber industry, operating under the Terra World Venture umbrella from Singapore. As a dynamic subsidiary of PT Berkat Cahaya Timber (BCT), KNS is dedicated to overseeing the entire timber product lifecycle—from development and processing to trading and marketing. Our mission is to deliver high-quality, sustainable timber solutions that foster industry growth while maintaining ecological balance.

PT Berkat Cahaya Timber (BCT), founded in 1973, is renowned for its leadership in sustainable forestry in Indonesia. With extensive forest concession rights, BCT has harvested over 2.2 million cubic meters of logs, valued at over USD 500 million. Committed to responsible logging and environmental stewardship, BCT is guided by our third-generation owner.

Based in Singapore, PT Karya Nusantara Selatan benefits from the high standards and excellence associated with Terra World Venture. Our operations include production facilities in Indonesia, with additional offices such as our headquarters in South Jakarta and a warehouse in Surabaya, located in Kompleks Pergudangan Bumi Maspion. To support our global reach and provide comprehensive service, we also have an agent in Dubai known as Mahsul Trading.

Together, BCT and KNS are at the forefront of sustainable timber solutions, driving progress while supporting community well-being and environmental preservation.

Name: Ascension Tree Care
Description: Certified Arborists in Oakland County Michigan. We specialize in tree removal, tree trimming / pruning, and Tree Health Assessments

Name: HOFFMANS VERKSTAD AB
Description:
Hoffmans Verkstad AB is a producer of mostly outdoor power products for forest care. 
We have about 200 years experience of metal sheet processing and industry manufacturing. We have machines and tools for metal being cut, bent, assembled, surfaced, pressed and also different kind of packaging. 
We have a long history of good secure business relationships. 
The knowledge in Hoffmans Verkstad is deep, we have and can develope both tools and soloutions.
Don't hesitate to get in touch if you have any questions regarding hiring us, collabs or for any other type of questions.

Name: JPW Tree Service LLC
Description: JPW Tree Service is a fully licensed and insured company that specializes in professional grade tree services. Some of these services include tree pruning, tree removal, land clearing, stump grinding, stump removal, and small logging operations. We are based out of Medway, MA and take pride in providing our community with quality and environmentally-friendly tree work!

Name: MWL - Märkische Walddienstleistungen GmbH
Description: “Gemeinsam Wald machen” – das ist das Motto der Märkischen, einem starken forstlichen Zusammenschluss im südlichen Brandenburg. Die Märkischen sind Partner in der Bewirtschaftung von Waldflächen und unterstützen Waldbesitzer dabei, ihre Wälder nachhaltig und ökonomisch erfolgreich zu bewirtschaften. Ob klassischer Waldbau oder naturschutzfachlich orientiert, die Märkischen setzen sich für die Zukunftsfähigkeit des Waldes ein1. Als Mitglied einer der neun Forstbetriebsgemeinschaften (FBGen) profitieren Waldeigentümer von kontinuierlicher forstfachlicher Unterstützung und optimaler Holzvermarktung. Gemeinsam mit der MWL Märkische Walddienstleistungen GmbH setzen sie Maßnahmen um, um die Ziele im Wald zu erreichen.

Name: F.W. Becker GmbH
Description: Seit über 75 Jahren bieten wir ein umfangreiches Angebot an Holz und Holzprodukten für Handwerk, Handel, Industrie und Privatkunden. Mit großen Lagerflächen, hochwertigem Sortiment, schneller Auftragsabwicklung und einem Rundum-Service sind wir der Holzhandel für die Region. Über 60 Mitarbeiter kümmern sich um die Wünsche der Kunden und teilen mit Ihnen ihre Erfahrungen mit dem natürlichen und nachhaltigen Werkstoff „Holz“.

Name: TimberTraxx & TimberNex
Description: Von der mobilen App für Waldarbeiter bis zur umfassenden Management-Plattform für Forstbetriebe - digitalisieren Sie Ihre gesamte Forstwirtschaft mit einer integrierten Lösung

Name: Mingamos
Swanson Forest Products
Description: Swanson Forest Products (SFP) was founded by David Joseph Swanson in October 1985, and the company is involved in international log trading. As the company evolved, it strategically acquired two (2) sawmills named Big Timber (Vinton, IA) and Big Timber (Muscatine, IA). The acquisitions allowed SFP to directly supply raw material to the sawmills, allowing vertical integration and expansions within the marketplace.  While Swanson Forest Products is still operating, the two sawmills were sold in 2022.

Name: Clark's Firewood
Description: Clark's Firewood specializes in providing quality firewood sourced from a farm in Upperville, VA.  All of our firewood is hardwood and has been dried for a minimum of 6 months. We chop and deliver firewood to clients in Virginia, DC, and Maryland.

Name: Frhr. v. Wilmowsky’sche Forstverwaltung
Description: Das Waldgut Buchenau befindet sich im Familien-Besitz der Freiherrn von Wilmowsky. Der im Landkreis Fulda gelegene Betrieb wird professionell bewirtschaftet, mit dem Ziel, einen nachhaltig gesunden Besitz an die jeweils nächste Generation übergeben zu können und somit das Familienerbe zu bewahren und zu mehren.

Name: Grupo IFISA
Description: Ofrecemos tarimas y embalajes que cumplen con las normas Internacionales NIMF-15 y la norma nacional NOM 144. Contamos con 9 estufas para la aplicación del tratamiento térmico fitosanitario (HT), todos nuestros embarques se entregan con la documentación forestal avalada por SEMARNAT para tratar tarimas y embalajes de exportación, así como con el sello de este mismo en los productos: MX1053. Así mismo, trabajamos mediante la normativa ISO9001:2015, enfocada en la calidad, la satisfacción del cliente y el desarrollo de proveedores.

Name: Nigeria Forest Economy Summit
Description:
Nigeria Forest Economy Summit
The Nigeria Forest Economy summit, is a forum for discussing the economic impact of forestry, aims to promote sustainable dev. of forest resources.

Name: FinnHarvest GmbH
Description: FinnHarvest ist ein Unternehmen, das seit 20 Jahren forstliche Dienstleistungen in deutschen Wäldern erbringt. Wir bieten moderne Holzernteverfahren für den Waldbesitz, die Industrie oder Selbstwerbungsunternehmen an. Dabei steht die Effizienz und Sicherheit der Einschlagsprojekte an erster Stelle. Die Betreuung der Maßnahmen wird von unserem deutschsprachigen Personal übernommen, das Ihnen bei Entscheidungen und Fragen zur Seite steht. So können wir Sie mit unserem professionellen Service unterstützen.
