Description: Forst Aletsch is a company based out of Fieschertal, Valais, Switzerland.

Name: Fairlie Woodfuels Scotland Limited
Description:
Fairlie Woodfuels is a family-run business based in Ayrshire, Scotland. With over a decade of experience, we specialize in producing and delivering high-quality firewood products across Scotland. 
Our mission is to provide reliable and efficient heating solutions for homes, restaurants and hotels using wood burners and open fires. 
Fairlie Woodfuels prioritizes quality, customer service, and sustainability, ensuring responsibly sourced wood to minimize environmental impact. 

  We also operate under The Northern Firewood Co, expanding our reach across the UK while maintaining our commitment to excellence and customer satisfaction.

Name: PT. Nawasena Hutan Lestari
Description: Since 2006, PT Nawasena Hutan Lestari has been committed to managing industrial forests in West Kalimantan and East Kalimantan with sustainable principles. We utilize natural resources responsibly, without deforestation, and support green economic growth through innovation and environmentally friendly technology. In every step, we uphold integrity, act fairly, and carry out our duties with commitment, discipline, and high motivation. We believe that the plantation industry is not just about production, but also about building a greener, balanced, and sustainable future for the environment and society.

Name: CLEAR VIEW TREE & HEDGE SERVICES LIMITED
Description:
Clear View Tree & Hedge Services Ltd is a long-standing, Safecontractor approved, family run company. 
We cover all aspects of tree surgery and hedge maintenance in both the commercial and domestic sector. 
We also offer a MEWP with operator hire service, for our 22m tracked CMC Spider Lift and our  4x4 CPL truck mounted platform. 

As a team, we are very proud of the network we have developed over the years with our key values including the implementation of safe working practices, promoting positive customer relations, all whilst maintaining the highest attention to detail. 

Whatever the size and requirement of the job our fully qualified and insured team have the skills to provide a well organised and expertly conducted service.

Name: RJ Woodland Services Limited
Description:
RJ Woodland Services Limited are a private forestry company based in Omagh, Co. Tyrone providing a complete range of woodland services throughout Northern Ireland.  Our clients range from farmers and small private landowners to large private estates, public bodies and charities.
RJ Woodland Services Limited offer a comprehensive range of professional services connected to all forms of woodland management and aim to provide the highest quality of service.
We are members of the Confederation of Forest Industries (ConFor), The Royal Forestry Society (RFS), British Horse Loggers and the Institute of Chartered Foresters.

Name: Simpson Arboriculture Ltd
Description:
Simpson Arboriculture Ltd is a progressive forestry and arboriculture company, well-equipped and experienced in all aspects of vegetation management and forestry operations. 

With over 18 years’ experience, our professional and qualified team of arborists carry out tree surgery, site clearance and forestry work across Lincolnshire and further afield. 

We utilise modern techniques wherever possible to maximise efficiency and minimise risk. When planning a job, the level of risk involved is always carefully considered. Generally speaking, carrying out tree work at height poses the highest risk to an arborist. This is why we look at a variety of options and consider techniques such as using a MEWP or carrying out work from the ground using specialised machinery where possible.  

For site and vegetation clearance, we utilise plant machinery as much as possible. Our specialised machinery such as excavators, grapple saw, forwarder, tractor with timber crane and mulchers make light work of removing trees and other vegetation from a site. This allows us to offer site clearances for commercial clients on a large scale. We quickly and effectively clear land, leaving the finished site void of debris and ready for any development, construction, landscaping or infrastructure project.

Simpson Arboriculture undertakes many aspects of woodland and forestry management in both rural and urban settings, from woodland thinning to replanting. We have extensive experience with clients such as estates, land management companies and woodland & tree management companies on projects such as thinning, clear fell/felling and re-planting. 

We have been officially recognised as being qualified to perform tree work by multiple health and safety bodies. We are proud to be recognised as an Arboricultural Association approved contractor. This recognises that we work safely and efficiently. We are also members of Forestry Industry Safety Accord (FISA).

Name: BIOFOR SpA
Description: Empresa de servicios de maquinaria integrales para la Industria Forestal, cuyo objetivo es satisfacer las crecientes demandas en operación con equipos especializados, así como también de un servicio seguro, oportuno y eficiente.

Name: Aplicación +DERA
Description: Ofrecemos SOLUCIONES TECNOLÓGICAS que agilizan los procesos de gestión del suministro de madera desde el monte hasta la entrada en fábrica, optimizando recursos e incrementando beneficios gracias a un mayor control en tiempo real de la logística de la empresa y de la calidad del recurso.

Name: KELLERHOLZ GmbH & Co. KG
Description: KELLERHOLZ ist ein modernes Industriesägewerk im Südwesten Deutschlands. Am Standort in Lichtenau verarbeitet das Werk über 120.000 fm Rundholz pro Jahr.

Name: FOREST TRACK
Description: Nous réalisons diverses missions autour du forestier telles que le broyage de branchages, souches, cailloux, ainsi que de la préparation de sol et l'andainage de branches.

Name: The Association for Forest Multipurpose Use
Description: The Association for Forest Multipurpose Use is a national network and a player with increasing importance in sustainable business and rural development, focusing on the forest's raw materials, resources, and intangible values. We strive to ensure that the many values and opportunities forests offer are utilized and developed sustainably through entrepreneurial multipurpose use.

Name: Central Wood Recyclers
Description:
CWR is a family-owned and operated business that has been in the wood recycling business for  20 years. Processing over 200,000t of  Hog fuel per year CWR is one of the largest Biomass suppliers in NZ.

We pride ourselves on delivering top quality low moisture products for our customers. Helping us achieve this is our own fleet of bulk trucks. These trucks ensure we can get our product from grinder to customer without the risk of added moisture due to wait time.

Name: SharpForst
Description: Die Software für Holzerfassung und Logistik. Für Förster, Holzhändler und Produzenten. Holzlistenverwaltung, Vermarktungen und Gutschriften, Auftragsverwaltung und Stundenerfassung und  Logistik in einer App.

Description: Oleme spetsialiseerunud tõste- ja temperatuurikäsitluse seadmete maaletoomisele ja hooldusele.

Description:
Ein Partner, viele Lösungen. Gesamtlösungen aus einer Hand:
Forstservice, Industrieservice, Safety Service

Name: scolel´té
Description: Scolel’te, significa en idioma maya-tseltal, “El árbol que crece”, siendo el programa más longevo en el Mercado Voluntario de Carbono a nivel internacional. Ha brindado servicios socioambientales a comunidades campesinas e indígenas, a través de la captura de carbono con sistemas agroforestales y forestales.
Location: SAN CRISTOBAL DE LAS CASAS, CHIAPAS

Name: International Furniture Alliance (IFA)
Description:
International Furniture Alliance or IFA is a Supply Chain Specialist with over 33 years of experience supporting the furniture industry across Malaysia, Vietnam, and China, with strong export links to the USA, Europe, and Australia. Leveraging established connections with global buyers seeking sustainably sourced timber, IFA brings proven expertise in managing large-scale supply chains and delivering high-quality furniture to international markets.

In partnership with CMO, a trusted leader with a track record in securing certification for large-scale forestry operations in Thailand, Vietnam, and Brazil, IFA is well-positioned to deliver credibility and compliance in the sustainable timber trade.

With a regional presence in Malaysia, Vietnam, and China, IFA is strategically placed to connect RISDA’s smallholder rubber plantations with the right customers. Working together with CMO Malaysia and other partners, IFA supports certification initiatives for RISDA’s rubberwood supply, ensuring that smallholders gain access to premium markets while promoting responsible forestry practices.

Ultimately, IFA’s goal is to establish RISDA rubber plantations as the trusted national leader in sustainably sourced rubberwood—the first name buyers think of when sourcing responsibly managed timber in Malaysia.

Name: Conseillers Forestiers de la Région de Québec
Description: À titre de conseiller forestier accrédité auprès des 6 agences régionales de mise en valeur des forêts privées, présentes sur son vaste territoire, CFRQ développe son expertise auprès d’une clientèle variée de propriétaires de boisés privés, inscrits au programme d’aide à la mise en valeur des forêts privées (PAMVFP).

Name: Waldbesitzervereinigung Bamberg e.V.
Description:
Für unsere Mitglieder bieten wir umfangreiche Serviceleistungen zu fairen Konditionen an, um ihnen den Erhalt und die Pflege ihrer Wälder zu erleichtern und ihren wirtschaftlichen Erfolg zu verbessern. Wir bieten als Premiumpartner folgende forstliche Dienstleistungen:
- Beratung
- Holzverkauf
- Holzeinschlag
- Pflanzen-Sammelbestellungen
- Grenzsteinsuche
- Waldpflegeverträge
- Fortbildungen
- Leihmaschinen

Wenn Sie eine unserer vielfältigen Dienstleistungen in Anspruch nehmen möchten, setzen Sie sich einfach mit unserer Geschäftsstelle in Verbindung. Wir beraten Sie gerne.

Name: Matariki Forests
Description:
We grow and manage 116,000 hectares of forest, from the top of the North Island to the base of the South.

We are a group of committed and passionate people. We demonstrate high levels of strategic thinking and technological nous, balanced with respect - for our environment, our staff, our contractors, our suppliers, our communities and our shareholders.

We work in a way that is smart, future-focused and genuine, ensuring our employees and business partners feel energised, valued and part of a vibrant and important industry.

We are committed to investing in our people, our technology and our processes – so we can all benefit from and enjoy working in a company that will have a positive impact on our environment, our economy and our standard of living.

Name: Pole Bois Sud Champagne
Description: Le « Pôle Bois Sud Champagne » a de multiples objectifs avec, en premier lieu, la volonté de changer l’image de la filière en lui redonnant de la visibilité pour attirer de nouveaux talents et augmenter sa valeur ajoutée sur le territoire. Il s’agira également de relever les enjeux de la filière en construisant des solutions opérationnelles qui renforcent les entreprises. Ce Pôle permettra également de structurer l’offre territoriale Bois pour faire émerger de nouvelles activités (innovation, diversification, implantation). Cette nouvelle dynamique doit aussi insuffler la formation et le recrutement de nouveaux collaborateurs. Enfin, la création d’un tel Pôle permet de faire connaître et valoriser le territoire, l’humain et les métiers autour du Bois grâce à la communication et à la promotion de la filière et de ses acteurs.

Name: Kihlgast træfældning og træpleje
Description:
Kihlgast Træfældning & Træpleje er et specialiseret træfældnings firma.
Vi udføre alle former for træfældning og træpleje for både private, virksomheder og kommuner.

VI kan dog også lave ydelser som følgende:

Flishugning
Stubfræsning
Hækkeklipning
Sektions fældning
Plantning af små og store træer

Name: B & B Tree Specialists
Description:
Established over 35 years ago, we are Lincolnshire's foremost privately owned and operated, Arboricultural Association Approved (held proudly since 1988) Tree Surgery and Forestry Services provider. 

B & B Tree Specialists was formed on the basis that if a job is worth doing, It's worth doing well, the core of what we are about today. We are now into our third generation of the family with over thirty years of practical experience backed by an extensive range of Arboriculture Qualifications.

As a third-generation company we are committed to this industry 100% and strive to be the best there is, as a result, we have made the investment to back up this commitment. Over recent years, we've grown significantly due to our increased investment in advanced forestry machinery and equipment, consistent up-to-date training, Health and Safety accreditation, along with continued awareness of environmental issues, to enhance the profile of our company and the arboricultural industry in general.

We help our clients by providing the following services:

- Arboricultural Services
- Forestry Services
- Stump grinding
- Tree Condition Surveys
- Ground and Site vegetation clearance
- Highways and roadside works
- Air spade investigations
- Environmental management

We are National Highways Sector Scheme 18, CHAS and CONSTRUCTIONLINE certified. In 2007, we had our professional status independently confirmed in the form of accreditation for IS0 9001, 1400 and 18001.

As such, we can guarantee all our Clients the peace of mind they need to choose our company with the knowledge that they are getting a competent Arboricultural and Forestry Services provider.

Name: Burgin Timberland
Description: Burgin Timberland is a progressive timberland management company based out of Cuthbert, Georgia growing loblolly pine for the forest products industry.  Our forests also provide an excellent opportunity for the recreational hunting of prized deer, turkey, and migratory birds.

Name: Nate's Tree Service Inc.
Description: Nate’s Tree Service, Inc. (NTS) offers a large variety of tree management services to commercial and residential customers. We are a Woman Owned Small Business (WOSB) and a Woman Business Enterprise (WBE), with over 40 years of experience in the tree industry. For us, our work is all about customer satisfaction and the safety of our employees and those we service. By providing the highest quality of vegetation management for the past 6 generations, our family-owned business has consistently promoted a diversified workforce by employing, living within, and supporting the communities we service.

Name: Alamindo Consortium
Description: Holding Company from PT Alamindo Lestari Sejahtera focusing on Carbon Business.

Name: SOCOGEF (Sud-Ouest Conseils & Gestion Forestière)
Description:
SOCOGEF accompagne les propriétaires forestiers dans la gestion durable et le renouvellement des forêts grâce à ses 2 activités :
- Le conseil et la gestion forestière
- La sylviculture 
SOCOGEF est également porteur de projets certifiés Label bas-carbone, dont l'objectif est de permettre de contribuer à la neutralité carbone en agissant pour la forêt.

Name: Hackgut Möslinger
Description: Wood chip production, wood harvesting, waste wood recycling, transport, contract drying, earthworks, demolition work, disposal and container service Your full-service provider for everything to do with wood and MORE - everything from a single source! We are an established company in the areas of production, processing and trading in quality wood chips and can look back on many years of experience in the industry. The MORE of services... Whether for private customers or construction companies, our services go far beyond the topic of "wood". With our powerful fleet of vehicles and our committed team, we are also your reliable partner for earthworks, demolition work, disposal, recycling and container services.

Name: Johann Vossmeyer GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Ihr zuverlässiger Holzlieferant in Norddeutschland. 
Wir sind spezialisiert auf die Bauindustrie, insbesondere Hoch-, Tief-, und Brückenbau. Außerdem beliefern wir die Verpackungsindustrie, den Baustoff- und Holzfachhandel sowie Zimmereibetriebe.
Flexibel, kompetent und lieferfähig.

Wir liefern in:
Berlin, Brandenburg, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern, Sachsen-Anhalt, Schleswig-Holstein, Hamburg, Bremen, Niedersachsen und Nordrhein-Westfalen

Name: SKT-Team Leo Köhler
Description:
Unsere Dienstleistungen:
Baumpflege * Baumrodung * Kompetente Beratung * Gutachten & Stellungnahmen * Forstmulchen * Wurzelstockentfernung * Erstellung/Verwaltung von Baumkatastern * Industrieklettern * Verkauf von selbst gestalteten Outdoor- und Indoormöbel/Accessoires aus Holz

Name: RS Environmental
Description:
Based in Huddersfield, West Yorkshire, we offer complete tree and hedge care to both commercial and domestic clients. Including: Tree felling, thinning, crown reductions, crown lifting and stump removal. We are equipped to carry out everything from site clearance to regular maintenance. 
We also take pride in our high quality hedge trimming and maintenance, from light trimming to reductions and removal if required. 
We also offer grounds maintenance services, from grass cutting and mowing, weed control and invasive species management.

Name: Kuru Contracting Limited
Description:
KURU CONTRACTING LIMITED was established in 1997 by father-son duo Jack and Ricky Kuru. 

In 2012, Ricky and wife Leanne purchased the company and have continued the vision of providing the best quality products and services in our industries. 

Our foundation has been built on 25 years of Roadline logging to now offering all forms of Forestry harvesting which are all mechanised operations - Roadline, Harvestline, Tower Yarder and Swing Yarder.  

In recent years, we have expanded our business and branched out into other industries including:

Civil - Road Maintenance, Engineering, Bulk cartage and Traffic Management

Logistics - Log Haulage

Quarrying - Exploration Drilling, Extraction, Crushing, Screening and Stockpiling

Heavy Haulage & Hiab Services - Plant & Equipment Haulage, Bulk Metal Cartage

Workshop & Garage - Engineering, Auto-Mechanics, Petrol & Diesel Supply 

Cafe - Cafe Management

Name: Forestry Training Service
Description: Create a high quality, shared training service supported by the private, public and third sectors, committed to attracting a diverse workforce and delivering and sourcing the best training to meet the needs of a growing forestry and trees economy across the UK.

Name: Natural Resources Development Corporation Limited
Description: NRDCL is the professional agency known for sustainably harvesting, marketing and equitably distributing the nation’s natural resources ensuring availability, accessibility and affordability.

Name: FOMEA AG
Description:
Die FOMEA GmbH ist ein direkter Vertriebspartner der Firma Haglöf SWEDEN AB.
Ein Schweizer Unternehmen mit österreichischer UID Nr.: ATU68223558. Unsere Kunden aus dem EU Raum erhalten Ihre Waren ab unserem EU Auslieferlager in Österreich.

Wir sind Ihr kompetenter und praxisorientierter Berater bei der Wahl Ihrer Messausrüstung und EDV Software im Forstbereich.

Name: ARBOTEC
Description:
Wie is Arbotec?
Een helm en een kettingzaag, en vooral heel veel passie: daarmee begon Arbotec in 2008. Inmiddels zijn we een door en door geroutineerd bedrijf dat zichzelf met recht specialist op het gebied van bosbouw mag noemen. 
Ons uitgebreid machinepark laat ons toe om iedere opdracht efficiënt en veilig tot een goed einde te brengen. Geen enkele uitdaging gaan we uit de weg: eerst luisteren we aandachtig naar de door de opdrachtgever geschetste situatie; vervolgens bespreken we samen met hem de manier van aanpak.

Waar staan we voor?

- “Hands-on” mentaliteit
- Aangepast eigen machinepark
- Gedegen kennis en ervaring
- Afwerking met  oog op het bekomen van volledige tevredenheid
- Bijzondere aandacht voor veiligheid, orde en netheid op de werf.

Met aandacht voor natuur en milieu zoeken we steeds naar de beste organisatie en ingezette middelen om het gewenste resultaat te bereiken.

De diensten die wij aanbieden:

- Natuurontwikkeling
- Landschapsinrichting/-beheer
- Bosexploitatie
- Bouwrijp maken van bouwgronden

Name: Forestech Déboisement
Description:
Forestech est une entreprise québécoise spécialisée dans les travaux forestiers depuis 2008. Fondée par Tommy Poulin, elle s’appuie sur une équipe expérimentée et des équipements modernes pour offrir des services de déboisement, abattage, débroussaillage et déchiquetage. Nous œuvrons principalement dans la maîtrise de la végétation. 

Notre engagement repose sur des valeurs fortes : sécurité, respect, rigueur, innovation et esprit d’équipe. Chaque projet est réalisé avec professionnalisme, dans le respect de la nature et des normes en vigueur.
Forestech aspire à demeurer une référence dans le domaine forestier au Québec, en alliant savoir-faire, technologie et passion pour le métier.

Name: Brigadas Grifo SRL
Description: "Brigads Grifo SRL: Líderes en proveer personal capacitado para el cultivo, cosecha y mantenimiento de plantaciones de yerba, té, Eucaliptos y Pinos. Ofrecemos servicios de brigada de incendios forestales, asegurando la protección de activos naturales. También brindamos una brigada especializada para asistir en crisis de incendios en la provincia de Corrientes. Name: Legacy Forest Management LLC (Colorado)
Description:
Where Forest Management Meets Purpose

Legacy Forest Management LLC, proudly veteran-owned and operated, is rooted in the San Luis Valley of southern Colorado. We are dedicated to helping private landowners and forest managers throughout the southwestern United States meet their unique forest management goals.

Our expertise lies in ecologically driven forest stewardship—ensuring that today’s actions support the health and resilience of forests for future generations. From developing comprehensive management plans to carrying out on-the-ground projects like thinning and tree planting, our work is grounded in forest ecology principles to deliver practical, sustainable results.

We also recognize that for many, forestland is a vital financial asset. That’s why we emphasize strategies that not only protect and restore ecological balance but also offer strong returns on investment. Backed by deep knowledge, hands-on experience, and a steadfast commitment to our clients, we strive to tackle pressing challenges like catastrophic wildfires and declining forest health—providing tailored solutions that work for you and your land.

Legacy Forest Management LLC was founded by a seasoned professional forester with hands-on experience as both a logger and wildland firefighter. This diverse background fuels our deep-rooted expertise and commitment to excellence in forestry.

As a proud veteran-owned company, our core value of service drives everything we do. We’re problem-solvers by nature—committed to turning vision into action and delivering real, measurable results on the ground. We focus on confronting the most critical challenges facing our forests today with experience across Colorado, Arizona, New Mexico, and beyond.

From start to finish, we apply sound, science-based forestry principles to ensure landowners and managers achieve lasting, visible improvements in the health and resilience of their landscapes.

Name: Mälby Skog AB
Description:
Vi gör saker lite annorlunda. Och därmed enklare.

Vi erbjuder ett komplett tjänsteutbud under ett och samma tak, utan att det tillkommer kostsamma mellanhänder längs vägen. Resultatet blir ett arbetsflöde med full kontroll, med egenanställd personal och egna maskiner.

Mälby Skog styr hela produktionskedjan vilket gör att du som kund inte behöver vänta på nästkommande del i projektet eller dess underleverantör. Vi styr hela arbetsflödet och utför alltid jobbet direkt utan långsamma ledtider eller avbrott.

Tack vare att hela vårt tjänsteutbud finns inom samma bolag kan vi erbjuda dig en enda kontaktperson som följer dig genom arbetsflödet, från planering till att ditt timmer når sågverket.

Mälby Skog optimerar timmerandelen i avverkningen då vi äger och styr apteringen själva. Vi har inte en entreprenör som avverkar åt oss – våra anställda har istället tid att att utföra värdehöjande kap utifrån din unika skog.

Mälby Skog styr flödet från hygge till industri och kan därför, med våra egna maskiner och lastbilar, plocka ut fler sortiment ur just din skog.

Mälby Skog nyttjar hela trädets värde och skapar större vinst för både skogsägare och miljö. Vi äger hela kedjan och levererar hållbara lösningar utan onödiga mellanhänder.

Välkomna till Mälby Skog

Name: Montrose Trees  Ltd
Description:
Award Winning Tree Surgeons covering Essex and surrounding areas.
 

Montrose Trees brings a professional, client orientated, knowledge based, environmentally sound ethos to professional tree work. We aim to help our clients understand tree surgery and how agriculture affects their trees in a friendly yet informative manner. We aim to help our clients - residential and commercial get the best results for their trees. At Montrose we offer sound, honest, free consultation on the many diverse aspects of tree management that you may require and we will gladly take on any corresponding paperwork needed including tree preservation orders and much more.



We work hard to raise awareness of the important roles that trees play in our gardens, towns and countryside. As an environmentally conscientious company, we strive to ensure that our clients trees are managed responsibly with regards to heath and safety, liability and the environment. This commitment to the environment means that we try to keep our operations and 'foot-print' as low impact as possible. Low impact environmentally conscious working means that all of the arising generated from our operations are recycled so that nothing goes to waste and hand tools are used whenever possible.

Name: Norsk Trefelling AS
Description:
Vi i Norsk Trefelling er sertifiserte arborister som alt innen trepleie, trefelling, konsulenttjenester, og kartlegging av trær. Vår kompetanse dekker et bredt spekter av tjenester:

Rapportering: Våre rapporter dekker alt fra trehelsevurdering, risikoanalyse, bevaringsstrategier til forvaltningsplaner og verdsetting.

Tre Kartlegging og Undersøkelse: Vi bruker ulike metoder og teknologi for å kartlegge trær, vurdere deres helsetilstand, og gi nøyaktige data for planlegging og forvaltning. Dette innebærer og bruk av resistograf og ultralyd for å kunne beskrive treets innvendige forhold. 

Konsulenttjenester: Vi tilbyr omfattende rådgivning for å sikre optimal trehelse, landskapspleie og bærekraftige løsninger.

Sykdomsdiagnostikk: Identifisering og behandling av tre-relaterte sykdommer.

Trefelling: Fjerning av trær på en sikker og kontrollert måte.

Beskjæring: Forming og stell av trær for best mulig helse og estetikk.

Description:

Name: Karelwood Oy
Description:
Karelwood Oy on Joensuussa pääpaikkaansa pitävä metsäalan moniosaaja. Yrityksen palveluihin kuuluvat kuntien ja kaupunkien metsäomaisuuden hoito, puisto- ja maisemahakkuut sekä luonnon ennallistamistyöt. Toiminnan keskiössä ovat infran rakentamiseen ja ylläpitöön liittyvät kasvustonkäsittelytyöt.

Henkilökuntamme muodostuu monen alan erikoisosaajista ja joukostamme löytyy asiantuntijuutta metsäomaisuuden hoitoon, logistiikkaan, maankäyttösopimuksiin, vaativiin puustonpoistotöihin ja maastosuunnitteluun. Maastosuunnittelussa käytössämme ovat nykyaikaiset paikkatieto-ohjelmistot ja GNSS –mittauslaitteisto. Laajan yhteistyöverkostomme kautta työllistämme välillisesti noin 50 henkilöä.

Toimintamme on sertifioitua: täytämme PEFC-sertifikaatin vaatimukset ja noudatamme työssämme ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 ja ISO45001:2018 – standardeihin perustuvia laatu-, turvallisuus- ja ympäristöjärjestelmiä. Sertifiointi asettaa vaatimuksia  metsänkäsittelylle ja henkilöstö on koulutettu noudattamaan näitä vaatimuksia kaikessa toiminnassaan.

Name: Planinfor Ltda
Description:
Planinfor Ltda is a Chilean company with more than 20 years of experience in forest operations planning and control, specializing in the development of technological solutions, geographic information systems (GIS), and applied engineering services for the forestry, agricultural, and electrical industries.

Since 2002, we have been driving the digital transformation of the forestry sector, integrating technical expertise, innovation, and operational efficiency. Our approach combines field experience, advanced data analysis, and in-house tool development, enabling us to deliver accurate, timely, and high-value strategic information.

Name: Madercampo
Description:
Somos una empresa argentina, dedicada al manejo sustentable de bosques nativos y venta de maderas aserradas.

Nuestro principal compromiso es ofrecer la mejor calidad y durabilidad en madera aserrada para que nuestros clientes puedan construir tanto tranqueras, mangas, postes, comederos, cepos, entre otros, hasta delicados muebles de cedro, nogal o roble, pisos, puertas, marcos y ventanas para interior o exterior.
Obtenemos nuestra madera en Las Yungas, en Finca Pintascayo,  respetando nuestro compromiso con una correcta gestión ambiental y la conservación del bosque nativo, dando prioridad a la protección de las especies que se encuentran en peligro de extinción o que son de especial relevancia.

Trabajamos por un proyecto en dónde el éxito se mide por el bienestar de las personas y la naturaleza.
 
Nuestra madera se encuentra custodiada desde su origen hasta su destino final a manos de nuestros clientes. Podemos certificar el origen, la sustentabilidad y la legalidad de cada una de nuestras tablas.

Administramos el Aserradero Río Blanco, uno de los más modernos establecimientos madereros del norte argentino.

Name: Gebr. Hosenfeld Sägewerk GmbH
Description:
𝗡𝗮𝗱𝗲𝗹𝗵𝗼𝗹𝘇-𝗦𝗽𝗲𝘇𝗶𝗮𝗹𝗶𝘀𝘁 𝗺𝗶𝘁 𝗧𝗿𝗮𝗱𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻
Das Sägewerk Gebr. Hosenfeld produziert hochwertige Qualitätsprodukte aus heimischen Nadelhölzern – bereits in 5. Generation. Wir sind auf den Einschnitt von Lärche, Douglasie und Kiefer spezialisiert. 

𝗡𝗮𝗰𝗵𝗵𝗮𝗹𝘁𝗶𝗴𝗲 𝗛𝗼𝗹𝘇𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗲𝗶𝘁𝘂𝗻𝗴
Nachhaltiges Handeln ist fester Bestandteil unserer Unternehmens-DNA. Wir verarbeiten ausschließlich Holz aus heimischen Wäldern, die nachhaltig bewirtschaftet werden. Beim Transport des regionalen Rohstoffs achten wir auf kurze Wege.

Wir legen größten Wert auf eine effiziente Verwendung der natürlichen Ressource Holz. Durch den Einsatz modernster Sägewerkstechnik optimieren wir den Rundholzeinschnitt. Schnittholz kann vor Ort weiterveredelt werden (Trocknung, Hobelung, Zimmerei). Sägespäne verarbeiten wir zu Qualitätspellets.

Name: Holz Forestry Consulting
Description:
Enhancing Forest Productivity Through Genetic Excellence and Advanced Silviculture
At Holz, we are dedicated to the advancement of forest productivity and sustainability. Our expertise in forest genetic improvement and silvicultural techniques positions us as industry players, particularly in the cultivation and management of Eucalyptus, Pine and Acacia plantations.

Commitment to Sustainability
In the face of extreme climate change, Holz is at the forefront of developing and applying genetic improvement techniques to create resilient and productive forest plantations. Our strategic approach includes:
Climate Adaptation: Breeding Eucalyptus species that can withstand erratic weather patterns and extreme conditions.
Biodiversity Preservation: Ensuring genetic diversity to protect against pests, diseases, and environmental changes.

Building Contingency Plans
Holz is not just about immediate results; we are about preparing for the future. Our comprehensive contingency plans are designed to safeguard plantations against unforeseen environmental challenges, ensuring a stable and productive future for our clients’ investments.

Partner with Holz
Join us in our mission to revolutionize forestry practices. With Holz, you gain a partner that is committed to excellence, innovation, and the sustainable management of our planet’s precious forest resources for most industrial needs.

Name: Proyecto CARES
Description:
El objetivo principal del proyecto se basa en el impulso de modelos de gestión conjunta de aprovechamiento de resina y castaña para generar nuevos puestos de trabajo de calidad y larga duración, vinculados con el sector primario, al mismo tiempo que contribuyen a una gestión forestal más activa y sostenible que reduzca la vulnerabilidad de estas masas al riesgo de incendio.

Financia Fundación Biodiversidad #ProyectosPRTR #NextGenerationEU.

Name: PROVENCE FORÊT Coopérative Forestière
Description:
Provence Forêt est une coopérative forestière engagée dans la gestion durable de la forêt méditerranéenne et alpine. 

Nous travaillons à ce jour avec 3046 adhérents répartis sur 125303 ha dans la région PACA pour offrir des solutions de gestion forestière complètes et efficaces. 

Notre expertise forestière, notre connaissance approfondie de la sylviculture, ainsi que l’apport de notre conseil personnalisé aux propriétaires forestiers nous permettent de répondre aux besoins uniques de chaque adhérent. 

Nous sommes également spécialisés dans l'achat et la vente de bois, garantissant ainsi une source de revenus pour les propriétaires forestiers tout en préservant la qualité des forêts, privilégiant ainsi les circuits courts et les clients locaux. 

Nous sommes fiers de notre engagement envers la gestion durable de la forêt méditerranéenne, et nous travaillons constamment pour offrir des solutions innovantes et efficaces à nos adhérents.

Name: Holder Resources, Inc

HRI is uniquely positioned for success in this emerging market.

Description: Le projet TOMOFORET est une solution automatisée d'inventaire forestier utilisant le lidar mobile terrestre (scanner laser 3D portable). Ce process permet d'inventorier et de cartographier les forêts arbre par arbre, sous la canopée.

Name: Caddo Sustainable Timberlands
Description:
Caddo Sustainable Timberlands (Caddo) is a timberland owner with more than 889,000 acres of ownership in Texas and Louisiana.

Our mission is to generate superior financial returns and social impact through sustainable forest management and environmental stewardship. Our silviculture practices are driven by best available science and rigorous decision support tools to optimize returns and maximize the productivity of our timberlands, from site-preparation through final harvest.

Caddo’s offices are location in Lufkin, TX, Jasper, TX and Atlanta, GA. Caddo also has an exclusive relationship with TTG Forestry Services who provides turnkey management for all Caddo timberland assets.

Name: LIGNUM Region Basel
Description:
Das Naturprodukt Holz eignet sich in besonderem Masse zur Realisierung energieeffizienter Gebäude und wohngesunder Innenausbauten, wie sie der heutige Gebäudepark fordert. Die nachhaltig bewirtschafteten Wälder der Nordwestschweiz bieten für die vermehrte Anwendung von Holz in der ganzen Region genügend ökologischen Rohstoff. Die LIGNUM Region Basel will die Kräfte aller interessierten Kreise bündeln, um die Weichen in der Region Basel zugunsten von mehr Holz zu stellen.

Dafür setzt sich die LIGNUM Region Basel ein:
 Mehr Holz in Konstruktion und Ausbau in den Kantonen Basel-Landschaft und Basel-Stadt.
 Mehr Holz aus unseren regionalen Wäldern für Bauten.
 Mehr regionale Wertschöpfung durch vermehrte Holzverarbeitung in regionalen Betrieben.
 Förderung von Wissen und Interesse an Wald und Holz.

Name: Les Ateliers du Chêne
Description:
Les Ateliers du Chêne offrent les plus belles valorisations au chêne français, entre tradition artisanale et innovation technique.
Les Ateliers du Chêne ont été créés en Bourgogne en 1953 et sont intégrés à Charlois depuis 2008. 

Aujourd’hui, les activités se répartissent sur deux sites :
-	Les Ateliers du Chêne - Saint-Martin-du-Puy (Bourgogne) : 
	Foresterie / Négoce de grumes
	Bois d’œuvre et de construction : pièces de charpente QP1
	Bois de menuiserie : avivés et plots reconstitués – qualité ébénisterie
	Bois sous-rail
	Traverses paysagères, tuiles de chêne
	Merrain pour la tonnellerie 
	Plots pour cuves, foudres et produits œnologiques

-	Les Ateliers du chêne Sud - Apt (Vaucluse)
	Atelier de charpente
	Atelier de menuiserie

Chaque année, Les Ateliers du Chêne transforment plus de 25 000 m³ de sciages de chêne, à destination des professionnels et des particuliers.
Engagés pour une filière bois durable, certifiés PEFC, nous valorisons 100% de nos approvisionnements en chêne.

Secteur : Foresterie, scierie, charpente, menuiserie

Name: RAL Gütegemeinschaft Holz- und Baustoffhandel e.V.
Description:
Die RAL Gütezeichen vermitteln auf den ersten Blick Sicherheit und Vertrauen. Je nach Ausrichtung verleiht die Gütegemeinschaft Holz und Baustoffhandel e.V. das Gütezeichen "Holzhandel", das Gütezeichen "Baustoffhandel" oder das Gütezeichen "Nachhaltiger Handel mit Holz- und Bauprodukten"
RAL Gütegemeinschaften haben in ihrer Funktion als von RAL anerkannte Organisationen im Rahmen der Gütesicherung verschiedene Aufgaben: Sie verleihen Unternehmen das Recht, RAL Gütezeichen zu führen, prüfen regelmäßig die Güte- und Prüfbestimmungen und überwachen deren strikte Einhaltung.
In einem Dschungel zahlreicher Kennzeichnungen dienen RAL Gütezeichen Verbraucher:innen, Unternehmen und der öffentlichen Hand gleichermaßen als zuverlässige Orientierungshilfe. Sie sind Wegweiser zu Produkten und Dienstleistungen aus nahezu allen Lebensbereichen, die durch Qualität, Sicherheit und Zuverlässigkeit überzeugen. RAL Gütezeichen setzen besondere Maßstäbe im Bereich der zahlreichen Gütesiegel: Sie unterliegen dem einzigartigen, neutralen und transparenten System der RAL Gütesicherung und stehen neben einer hohen Qualität auch für viele weitere Aspekte wie z. B. Wirtschaftlichkeit, Nachhaltigkeit, Umweltfreundlichkeit, Sicherheit, Kundenorientierung oder Kompetenz des Personals.
RAL Gütezeichen zeichnen sich durch hohe Zuverlässigkeit, strikte Objektivität und Aktualität aus. Grundlage dafür sind die Grundsätze für Gütezeichen, nach denen alle RAL Gütezeichen anerkannt, verliehen und überwacht werden. Das unterscheidet RAL Gütezeichen von allen anderen Qualitätskennzeichnungen und sonstigen Gütesiegeln. Diese Vorteile machen RAL Gütezeichen zu einer verlässlichen und vertrauensvollen Orientierungshilfe bei der Auswahl von Produkten und Dienstleistungen.

Name: LDG Forest Group A/S
Description:
Established in Denmark in 1976, LDG Forest Group A/S brings over 40 years of expertise to the global stage, emphasizing sustainable forest management and eco-friendly energy solutions. With operations spanning Italy, Scandinavia, Brazil, Poland, the Baltic States, France, Belgium, Canada, and the USA, LDG Forest Group stands as a pivotal player in the European and North American wood pellet markets.

The company's strategic expansion, including a notable entry into the Italian market in 2014, demonstrates its commitment to meeting the diverse needs of both residential and commercial clients through a comprehensive selection of high-quality wood pellets, briquettes, logs, and chips.

LDG Forest Group's dedication to sustainability, customer satisfaction, and innovation continues to underscore its role as a leader in environmental stewardship and the forestry sector.

Name: Nullaexitus
Description:
Hacemos del impacto una fuerza regenerativa.
Acompañamos a Empresas y Organizaciones a Neutralizar su Huella de Carbono, Sumar Valor y ser Protagonistas del Cambio Global.

En Nullaexitus, desarrollamos proyectos de forestación en Argentina diseñados para capturar carbono y contribuir a la mitigación del cambio climático. A través de estos proyectos, generamos créditos de carbono de alta calidad (VCUs) que ayudan a reducir la huella de carbono global.

Ayudamos a empresas a:
(1) Compensar su Huella de Carbono: Adquiriendo nuestros créditos para alcanzar sus objetivos de sostenibilidad y responder a las demandas del mercado.
(2) Calcular su Huella de Carbono: Ofrecemos mediciones precisas como punto de partida para la acción climática.
(3) Generar sus propios Créditos de Carbono: Asesoramos a terceros (forestales, empresas con balance positivo de GEI) en la cuantificación y registro de sus créditos.

Soluciones tangibles para la descarbonización de la economía y la acción climática empresarial.

Name: Croatian Arboricultural Society (HUA)
Description:
Croatian Arboricultural Society was founded in 2003 with the aim of bringing together experts and all those interested in the field of arboriculture and to provide education by organizing seminars and practical exercises in order to:  - improve the care of trees in urban areas, 
- encourage research in urban forestry, 
- improve protection at work when caring for trees, 
- improve the management of public greenery,
- achieve cooperation and exchange of expertise with similar associations in Europe and the world, 
- harmonize Croatian with European standards.

Name: Sapulut Forest Development Sdn. Bhd.
Description: Sapulut Forest Development Sdn Bhd is a sustainable forestry company located in the State of Sabah, Malaysia.

Name: Zimmer
Description: La société ZIMMER est le leader en France de la vente à distance d'outillage, d'équipement et de vêtements forestiers avec plus de 6000 références pour l'entretien des forêts, l'exploitation du bois et la protection de la nature.

Name: NORFOR SA
Description:
Norfor S.A. es una empresa fundada en 2003. Desde sus inicios a mantenido un objetivo claro: impulsar el desarrollo de metodologías innovadoras, procesos eficientes y trazabilidad en el sector foresto-industrial. 
La madera procesada se centra principalmente en el pino, una materia prima versátil y ampliamente utilizada en la construcción, mueblería y otras aplicaciones industriales. La empresa ha invertido en tecnología de vanguardia y equipos de corte de última generación, lo que le permite alcanzar una capacidad de corte de 8 mil toneladas mensuales en un turno de aserrado, produciendo unos 3000m3 mensuales 100% secos de horno, de los cuales el 70% son exportables.
Con dos décadas de experiencia en el mercado, a logrado establecer relaciones comerciales sólidas tanto a nivel nacional como internacional. Nuestros productos de calidad y nuestro enfoque en la innovación han sido reconocidos por clientes y socios comerciales, consolidando una posición como referente en la industria de la madera.

Name: Forestry Centre of Excellence (FCoE)
Description: The South Australian Government has committed $15 million over 10 years for a new Forestry Centre of Excellence in Mount Gambier. This incorporates the National Institute for Forest Products Innovation (NIFPI) and other forestry funding streams.

Name: MR SKOVSERVICE A/S
Description:
MR SKOVSERVICE A/S er en alsidig virksomhed, som beskæftiger sig med skovbrug og køb og salg af flis. Vi udfører også anlæg og pleje, hvor biodiversitet tænkes ind som en naturlig del. Vi har en arboristafdeling, som tager sig af beskæringer og fældning ved klatring, risikovurderinger og fældning af risikotræer.

Når vi er med på projektet, kan du som kunde være sikker på, at vi gør alt, for at give dig en god oplevelse og et godt resultat.

Name: Deutscher Holzwirtschaftsrat e.V.
Description:
Die deutsche Holzwirtschaft ist sehr differenziert, dabei reicht die Wertschöpfungskette vom Rohholz, das von der Säge-, Holzwerkstoff- sowie Zellstoff- und Papierindustrie bearbeitet wird, über die Weiterverarbeitung von Holz und Holzprodukten in der Möbel- und Packmittelindustrie sowie in den Handwerksbetrieben und im Holzbau, bis hin zum Vertrieb durch den Handel.
Der Kreislauf schließt sich durch das Recycling von Altpapier und Holz.

Name: Pépinières Crété
Description: Aux Pépinières Crété, nous sommes les spécialistes de la plantation d’arbres et d’arbustes dans la moitié nord de la France. Nous vous accompagnons dans tous vos travaux d’agroforesterie, de vitiforesterie, aviforesterie… Nous vous aidons à implanter vos bois, forêts, bosquets, haies, pré-vergers, miyawaki… Nous sommes experts dans la sylviculture depuis plus de 45 ans. Nous sommes à vos côtés dans vos projets forestiers de l’idée à l’implantation.

Name: Nakina Lumber Inc.
Description: Located in beautiful northwestern Ontario, Nakina Lumber Inc. (Nakina Lumber/NLI), a subsidiary of the Buchanan group of companies, is a fully functioning lumber mill, manufacturing finished lumber products from trees harvested from the Ogoki Forest.  With up to 120 employees at any given time, Nakina Lumber provides a variety of employment opportunities for individuals, from general labourer positions, which require no prior experience, to skilled trade positions, such as industrial electrician, millright, saw filer and heavy equipment mechanic.  Various supervisory opportunities also exist, across all aspects of the operation.  Nakina Lumber is committed to ensuring at least 75% of its workforce is indigenous and is further committed to supporting the local economy through its targeted recruitment across Greenstone and the three First Nations of Aroland, Eabametoong and Marten Falls.  Nakina Lumber is certified through the Forest Stewardship Council (FSC Certified).

Name: AVIH | Algemene Vereniging Inlands Hout
Description: Goed bosbeheer zorgt ervoor dat bossen niet alleen behouden blijven, maar ook duurzaam worden beheerd voor toekomstige generaties. Maar laten we niet vergeten waar dat hout vandaan komt: uit het bos. Als AVIH staan wij voor vakwerk in houtoogst en bosbeheer. De AVIH is de schakel in de houtketen van bos naar houtgebruiker.

Name: Whenua Oho
Description:
We seek to empower Māori landowners with comprehensive knowledge, diverse alternatives, and expert support to make informed strategic decisions about our land and how forestry in its many forms including native forests, can assist in delivering valuable outcomes socially, environmentally, and commercially. 

Our emphasis is on awakening under-utilised Māori land as well as providing support to landowners from across the spectrum because we believe forests provide a complementary pathway to saving our planet and creating intergenerational social and economic value.

Name: Prentiss & Carlisle
Description:
Prentiss & Carlisle is one of the largest timberland asset managers in North America. P&C provides ongoing management services on approximately 1.2 million acres of timberland located in Maine, Ontario, and New York. Nearly every acre under management is certified by the Forest Stewardship Council through either our clients or through P&C itself, which holds FSC certificates for both Forest Management and Chain-of-Custody.

P&C provides turnkey land management from long-range forest planning through on-ground forestry, marketing of forest products, harvesting, transportation, road construction and maintenance, stump-to-mill accounting and reporting, client cash management, administration of third-party relationships, public advocacy/representation and strategic asset planning. P&C also provides specialized consulting services in related areas of expertise:
     - Timber inventory design, execution and analysis
     - Growth & yield modeling and timber harvest scheduling
     - State-of-the-art GIS mapping and data management services
     - Timberland valuations and appraisals
     - Acquisition and disposition due diligence
     - Market studies
     - Timber supply modeling

Name: Worrell Timber Group
Description: We are a one Stop Shop for Timber Growers from felling licenses applications to the market.  We are a Company that uses all it own Harvesters , Forwarder Trucks & Chippers. We offer the Forestry owner has full control of Timber movements through our  unique Log Watch Timber Traceability System. We are supplying Logs to Sawmills and are the Leading Supplier  of Biomass in Ireland. We are leading the way in Biomass Innovation and Supply through our Harvesting Methods

Name: Arbeitsgemeinschaft Rohholz
Description:
Die Arbeitsgemeinschaft Rohholz e.V. (AGR) ist ein freiwilliger Zusammenschluss von Unternehmen und Verbänden der Rohholz verbrauchenden Branchen in Deutschland und den angrenzenden Ländern.

Wir setzen uns für eine effiziente und nachhaltige Waldbewirtschaftung und Nutzung des nachwachsenden Rohstoffes Holz ein. Dies soll im Einklang mit ökonomischen, ökologischen und sozialen Interessen stehen. Um dafür politische und wirtschaftliche Rahmenbedingungen zu schaffen, stehen wir mit Vertretern aus Medien, Wirtschaft, Politik sowie Forschung und Lehre in engem Dialog. Ein Kernziel der AGR ist es, der Gesellschaft die volkswirtschaftliche Bedeutung des Clusters Forst und Holz bewusst zu machen.

Name: Kyah Resources Inc.
Description:
Since 2014, Kyah Resources has grown from a mid-sized forestry operation to a full service civil contractor.

A 50/50, fully Indigenous-owned partnership between Roga Group and Witset First Nation, we are a community business. To date, we have onboarded over 100 First Nations individuals from Witset First Nation and neighbouring communities. 

We're building a strong, local economy for current and future generations.

Name: SC Forestry Commission
Description: At present, the Forestry Commission has about 350 employees and is charged with protecting and enhancing South Carolina’s forest resources. Forest firefighters are based in every county for quick response to wildfires, and project foresters are available to assist landowners throughout the state. Three regional dispatch centers coordinate statewide forest protection. The Commission operates five state forests and a modern forest nursery that grows over 17 million containerized and bareroot seedling species for SC landowners. The Commission continues to provide a range of educational programs to better inform the state’s citizens concerning the wise use and management of South Carolina’s forest resources.

Name: Société d'exploitation des ressources de la Vallée
Description:
Notre coopérative œuvre depuis plusieurs décennies dans la Vallée de la Matapédia et des territoires limitrophes. Elle est structurée par des processus efficients et agiles pour satisfaire les besoins de ses membres producteurs. En plus de la mise en valeur des forêts privées, elle s'assure de la diversification de ses activités, reliées à la forêt, en recherchant la stabilité et des synergies. Afin de les satisfaire, elle est à l’écoute des besoins de ses clients, partenaires et de l’ensemble des parties intéressées du territoire.

Nous recherchons une croissance soutenable de nos activités. Nous mesurons notre succès par notre pérennité, l’augmentation de la productivité de nos membres travailleurs, l’amélioration de leurs conditions de travail et notre rentabilité. Nous visons l’amélioration du patrimoine forestier de la Vallée de la Matapédia et sa vitalité économique

Name: GROUPEMENT FORESTIER DE VILLARGOIX
Description:
GROUPEMENT FORESTIER DE VILLARGOIX dans le Morvan à 5 km de Saulieu (21210 Côte d'Or).
Groupement forestier familiale de 170 hectares, depuis le 31 mai 1980.
Adhérant à "Forestiers Privés de Côte d'Or" et du "CETEF de Bourgogne"

Name: WoodEx
Description:
Harvesting Tomorrow, Rooted Today
At WoodEx, we are dedicated to cultivating more than just land; we’re sowing the seeds of a sustainable future through our specialized focus on Kiri farms. Our passion lies in the art and science of wood production, and we take pride in crafting thriving ecosystems that not only yield quality timber but also contribute to the conservation of this invaluable resource.

Name: Bentheimer-Holz GmbH
Description:
Die Bentheimer-Holz GmbH verbindet Tradition mit modernstem Standard. Seit Jahrzehnten verfügen wir über hohe Fachkompetenz im Umgang mit dem Rohstoff Holz und dessen Verarbeitung. Dabei setzen wir auf die Individualität und Qualität unserer Produkte: Rundholz & Schnittholz. Mit den unterschiedlichen und modernen Einschnittmethoden wird eine breite Produktpalette angeboten. 
Die Bentheimer-Holz GmbH ist Mitglied bei der "Nederlandse Emballage - en Palletindustrie Vereinigung" (epv).

Name: HULTDIN SYSTEM AB
Description:
Hultdins is one of the leading manufacturers of tools and integrated components for forestry and construction machines.
The head office is located in Malå, in the area where Västerbotten meets Lappland.

Name: ForstID - Forst & Digital Beratung
Description:
Das Ziel von Forst.ID ist es, kommunalen und privaten Forstbetrieben, die vor der Herausforderung stehen, digitale Technologien und neue Workflows im Betrieb zu implementieren, im Digitalisierungsprozess zu begleiten.

Wir tragen dazu bei, dass Waldbesitzer und Förster in der Lage sind, ihre Wälder optimal und effizient zu bewirtschaften und gleichzeitig betriebliche als auch natürliche Ressourcen zu schonen.

Name: Kapsan Kaplama ve Ağaç Sanayi A.Ş.
Description:
Ahşap kaplama üretimi yapmak üzere 1974 yılında kurulan Kapsan Kaplama ve Ağaç San. A.Ş. sektöründe lider firma olarak faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir.                                                                         
Üretimde kullanılan son teknoloji makineleri ile, bıçak ve soyma kesim teknikleri kullanılarak müşterilerin tüm talepleri karşılanmaktadır.                                                                         
13.000 m2 kapalı ve 24000 m2 açık alanda faaliyet gösteren firmamız üretici olduğu doğal kaplamalar, distribütör olduğu Alpi ve Cleaf markalarının geniş ürün yelpazesi ile kısa sürede ürün temini sağlamaktadır.

Name: Canadian Woodlands Forum
Description:
The Canadian Woodlands Forum (CWF) is the only 'grass-roots' forest industry organization providing a network for forestry contractors, forest product companies, suppliers and 'on-the-ground' forestry personnel.

Our MISSION is to improve the efficiency and profitability of woodlands operations, through an ongoing commitment to fostering communication, providing a means to exchange knowledge of best practices and technology and innovations, and promoting the interests of woodlands professionals and contractors in order to sustain a robust, safe and environmentally responsible wood fiber supply chain.

Name: THUTHUGANI CONTRACTORS
Description: Thuthugani Contractors is driven by the vision of being the leading silviculture service provider in the Southern Africa Forestry sector.

Name: Suomen Sijoitusmetsät Oy - Forestland Investment Finland Ltd
Description:
Suomen Sijoitusmetsät Oy auttaa yksityisiä ja institutionaalisia toimijoita kohti helppoa, turvallista ja kannattavaa metsänomistamista ja metsäsijoittamista. 

Yritys on Suomen johtava metsäkiinteistömarkkinoiden ja erityisesti kauppa-arvomenetelmään perustuvan metsäkiinteistöjen arvonmäärityksen asiantuntija. 
Suomen Sijoitusmetsien palveluvalikoimaan kuuluvat koko maan kattavat metsäkiinteistöjen hankinnan, hallinnan, kiinteistövälityksen ja arvonmäärityksen palvelut sekä erilaiset tietotuotannon palvelut, kuten markkinakatsaukset ja -analyysit sekä yhteismetsäosuuksien markkinapaikan ylläpito.

Forestland Investment Finland Ltd aids private citizens and players in the investment sector towards effortless and profitable forest investments. The company is the leading expert of Finnish forestland investment market and especially forestland market valuation approach. Forestland Investment Finland Ltd facilitate services for procurement, management and valuation of forestland as well as provide forestland market intelligence.

Name: WorldWide Import Export
Description:
It is our great passion for wood and professional experience in the field of wood and wood derivates that lead us to the continuous success of our company.
For successive generations, our company has always look for strengthening the links with all our partners in the globe by improving continuously the quality of products and services we provide.

Name: Urcel
Description:
Somos Exportadores Directos
Exportamos Madera Rolliza (Pino y Eucaliptus) proveniente de montes en las Provincias de Entre Ríos y Corrientes.

Estamos presentes en toda la cadena productiva, desde la cosecha del monte, su traslado por camión o tren hasta zonas de acopio, la carga del buque y la venta directo a clientes en Asia.

Name: Integrated Operations Group
Description: Integrated Forestry Operations Group is a SAFE Certified Canadian forestry company based out of Campbell River, British Columbia. We are industry leaders in full-phase commercial forestry, tree hazard mitigation, commercial thinning, and wildfire risk abatement. Leveraging a team of foresters, project managers, machine operators, fallers, climbers, and other forestry professionals, we specialize in steep, remote, and complex forestry environments.

Name: champI4.0ns
Description: champI4.0ns links data-driven innovations with industrial use cases along the wood value chain. The bilateral flagship project is jointly funded by the Austrian BMK and the German BMWK.

Name: Ngā Pou a Tāne
Description: Ngā Pou a Tāne is an organisation which was incorporated in March 2022, to ensure Māori have a purposeful, experienced, constructive, and representative voice to influence government on behalf of Māori forestry communities and landowners.  Its aim is to develop policies that further the aspirations of those communities regarding forestry value chains and prevent the negative impacts of existing and proposed legislative and policy changes.

Name: Tahtsa Group
Description:
We provide end to end service in the logging and forestry sector, support in the mining and oil and gas sectors, and an international brokerage team for fibre sales and acquisition. 

Whether you're looking for sustainable solutions for your wood waste, a market for your fibre products, access mats for your resource operations, tenon blocks for any use, earthworks, logging operations, rough cut lumber, or grinding/chipping operations,  you'll find it with The Tahtsa Group.

Name: Ohio Forestry Association
Description: Started in 1903 as the Ohio State Forestry Society, our association is Ohio’s oldest conservation organization. Today, the Ohio Forestry Association, Inc. (OFA) operates as a trade association of Ohio forest products industry and forestry interests.  It is an association of more than 600 members representing wood products manufacturers, sawmills, logging companies, foresters and forestry consultants, forest landowners, equipment companies, and service firms.

Name: Trillion Trees
Description:
Trillion Trees is a bold global initiative led by Saad Allahwala, aiming to plant 1 trillion trees by 2030.  This mission unites corporations, global leaders, and changemakers to combat climate change, restore ecosystems, and build a sustainable future.

By partnering with Trillion Trees, businesses can lead the way in sustainability, enhance their ESG profiles, and contribute to a greener planet. Together, we’re planting the seeds of change—one tree at a time. 

Let’s create a legacy of hope and action.
Join us.

Name: Suffolk Gates & Automation
Description: One of the UK’s best hardwood gate manufacturer & East Anglia’s leading gate automation specialist.

Name: Maderas Susaeta
Description: Somos una empresa familiar creada en 1941 y estamos especializados en el suministro de madera estructural a profesionales, almacenes y particulares.

Name: Forestales Latinoamericanos
Description: Exportadores e Importadores de madera y laminados de Costa Rica

Name: Copture
Description:
Copture is a Nordic network of professional drone pilots and analysts, specializing in remote sensing and aerial data collection. We provide high-resolution imagery, AI-powered analysis, and GIS-based insights to help businesses make better, data-driven decisions.

 Industries we serve:
 Forestry – Pest damage detection (bark beetles, storm damage), stand inventory (thinning, clearing, replanting)
 AI & Machine Learning – Automated image analysis and predictive modeling
 GIS & Digital Twin Technology – Spatial analysis and 3D modeling
 Infrastructure & Energy – Inspection of power lines, solar farms, and telecommunication towers
 Agriculture & Conservation – Crop monitoring, wetlands analysis, and wildlife tracking
 Environmental Protection – Mapping ecological changes and habitat management

 Our services include:
 Data collection & processing – Georeferenced imagery and AI-driven analytics
 Volume calculations & stockpile monitoring – Accurate measurements for industry and logistics
 Custom hardware & software development – Tailored solutions for data-driven operations

 Want to learn how our drone technology can optimize your business? Let’s connect!

Name: Tasmania Forestry Hub
Description:
The Tasmania Forestry Hub aims to address the industry’s need for collaboration to enhance the value and importance of timber in our economic, social, and environmental prospects. 

The Hub’s work, outlined in the Strategic Plan will be focused towards achieving “A collaborative Tasmanian Forest Industry with shared aspiration and strong voice.”

Name: Bergvik Skog Öst
Description: Bergvik Skog Öst äger och förvaltar cirka 360 000 hektar mark i Mellansverige. På koncernens mark bedrivs miljöcertifierat skogsbruk och vi upplåter mark till jakt, fiske, täktverksamhet, vindkraft mm. Virket säljs uteslutande till Billerud som också ansvarar för drivning och övriga operativa skogstjänster. Bergvik Skog Öst bildades 2019 och har en enkel organisation, tydliga mål samt få och långsiktiga ägare.

Name: Jägmästarnas Förening
Description:
En förening för jägmästare, ja där har du JF i ett nötskal. Vi finns till för dig som vill träffa unga och äldre jägmästare, gamla och nya bekantskaper. Kort sagt, vi arbetar för att främja samhörighet och ge medlemmarna möjlighet att utbyta erfarenheter.  Vi verkar också för att hålla jägmästarnas sång och festraditioner levande.

Vi hälsar alla med jägmästarexamen från Sveriges lantbruksuniversitet och tidigare Kungliga Skogshögskolan välkomna som medlemmar. Särskilt roligt tycker vi det är när det examineras nya jägmästare! Och det är enkelt att bli medlem. Betala avgiften första året så blir du ständig medlem!

Varje år brukar vi försöka samla föreningens medlemmar vid några tillfällen. Årsmötet hålls under senvinter-tidig vår. Då varvas årsmötesförhandlingar med teaterbesök och traditionell skogismiddag där västvisorna klinga klart till långt in på natten. Senare under året brukar vi försöka samlas till exkursion med aktuellt tema och påföljande samkväm.

Name: Northwest Forest Link
Description:
Our team has over 30 years of timber purchasing, and domestic and export sales experience, resulting in a deep understanding of the global timber supply and export market trends. 

We connect trees to customers by openly sharing our first hand market intelligence to build bridges between suppliers and customers.

Name: Skemxist Solutions
Description:
Osoyoos Indian Band (OIB), partnership with The Sutherland Group.
Providing Heavy Industry Solutions in Project Consulting, Road Building & Maintenance, Drilling & Blasting, Civil Construction, Harvesting, Marine Services, Aggregates, and Transportation.

Certified & Compliant: SAFE certification and COR (Certificate of Recognition).
Safety Commitment: Active participants in leading safety platforms such as ISN and Avetta.
Indigenous Recognition: Listed in the Government of Canada’s Indigenous Business Directory

Name: Grand Forest AB
Description:
Our process is simple and we always help our customers find suitable solutions. – Quality doesn’t always have to be expensive.
The technology GrandForest offers, is not only at 10% the price of new corresponding equipment but it’s also much more reliable. This is not just a marketing statement, but a fact that has been proven in our experience. The key to the success of an efficient timber company is modern, good equipment, and in that we will be able to assist you all the way.

Name: TreeMan
Description:
Our experience around Paulownia – one of the fastest growing trees in the world allows us to offer landowners a solution to how they can earn big profit in just after 3 years from their land without prior knowledge, experience and expertise. Imagine having a business that profits you and supports nature at the same time.

What makes us a good choice to work with? Guidance, support, trust, partnership, hard work and more.

What is our vision? To help 100+ landowners environmentally friendly earn good profit from their land.

Who are we? A Trustful Paulownia Partner.

If you are ready to reap the benefits from your land then you are more than welcome to contact us.

#paulownia  #landowner #treefarm #paulowniaseedlings #paulowniawood

Name: GreenGold Group
Description:
GreenGold Group is a large and growing independent forest owner in Europe. Our forest acquisition and management perspective is based on a buy-to-hold-forever philosophy, with sustainability at the heart of everything we do. 

We employ a rigorous value-based approach to acquiring assets, coupled with hands-on local teams, to maximize performance and generate stable cash flows.  GreenGold Group has a strong track record of success and adheres to the highest standards of safety and environmental stewardship. 

Boasting a team of over 100 seasoned forestry professionals, spread across seven countries in Europe, we have a wealth of knowledge and experience that drives our business forward.

Name: Dahinden Sägewerk AG
Description: Dahinden ist ein über 125 Jahre altes Familienunternehmen. Im Verlauf der Firmengeschichte entwickelte sich die kleine Sägerei am Rotbach zu einem der grösseren Holzverarbeitungsbetriebe des Landes. Dies nicht zuletzt, weil die Familien Dahinden seit jeher laufend in eine moderne und optimierte Produktion investiert.

Name: H.F. Maquinaria Forestal
Description: H.F alquiler de maquinaria forestal somos una empresa especializada en el alquiler de maquinaria para trabajos forestales, nos enfocamos en ofrecer soluciones eficientes y de alta calidad para el trabajo en los bosques, en H.F garantizamos un servicio confiable y seguro, adaptándonos a las necesidades de cada proyecto. Nuestro compromiso es apoyar a nuestros clientes en la optimización de recursos y el cuidado del medio ambiente.

Name: SALEVY AGROFORESTRY INITIATIVE
Description: This is  the project initiated by two POP Movement Mentors, Sayan  and Levy, from India and Zambia, respectively. This is something that will start from Zambia and start expanding it to the other countries in Africa. This will be incorporated with AGROECOLOGICAL/BIOLOGICAL Farming in the continent at the selected site in Lusaka.

Name: Klimabündnis Bauen in Rheinland-Pfalz
Description:
Um unsere Klimaziele zu erreichen, spielt der Bausektor eine entscheidende Rolle. Das „Klimabündnis Bauen in Rheinland-Pfalz“ möchte hier ansetzen und den Einsatz nachwachsender und kreislaufeffizienter Rohstoffe, wie z. B. Holz, stärken, um einen Beitrag zum Klimaschutz zu leisten.

Das Ministerium für Klimaschutz, Umwelt, Energie und Mobilität sowie das Ministerium der Finanzen haben sich als Bündnispartner das Ziel gesetzt, beim klimafreundlichen Bauen als Vorbild mit den eigenen Landesliegenschaften voranzugehen. Ziel ist es, den Wissenstransfer zum Thema nachhaltiges Bauen zu stärken, Potenziale aufzuzeigen und Hemmnisse gegenüber nachwachsenden und kreislaufeffizienten Baustoffen abzubauen. 

Dazu fördert das Klimabündnis Bauen in Rheinland-Pfalz Forschungsprojekte sowie Pilot-, Modell- und Demonstrationsvorhaben zum Bauen und Sanieren mit nachwachsenden Rohstoffen sowie den Aufbau von Netzwerk- und Clusterstrukturen. Weitere Infos und konkrete Beispiele finden Sie auf der Webseite.

Name: Ala-BoOl
Description: En maya, Ala-boOl significa confianza. Para nosotros, significa aprovechar lo mejor que nos da la naturaleza sin hacerle daño. Nuestro objetivo es obtener madera social y ecológicamente responsable, para concretar negocios responsables con resultados sustentables.

Name: Best Planter
Description:
Since 2005, the BEST PLANTER team has been delivering professional forestry services across Europe.
For more than two decades, we have been involved in forest planting, tending, and young stand management in Lithuania, Sweden, Finland, Austria, Germany, and other European countries.

We approach forest care as a long-term responsibility. Every stage of the process, from planting and maintenance to monitoring and renewal, is equally vital to building resilient, healthy forests.

Our expertise spans both seasonal forestry services, including planting, forest care, and cone collection, as well as continuous forest management solutions that support sustainable forest development for generations to come.

Certified Quality:
PEFC • ISO 9001 • ISO 14001 • OHSAS 18001

Our work is guided by respect and trust. We are committed to continuous improvement, act with dedication and determination, encourage effective collaboration, and take full responsibility for our clients, our people, and the environment.

Name: australian araucaria
Description: Naturally distinctive, sustainably grown. australian araucaria is more than a premium timber—it’s an experience. A visually stunning blonde wood, smooth to the touch and a pleasure to the eyes, it brings natural elegance to your project or home.

Name: Plantation Pine Products
Description: Plantation grown timbers are a renewable resource which provide positive and long-lasting social, environmental and economic benefits. Plantation Pine Products manage all aspects of the supply of Radiata Pine and other plantation timbers in Australia from grower to end user.

Name: Ebony Shield Group
Description: Ebony Shield Group is a Conglomerate that cut across various industries such as Forestry, Fintech, Agriculture, Transport and Logistics, International Trade Inspection, Manufacturing, Real Estate, Digital Agency, and more

Name: A & H Forestry
Description:
A&H Forestry provides forest management services to public and private landowners across the Pacific Northwest.

Leveraging decades of professional experience and proprietary technology, we bring efficiency and innovative solutions to every project – from road vegetation management and reforestation efforts to forest inventory and general project support. We strive to establish lasting relationships with our customers by meeting their needs, exceeding their expectations, and gaining trust through exceptional safety culture, on every project.

Name: HDS-Group . THE SAWMILL TOOL COMPANY
Description:
HDS . THE SAWMILL TOOL COMPANY

The main focus of HDS-Group GmbH primarily is to develop, to design, to produce and to sell machine tools and parts for the sawmill industry.

HDS . THE SAWMILL TOOL COMPANY - this is our slogan which in recent years more and more established us in the market and made us to a constant in this branch.

HDS manufacture carbide and stellite-tipped circular saw blades, segments, sizing rings and gang saw blades, crosscut circular saw blades for the log yard, butt end reducer, chipper knives, profiling knives, hogging knives, counter knives, distance rings, machine parts such as knife holders, pressure plates, etc., milling shaft butt end reducer, complete chipper canter and multi-part profiler cutters for Andritz, Baljer & Zembrod, Brodbaek, Bruks, Costa Righi, Cremona, EWD, Haas, HIT, Holtec, Hombak, Hundegger, Kallfass, Klöckner, Linck, Möhringer, Pallmann, Paul, Raimann, Rudnick & Enners, SAB, Söderhamn, Springer, USNR, Vecoplan and Veisto HewSaw machines, among others.

Name: Drönarstation AB
Description:
Storminventering, identifiering av barkborre eller allmän kontroll av din skog över tid? Här är lösningen för dig.

Det främsta användningsområdet för vår drönarstation, med tillhörande programvara, är att hålla skogen under uppsikt och snabbt identifiera skador i skogen. Allt handlar om att snabbt och smidigt få syn på problemen, så att du kan lägga energin på att lösa dem.

Bekämpa granbarkborren:
* Spåra granbarkborrens utbrott.
* Hitta förändringar i skogen samt på individuella träd, med så täta intervaller du vill.
* Hitta enkelt alla nytillkomna angrepp av granbarkborre under tidig sommar, och förhindra andra svärmen till sensommaren.
* Upptäck och förebygg potentiella utbrott som kan sprida sig till din mark.
* Håll koll på trädens hälsa och upptäck trender i områden där det inte gjorts en ståndortsanpassning.

Inventera stormskador
* Storminventering direkt efter att olyckan varit framme. Få ut vindfällen i tid innan den blir grogrund för barkborre.
* Automatisk identifiering av döda träd och vindfälle, med omedelbar sammanfattning och lokalisering till dig. 
* Drönarstation presenterar en lösning där du som skogsägare får bra och överskådlig koll på din skog på egen hand, utan att behöva köpa in externa drönar-tjänster.

Med Drönarstation 2.0 krävs varken förkunskap eller drönarkort för att få en överblick över skogen, då programvaran snabbt och enkelt hittar döda och fallna träd – så att du kan fokusera på att åtgärda dem.

Name: Hogst AS
Description:
Trygghet, stolthet og kunnskap!

I Hogst AS tilbyr vi trefelling og annet arbeid innen skogbruk og vedlikeholdsarbeid med kvalitet og sikkerhet i fokus. Formålet bak selskapet er ideelt, og bidrar til å skape faste, givende og økonomisk bærekraftige arbeidsplasser til tidligere straffedømte og/eller rusmisbrukere gjennom manuelt fysisk arbeid.

Hogst skaper sosial inkludering gjennom arbeid for grupper og enkeltmennesker, som ellers ville ha hatt begrenset adgang til arbeidsmarkedet. Dette gjøres gjennom å drive opplæring og skape arbeidsplasser innen manuelt arbeid.

Våre tjenester følger strenge kvalitets- og sikkerhetskrav og leveres med høy kompetanse på vårt fagfelt.

Name: Highland Carbon
Description:
Planting forests, on behalf of company clients, within the framework of voluntary carbon offsetting.  Highland Carbon restores landscapes through natural planting schemes with dozens of species of native trees.

Carbon offset is independently verified under the auspices of the Woodland Carbon Code.  We provide robust communications and public relations support to our clients.

Less than 1% of Scotland's once great Caledonian Forest Remains.  We work to restore such wilderness while benefiting local wildlife and ecotourism.  We seek both sympathetic landowners and companies interested in reducing their carbon impacts.

Tāpēc uzskatām, ka mežs ir jāsaglabā nākamajām paaudzēm. Dabai draudzīgā veidā, katra nozāģētā koka vietā stādot jaunu un respektējot meža dzīves ciklu.

Name: Orsa Besparingsskog
Description:
Orsa Besparingsskog bildades 1879 för att skapa välstånd för bygden och ägarna. Besparingsskogen har genom åren haft och har fortfarande ett mycket stort och viktigt inflytande i bygden och fungerar på många sätt som en motor som garanterar folket i bygden välstånd och en fortsatt positiv utveckling i framtiden.

Idag har Orsa Besparingsskog ett markinnehav på ca 75000 ha, varav 60000 ha är produktiv skogsmark. En viktig del av verksamheten är Tallheds plantskola, där de plantor som skall växa i våra framtida skogar odlas.

I vår verksamhet ingår även jakt, fiske och stuguthyrning. Vi har ett sort vägnät för våra verksamheter och många av vägarna är tillgängliga för allmänheten. En del av den ekonomiska vinsten från våra olika verksamhetsområden återförs till våra delägare och till bygden i form av bidrag och olika utvecklingsprojekt.

Name: BIOTEC - Tecnologia em Produção de Biomassa
Star Agro Forestry Ltd.
Description:
Star Agro Forestry, born from a visionary idea in 2021, has now blossomed into a pioneering venture with the establishment of our state-of-the-art tissue culture lab in March 2023. At Star Agro Forestry, our mission is to revolutionize farming practices by incorporating cutting-edge technology to elevate yield, quality, and production efficiency.

Our objectives are clear and impactful. We strive to optimize harvest times for a diverse range of crops, spanning from hardwoods like Teak, Gmelina, Eucalyptus, and Bamboo to essential cultivation staples such as cocoa, cashews, and bananas. By doing so, we aim to provide tangible benefits to both farmers and the plantation industry across the Sub-Saharan Region.

Looking towards the future, our long-term vision extends beyond profitability. We aspire to create a holistic impact, delivering economic, environmental and social benefits to the Farmer, Agriculture and Plantation Sectors. Through sustainable and innovative practices, Star Agro Forestry envisions a future where agriculture coexists harmoniously with nature, fostering prosperity for communities and the planet alike.

Name: Rowmec Equipment Company Inc.
Description:
ROWMEC is your trusted source for forestry clearing equipment.

We've been dedicated to simplifying land clearing since day one. We specialize in providing reliable mulching and tree-cutting equipment, backed by superior customer and ancillary services. Our headquarters in Conroe, TX is the go-to destination for all your land clearing and forestry equipment needs. 

Our services include sales of new and used equipment, repair and service in the field or at our facility of all mulching machine products, metal fabrication, a parts locater service and more. From oil/gas pipelines to residential landscaping projects, ROWMEC has you covered. Discover a wide selection of both new and used equipment through our inventory on our website.

We know that having the right part at the right time can make all the difference. That's why our parts department is always stocked with various lines of bearings, hydraulic pumps and motors, cutting teeth and more, ensuring you have access to essential components from top brands when you need them most.

It has been our goal to not only provide the best land clearing products for the brush and tree mulching industry, but also the best customer service as well. We take pride in what we do, and our customer service support center is ready to help assist you in making the best decisions for your land-clearing projects. That's the ROMWEC difference.

For more information on any of our mulching or tree cutting equipment, contact us today!

Name: Forest Enhancement Society of BC
Description:
In February 2016, the Government of British Columbia announced the formation of FESBC with initial funding of $85 million and a five-member Board of Directors to oversee the establishment of the Society and the delivery of its purposes. An additional $150 million was announced in early 2017.

The purposes of FESBC are to advance environmental and resource stewardship of BC's forests by: 1) preventing and mitigating the impact of wildfires; 2) improving damaged or low value forests; 3) improving habitat for wildlife; 4) supporting the use of fibre from damaged and low value forests; and 5) treating forests to improve the management of greenhouse gases.

As of March 2022, the Forest Enhancement Society of BC has supported 263 projects valued at $238 million, generating $363 million dollars in economic activity in partnership with the Province of BC and the Government of Canada.

Name: Siltec - Silvicultura e Tecnologia Florestal

 O que fazemos:

Nosso diferencial:
