Name: Forest Products Commission, Western Australia
Description:
The Forest Products Commission (FPC) is a government trading enterprise committed to close engagement with communities, industry, and government to support a vibrant, sustainable forestry industry.

Working in plantation and native forestry across the diverse environment of Western Australia, the FPC delivers timber products and services across three business segments – softwood, native forest, and sandalwood.

We are shaping the industry’s future with our key priorities of timber production, forest health, and adapting to the challenges of climate change.

We supply essential timber products for the housing and construction industry in Western Australia, as well as for biomass, furniture making, artisans, and firewood. Sandalwood is used for incense, perfume, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals.

Our social media community guidelines: https://www.wa.gov.au/organisation/forest-products-commission/forest-product-commission-community-guidelines-social-media

Name: Uruforest
Description:
URUFOREST 2026: El gran punto de encuentro del futuro forestal uruguayo.

Uruguay vuelve a tener su gran feria del sector forestal, que integra a su vez al sector agro y ambiental: Uruforest 2026, del 21 al 24 de octubre en Juan Lacaze (Colonia).
Una nueva cita que reunirá a empresas, profesionales, instituciones y público en torno a la innovación, la sostenibilidad y las oportunidades de inversión.

Después del éxito de su primera edición, Uruforest regresa más técnica, internacional e innovadora, reafirmando su propósito de ser la gran vidriera del Uruguay Forestal.

Durante cuatro días habrá conferencias, demostraciones, rondas de negocios y espacios de encuentro que integran el agro con la forestación y el ambiente, proyectando el futuro sostenible del país.

Name: Euroforest Group
Description:

The subject of the company's activity is the export of softwood and hardwood.

In 2018, we were named the largest exporter of the port of Rijeka, Croatia.
Our activity is accompanied by various quality certificates of the products we export, like FSC and Bureau Veritas.

Description:
WaldSchweiz ist der Verband der Schweizer Waldeigentümer – vorher Waldwirtschaft Schweiz WVS. Er vertritt die Interessen der rund 250’000 privaten und öffentlichen Waldeigentümer. WaldSchweiz setzt sich für Rahmenbedingungen ein, welche es den Forstbetrieben erlauben, den Schweizer Wald ökonomisch und ökologisch nachhaltig zu bewirtschaften, sodass er jederzeit fit und vielfältig bleibt.

Name: Euroforest Silviculture
Description:
Expertly managing multi-functional forests for a sustainable future 

We manage over 100,000 acres of woodland covering Cornwall to Kent, throughout central England and Wales and north to Scotland. The properties managed are remarkably diverse, ranging from species rich ancient broadleaved woods to extensive conifer plantations, and from small farm woodlands to whole estates.

Our clients are equally diverse: farmers, estate owners and investment trusts, both private individuals and institutions, including conservation trusts, local authorities and statutory agencies.

We offer a range of management services to suit individual owners’ needs. Our full woodland management service takes care of all aspects from the sowing of acorns to the final felling of mature trees – and looking after everything from bluebells to forest roads along the way. Where owners require only specific or occasional professional forestry advice, we can act in a consultancy capacity or, if a regular ‘hand on the tiller’ is required, we can provide this as a retained woodland consultant.

Name: Hydrowood
Description:
Thanks to an incredible vision, and even more incredible feats of modern engineering, Hydrowood is undertaking one of Australia’s most ambitious forestry projects. Hydrowood has created history by delving deep below the waters of Lake Pieman to resurrect the precious timber below. Hydrowood is unlocking supplies of specialty timbers so scarce they were thought almost gone forever. Species such as Tasmanian Myrtle, Sassafras and even the legendary Huon Pine will once again be available in quantity.

This is real timber. Timber (re) discovered. Timber that master builders dream of working with, harvested in a way you wouldn’t believe and in quantities the world thought it would never see again.

Name: RECONECTA
Description: Reconecta busca revitalizar bosques privados abandonados, cuyos propietarios desconocen su titularidad, mediante prácticas forestales sostenibles. Su objetivo es proteger la biodiversidad, promover la bioeconomía forestal y mitigar riesgos como incendios y despoblación rural, asegurando un futuro ambientalmente seguro y económicamente viable.

Name: F&W Forestry UK
Description:
F & W Forestry has been managing woodland in the UK since 1957. We provide expert services in all aspects of forest and associated land management, including acquisition and brokerage of forest and woodland properties. 

F & W Forestry clients include forest owners and investors, both commercial and private individuals, who rely upon our expertise to both acquire and then manage the commercial, operational and environmental aspects of owning a forest.

Today, we are part of the F & W Forestry Services Group which globally manages approximately 900,000 hectares (over 2 million acres) of forests and woodland throughout North America, South America, the UK and France. F & W’s forestry and acquisition teams can assist investors by finding and managing forests in any of these markets, as well as elsewhere through its professional contacts in regions such as Scandinavia, Australasia and North Africa.

Name: ante-Gruppe
Description:
Wir sind eines der größten Familienunternehmen in der Holzindustrie. „Wir“ – das sind mehr als 1.400 Kolleginnen und Kollegen an sieben Standorten in Deutschland und Polen. 

Unsere Produkte leisten einen aktiven Beitrag zum Umwelt- und Klimaschutz. Das heißt, wir verarbeiten ausschließlich Holz aus nachhaltiger Forstwirtschaft und nutzen diesen wertvollen Rohstoff zu 100 Prozent.

Aus dem geschnittenen Holz entstehen hochwertige Bauprodukte, aus Spänen Pellets und auch die Rinde wird zur umweltfreundlichen Energieerzeugung genutzt. Unterm Strich binden wir so jedes Jahr mehr als drei Millionen Tonnen CO2.

Wir reden nicht nur über Nachhaltigkeit – wir leben sie. Tag für Tag

Name: Vigilis Tree Shelters
Description:
Vigilis Tree Shelters manufacture 100% plastic-free, soil-biodegradable tree shelters. Made from a blend of potatoes, wood and corn. No microplastics. No toxic residues. Save time, money and the planet, one tree shelter at a time. The future of sustainable forestry.

Our soil-biodegradable tree shelter - Vigilis-Bio - has been designed to have all the benefits of conventional tree shelters whilst having the ability to degrade in soil onsite. 

We supply UK and global markets with high-quality tree protection to support woodland creation, restoration, and highway projects.

Our Vision:

We envision a forestry industry free from plastic waste. Within the next 3 years, we aim to solely manufacture and supply biodegradable tree shelters. Sustainability is not only a moral duty but also a business imperative for the forestry industry.

Our Mission:

Vigilis Tree Shelters provides innovative solutions to protect young trees and help them prosper. We are spearheading change across the forestry industry and have invested significant resources into research, development and innovation.

Vigilis currently helps reforestation efforts around the world by facilitating the survival and growth of saplings in challenging conditions. We are committed to safeguarding the future of trees and combatting climate change, one tree at a time.

Vigilis is in a unique position in the industry – we manufacture and supply biodegradable and polypropylene tree shelters straight to market. Therefore, we can offer competitive pricing, bespoke options, and short lead times on all our products.

Why Vigilis?

Our Vigilis tree shelters have been specially designed to protect trees efficiently and effectively. The name Vigilis: is derived from the Latin word for a guard or sentry.

Utilising our unparalleled industry experience, the Vigilis team have designed and manufactured tree shelters that can double – if not triple – the height of a young sapling over five years.

Name: Planscape
Description:
Planscape is a new, open source, wildfire resilience decision support tool designed to bring the best available state and federal data and science together in a user-friendly, accessible format. 

Planscape helps regional planners prioritize landscape treatments to mitigate fire risk, maximize ecological benefits and help landscapes adapt to climate change. It's currently available for California, but is expanding nationwide in 2025.

Planscape is developed by a collaborative including the USDA Forest Service, Google.org, California Natural Resources Agency, USDA Climate Hub, California Wildfire & Forest Resilience Task Force, University of California and Spatial Informatics Group. It's free to use and available now at app.planscape.org.

Name: Riverside Mills - Cedar Shakes & Shingle Products
Description:
Founded in 1927 by the Sutherland family, Riverside Mills has established itself as a leader in the production of premium cedar shakes and shingles. With a commitment to excellence passed down through four generations, we proudly uphold a tradition of quality and craftsmanship that stands the test of time.

Our production focuses on high quality fiber to produce our #1 perfection and #1 premium grade tapersawn shakes. Without resaws in our plant, our products are uncompromised in quality. Each one of our shingle sawyers and deckmen are trained to survey each block to maximize shingle width and recovery. Our shingle packers then perform a final inspection to ensure all products exceed the designated grade. Our CSSB-certification ensures that all building codes and regulations are met, and our shingles guarantee superior quality, consistency, and durability.

Riverside Mills has been setting the standard in the world of eco-friendly cedar shakes and shingles. We continue to guide every aspect of our operations through a 100% circular facility where every piece of timber has the purpose to be transformed into our renowned cedar products or recycled wood chips. Our dedication to sustainable and ethical forestry practices exceed governmental forestry standards and that ascribed by the First Nations communities. As a result, we've been chosen by discerning architects, builders, and homeowners across the US and Canada for almost a century.

Name: Forêt Sphère
Description:
Forêt Sphère est une association qui fédère un réseau de (futurs) propriétaires ou professionnels, jeunes actifs ou étudiants, entre 20 et 40 ans. 
L’objectif :  les sensibiliser aux enjeux de la forêt et du bois et les réunir pour des temps forts de convivialité et d’échange sur des sujets forestiers.

Name: X-fix wood connector GmbH
Description: Holzverbindung ohne Metall, extrem belastbare, nachhaltige und rückbaubare Holz-Holz Verbindung. Rasche und einfache Montage durch Einschlagen der Verbinder mit einem Hammer. Die konisch geteilte Schwalbenschanz Geometrie zieht die Brettsperrholz-Elemente ohne weiteres Werkzeug zusammen. Genial einfach!

Name: THE LIECO COMPANY
Description:
Wir sind eine forstliche Unternehmensgruppe mit 11 Standorten in Deutschland, Österreich und Tschechien. 

In der Klimakrise leisten wir einen relevanten Beitrag zur Bewältigung der großen Herausforderungen, vor denen unsere Wälder stehen. Die Zukunftsfähigkeit unserer Branche zu sichern und die Klimastabilität der Wälder herzustellen sind Ziel und Ansporn zugleich. 

UNSERE EXPERTISE FÜR IHREN WALD
LIECO, Lürssen und palos – drei Firmen deren gebündelte Erfahrung und Expertise unsere Kunden zu schätzen wissen. Durch die enge Zusammenarbeit und den aktiven, regionsübergreifenden Wissenstransfer unserer Tochterunternehmen entstehen neue kundenorientierte Lösungen.

Unser hochqualitatives Forstvermehrungsgut und unsere Dienstleistungen, ob beratend, manuell oder als Software tragen zur Leistungs- und Widerstandsfähigkeit unserer Wälder bei.

Wir haben maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für Waldbesitz und Bewirtschaftung – analog und digital.

IMMER NAH AM KUNDEN
Unsere Forstexpertinnen und Forstexperten kommen zu Ihnen in den Betrieb und betreuen Sie persönlich. Der direkte Kontakt und das tiefe Verständnis für die Bedürfnisse und Herausforderungen unserer Kunden sind eine Grundlage unseres Erfolgs. 

Bei Aufforstungsprojekten kombinieren wir die Standortbedingungen mit Ihrem Betriebsziel. Forstpflanzen und Dienstleistungen, von der ersten Flächenbegehung über die Baumartenwahl bis zur Kulturpflege bekommen Sie bei uns aus einer Hand.

STETIGE WEITERENTWEICKLUNG UND INNOVATION
Kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklungen haben uns zum Pionier unserer Branche gemacht. Durch fortlaufende Investitionen in Forschung und Entwicklung sind wir oft einen Schritt voraus. Wichtig ist uns dabei die Zusammenarbeit mit der Wissenschaft, denn Forschungsergebnisse kombiniert mit unseren Erfahrungen aus der Praxis sind der Grundstock, auf dem wir neue Lösungskonzepte entwickeln.

Name: Grown in Britain
Description:
Grown in Britain works at every stage of the forest product supply chain to support the use of UK timber.

Over recent years, there has been a growing emphasis on the importance of source. People want to support our nation’s woods and forests by purchasing local timber products; and major construction companies, high street retailers and public authorities are demanding Grown in Britain products as part of their procurement policies.

In the UK, we import £7.8bn of foreign timber each year, whilst neglecting the potential of our own forests and woodlands. Only China imports more wood than the UK.

Grown in Britain certification reduces unnecessary imports, by encouraging and supporting active and sustainable management of our own forests and woodlands.

Name: Proviido Skov & Natur
Description:
Proviido hjælper dig med at realisere dine skov- og naturprojekter. Vores fornemste opgave er at hjælpe dig med at få det bedste ud af din ejendom, når du har brug for faglig bistand og sparring til alt fra små naturprojekter til store skovrejsninger i totalentreprise. 

Et samarbejde med os tager udgangspunkt i dine ønsker og konkrete forhold på din ejendom, og sammen finder vi den bedste løsning til dine arealer.

Vi rådgiver, projekterer og udfører alle dine projekter inden for skov og natur:

- Nyplantning, skovrejsning, læhegn
- Byskov og rekreative områder
- Anlæg af søer og vildtagre
- Værdioptimering af din ejendom
- Ejendomsforvaltning
- Tilskudsansøgninger
- Faunaforbedrende tiltag med klima og biodiversitet i fokus

Når du samarbejder med os, så er det vores skovfogeder Martin, Ole eller Peter, der kommer ud og taler med dig om dine ønsker og mulighederne på din ejendom.

For hos Proviido realiserer vi dine skovdrømme.

Name: Triton Timber Group
Description:
Reclaiming the World's forgotten underwater forests to make beautiful, sustainable timber products, and return reservoirs to a useful, practical life. 

INNOVATION  |  ADVENTURE  |  STEWARDSHIP  |  SAFETY

Name: BASKEGUR
Description:
Somos la Asociación de la Madera de Euskadi

Baskegur es la asociación profesional representativa del sector forestal madera vasco, siendo el órgano voluntario de encuentro y centro consultivo de nuestro sector y de sus industrias asociadas. Baskegur incorpora toda la cadena de valor desde la propiedad forestal, empresas de servicios forestales, rematantes, empresas de primera transformación (sierras y embalaje), industria de la pasta y el papel, empresas de segunda transformación (mueble, estructura, carpintería, etc) y cerrando la cadena, también a empresas de bioenergía.

Ofrecemos colaboración y servicios de asesoramiento, consultas y orientación en materias como mejora de la gestión forestal y de la industria de la madera vasca. Impulsamos el trabajo conjunto entre empresas del sector buscando mejorar su competitividad y su presencia en los mercados internacionales.

Trabajamos junto con otros agentes públicos y privados en el desarrollo de la Bioeconomía Forestal Circular en Euskadi, tomando parte y liderando proyectos de innovación e investigación.

Name: Lavoro Florestal
Description:
Tudo para o segmento florestal! 
#SomosGrupoLavoro

Name: CAMEROON UNITED FORESTS
Description:
Cameroon United Forests est une entreprise industrielle spécialisée dans l'exploitation et la transformation du bois provenant des forêts camerounaises. Nous exploitons plus de 510 000 hectares de forêts répartis sur 12 unités forestières, toutes certifiées OLB (Origine et Légalité des Bois), garantissant des pratiques durables et responsables.
Nos deux sites industriels, situés à Ebolowa et Mbalmayo, nous permettent d'atteindre une capacité de production mensuelle de 22 000 m³ de grumes et 5 000 m³ d’avivés, assurant ainsi une offre constante et de haute qualité.
Fondée en 1991, notre entreprise a su développer des partenariats solides et durables avec des clients dans plus de 30 pays, incluant l'Asie, l'Europe, l'Amérique du Nord, le Moyen-Orient et l'Afrique.

Name: Christie-Elite Nurseries
Description: Christie-Elite is one of the largest forest nurseries in the UK. We produce around 8 million trees annually and are the only UK grower to produce both cell-grown and bare-root plants. The nursery  is 220 acres in size and has been used for tree nursery production for over 200 years. We specialise in the production of genetically superior seed-orchard 'Elite' Sitka spruce and commercial confiers for timber production.

Name: Société Nationale des Bois du Gabon - SNBG
Description: Exploitation des bois du Gabon

Name: German Forestry Council (DFWR)
Description: The German Forestry Council (DFWR) is the umbrella organization of the stakeholders involved in German forestry. It represents and advocates the interests and concerns of sustainable forestry and the preservation of the forest for present and future generations.

Name: AB Florestas e Madeiras
Description: A AB Florestas e Madeiras atua no setor de madeireira e extração de florestas, oferecendo produtos de alta qualidade e confiabilidade para diversas indústrias. Nosso foco está na extração sustentável das florestas e no fornecimento de matéria-prima de excelência para o mercado.

Name: Reybosques
Description:
En Reybosques, nos dedicamos desde 1989 al manejo sustentable de plantaciones forestales, garantizando productos de madera de alta calidad.

Consolidamos un patrimonio forestal de más de 6,000 hectáreas en plantaciones de Gmelina y Teca, manteniendo un compromiso responsable con el medio ambiente en nuestra comercialización y producción.

Name: The Forestry Company
Description:
The Forestry Company (TFC) was established in 2009 and has fast become one of the largest timberland management companies in Ireland. 

Our qualified foresters, forestry advisors and sales advisors have over 30 years’ experience ensuring maximum returns on your investment.

Our Head Office is located in Cork, but TFC operates nationwide. Our forestry advisors are based throughout Ireland, many of whom are farmers with a full understanding of the opportunities and challenges that exist in farming today. 

1. We manage Forestry for private & corporate clients
2. We have foresters with over 30 years’ experience in the industry. We offer fantastic rates if you are looking to thin or clear fell your forest.
3. We know the best trees to plant on your land.  We plant and manage your forest to make sure that it reaches its full potential.
4. There is also a growing market in semi-mature plantations. Call us if you wish to discuss the purchase or sale of an existing plantation. 
5. We source suitable land for afforestation in line with your budget and requirements to ensure optimum returns.
6. We have the expertise to offer advice on the full spectrum of forestry services from planting a new forest on your existing land, managing an existing plantation, forest road construction, harvesting or investing in land with a view to planting forestry.

Name: Niedersächsische Landesforsten
Description:
Wald als Quelle des nachwachsenden Rohstoffs Holz, als natürlicher Lebensraum für Tiere und Pflanzen und als Umwelt für die Menschen sowie unser Grundeigentum sind bedeutende Ressourcen.
Wir erhalten und entwickeln dieses uns anvertraute Vermögen den Prinzipien einer umfassenden Nachhaltigkeit folgend für zukünftige Generationen.

landesforsten.de/impressum
landesforsten.de/datenschutz

Name: PT. Jemms Wood Alam Semesta
Description: We operate a sustainable forestry management programme in co-operation with government authorities and privately managed forest. This ensure compliance witn technical, enviromental and legistative specifications. A number of planting and re-planting programs are managed, not only for harveting, but also for rehabilitation purpose. Our forestary staff are skilled and professional tree markers and foresters who understand sustainable forestry practices an ensure consistent quality wood raw material. We operate a strigent quality control programme in order to continously improve the quality of our product and services whilst maintaining sustainable growth and increased productivity to meet our costumer needs.

Name: PT Nusantara Alam Raya Sejahtera - Hasnur Group SBU Forestry
Description: PT NAS merupakan Badan Usaha yang bergerak pada Pemanfaatan Hasil Hutan Kayu Dalam Hutan Alam yang tertuang pada SK Kementerian Kehutanan nomor SK.693/Menhut-II/2014

Name: Swiss Wood Innovation Network S-WIN
Description: S-WIN promotes innovation by initiating forward-looking projects and thus creates conditions for the development of competitive products, processes and know-how in the value chain. The aim of S-WIN is to mobilise economic forces of its own and to consistently further exploit existing growth potential, thereby strengthening the competitiveness of the Swiss forestry and timber industry.

Name: Fasque Forestry
Description:
Fasque Forestry is equipped to manage all aspects of the forestry management process from tree supply (transplants and cell grown) to harvesting, marketing and processing. 

Our team can maintain and repair forest roads as well as prepare sites for planting.  We invest in our machinery and our workers to provide the best service to our customers. 

We will give live updates from our harvesters and forwarders allowing clients to conveniently access data and analyse productivity quickly and easily.

Name: Form Ghana Ltd
Description:
Form Ghana Ltd. is a forest plantation management company in central Ghana. It is focused on reforesting degraded Forest Reserves while conserving and restoring indigenous and riparian forestry areas.

Established in 2007, the company is a subsidiary of Sustainable Forestry Investments BV in The Netherlands.

FORM Ghana and the Ghana Forestry Commission made history by developing and signing the first public-private partnership (PPP) forest management lease agreement. It has paved the way for other reforestation companies to follow suit.

Mission Statement
To reforest degraded forest land according to the highest standards for sustainable forest management, serve the needs of the local communities, restore vital environmental services within an economically viable business model within the context of the UN's sustainable development goals (SDGs).

Vision Statement
To reforest 20,000 hectares of degraded forest reserve in Ghana whilst operating according to the highest technical, social and environmental benchmarks set by the Forest Stewardship Council (FSCTM) and the Verified Carbon Standard (VCS).

Name: Evolving Forests
Description:
We live for innovation, curiosity, challenging convention, and creating symbiotic relationships with our natural world.

We don’t see a difference between timber-product development and ecological surveying; we believe that the path to better business development or land-use change is in seeking out the spaces that the environmental, the social and economics come together and compliment each other. 

We’re very flexible in how we work, but you can broadly categorise the work we do into the following areas:

Innovation/ Research & Development - We take your ideas and work with you to develop your products or services from idea to market readiness.

Education and Speaking - Telling the story of the value of trees for the climate, the environment and society through film making, teaching, public-speaking, writing and media.

Advisory and Consulting - Helping find the right timber products for your design or the right direction for your woodland, concentrating on the unique, the unusual, the local and the circular economy.

Name: Elsoms Trees
Description: Elsoms Trees Ltd is a native nursery focusing on seed collecting and growing demanding tree species of local provenance for woodland creation.

Name: Papierholz Austria GmbH
Description:
Papierholz Austria GmbH is a paper and forest products company based in Frantaschach 39, St. Gertraud, Austria. We focus on supplying wood to its owners, promoting and safeguarding the sustainable utilization of wood as a renewable resource and optimizing wood logistics. 

Papaierholz Austria’s core value is sustainability:
• Sustainable forest
• Sustainable business
• Sustainable relationships with our business partners

Name: LevasFlor, Lda
Description:
LevasFlor, Lda is a Mozambican registered company with a 46,000 hectare forest concession located 150 km from Beira in the central province of Sofala. The company holds both forest management and chain of custody FSC certificate of natural forests in Mozambique: SGS – FM/COC – 002870.

LevasFlor practices responsible forestry management with a 20 year rotation cycle, where only a selection of healthy, mature trees is removed. This kind of small-scale and labor-intensive forestry limits the impact on the environment since the open terrain typical of miombo forest significantly reduces the need for road-building and heavy haulage for log removal.

LevasFlor is a completely integrated forestry company with full control of the process from harvest of logs to shipment of final product. The company’s industrial unit is located deep inside the forest concession and comprise of wet mill, kilns, dry mill, CCA treatment plant and carpentry workshops. The final products are either sent directly from the factory to local clients all over Mozambique or sent to the company’s export terminal in Beira for further shipment abroad.

The company employs around 200 local people and has a serious commitment to social development through employment, education and improved health care for its staff as well as support to the neighbouring communities in Cheringoma and Muanza districts in building schools and clinics and support local initiatives such as charcoal production of forest residues to create employment and a basketry program for women.

Name: F&W Forestry Brazil
Description:
Desde 2007, a F&W Brasil trabalha para que os produtores de florestas plantadas tenham o melhor resultado com suas plantações, através de um acompanhamento de alto nível técnico e com foco na otimização dos processos.

Nossa consultoria em gestão de florestas permite aos proprietários rurais e investidores diversificarem seus investimentos por meio do plantio, manejo e comercialização de florestas. 

Com ampla experiência em consultoria e gestão de ativos florestais, nossa equipe está capacitada a avaliar propriedades rurais, verificando a viabilidade do cultivo e indicando as melhores técnicas desde o plantio até a comercialização. 

Alinhados com entidades de classe e de pesquisa brasileiras e com a nossa matriz nos Estados Unidos, com mais de 50 anos de atividade e operações também na América do Sul e Europa, trabalhamos para garantir a sustentabilidade da floresta, gerando riquezas enquanto conservamos os recursos naturais para as gerações futuras. 

Alguns dos nossos serviços:
> Identificação de terras e florestas para compra e venda
> Planejamento e custos: do plantio à venda da madeira, auxiliamos você a ter a melhor relação custo x benefício
> Avaliação de propriedades rurais (Due Diligence)
> Consultorias especializadas 
> Inventário florestal
> Regularizações fundiárias e ambientais
> Mapeamento, georeferenciamento, sensoriamento remoto, Cadastro Ambiental Rural (CAR)
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: CHURCH & CHURCH LUMBER COMPANY
Description: The Church & Church Lumber Company family of companies controls all of our processes from raw material acquisition, timber harvesting, sawmilling, kiln drying, order specification and shipping in order to provide best in class products and services to our customers.

Name: Elija Tawakevou Investments
Description:
Elija Tawakevou Investments is a veteran owned company that supplies Fiji Mahogany and Pine timber directly from the Fiji plantations to the UK market. Other wood such a sandalwood, teak, raintree etc is also available upon request. We can accommodate to your need in addition to cuts and specs. That said our emphasis is on the Quality of Service & Valuing our customers. We also love  to take interest in seeing other companies grow as well. This is where we at Elijah Tawakevou Investments refer other businesses to our customers. Unlike other organisations, we CUT  out the spirit of jealousy, competition & the love  of money . These are KEY  areas where businesses fall apart including the team members. We thank GOD  for everything, it is him that started Elijah Tawakevou Investments. 

Furthermore we are all for giving back to the "community". From the landowners, wood carvers, school children (kindergarten to secondary) community engagements & workshops etc. The list is endless, and many times the communities are taken for "granted". To that end, we at Elijah Tawakevou Investments will ensure that this does not happen - full stop. 

Thank you for taking the time to read  & please do get in touch, even if doesn't involve Mahogany & just want to talanoa.

Vinaka  GOD Bless you  & make his face shine upon you.

Name: Lopes Solutions
Description: Soluções florestais inovadoras

Name: Viking Tree Care
Description: A multi-disciplined team of proffesional tree surgeons and climbing arborists, we undertake a mixture of private and commercial work nationwide. We are commited to training and best industry practice with a focius on sustainability and further tree and hedge planting.

Name: Arbor Analytics
Description:
There is an overwhelming amount of data that forestry companies and organizations have to deal with. We help forestry companies and organizations by providing customized analytics support. This empowers organizations to make better decisions with their data.

Specialties include forest analytics, forest growth modeling, leveraging existing data to solve new problems, and independent research.

Stay on top of how data is changing the forest products industry by subscribing to our email newsletter: https://mailchi.mp/d96897dc0f46/arbor-analytics

Name: APCO
Description:
En APCO entregamos soluciones integrales para el movimiento de materiales mediante maquinaria especializada, adaptadas a las necesidades de grandes y medianas empresas de los sectores minero, industrial y forestal.

Con más de 50 años de trayectoria, brindamos un servicio confiable, eficiente e innovador en todo el territorio nacional. Nuestro equipo multidisciplinario, en constante capacitación, nos permite responder con agilidad y seguridad a los desafíos operacionales de nuestros clientes.

Contamos con maquinaria de alto estándar, personal experto en manipulación de materias primas y capacidad para entregar productos intermedios y terminados con altos niveles de calidad y precisión.

Name: SMURF - The forest owners' project
Description: The SMURF project supports the EU Forest Strategy 2030 by securing and promoting small-scale forest management for the sustainable use of wood and non-wood products. It will fully respect the cascading use principle and contribute to biodiversity and climate objectives, including forest ecosystem restoration and protection.

Name: baltprom group
Description: Suppling of logs, wood by-products, biomass and waste. Transport with walking floor trucks and port logistic in Lübeck.

Name: ForêtCompétences
Description:
NOTRE MISSION

ForêtCompétences met en oeuvre des stratégies innovantes pour soutenir le développement de la main-d’oeuvre forestière.

NOTRE VISION

Reconnu pour ses stratégies concertées mises en place, ForêtCompétences est l’acteur incontournable en matière d’informations sur le marché du travail et de développement des travailleurs de la forêt.

NOS MANDATS

ForêtCompétences réalise ses mandats selon les cinq orientations fondamentales qui guident tous les comités sectoriels, à savoir :

ORIENTATION 1 : Assurer la représentativité du secteur lors d’une assemblée publique, lors de l’assemblée générale, au sein du conseil d’administration, du comité exécutif et au niveau des autres instances du comité sectoriel de main-d’œuvre dans son secteur.

ORIENTATION 2 : Développer le partenariat et la concertation entre les partenaires au sein des structures du comité sectoriel de main-d’œuvre.

ORIENTATION 3 : Contribuer au développement, à la reconnaissance et à la pleine utilisation des compétences de la main-d’œuvre.

ORIENTATION 4 : Contribuer au renforcement et à l’amélioration des pratiques en gestion des ressources humaines dans les entreprises.

ORIENTATION 5 : Contribuer à l’enrichissement de la connaissance du marché du travail par la collecte et la diffusion de l’information stratégique sur les secteurs afin de mieux anticiper les demandes des secteurs et de prévoir leur évolution.

Name: Futuro Forestal
Description: Futuro Forestal has conceptualized the Generation Forest Model, a new economically, ecologically, and socially responsible permanent forest model for the Tropics and Sub-tropics. Moving beyond the traditional plantation Futuro Forestal is building new productive perennial forests with more precious hardwood trees per hectare than natural forests. Over the long-term individual trees are selectively harvested, never clearing the entire forest. It is possible to combine the Generation Forest with other landuses like Cacao or Coffee or even cattle or Teak production. Futuro Forestal is aiming at a tropical forest forever.

Name: Forest First Colombia
Description: Forest First is a sustainable planted forest company developing a large scale hardwood plantation in Colombia. Right from the start, our goal has been to make a positive impact on the communities and environment where we operate. This goal requires us to build a model that is sustainable – socially, environmentally, and economically. We are committed to taking a bold approach which is rooted in our four key themes:  Living, Breathing, Growing, and Learning.

Name: Maderacre
Description: Comercialización de madera de Manejo forestal sustentable, conservación + desarrollo. Trabajamos en equilibrio con la naturaleza y nos preocupamos del crecimiento y desarrollo de la comunidad.

Name: UK Woodland Carbon Code
Description:
The Woodland Carbon Code is the quality assurance standard for UK woodland creation projects which address climate change by removing carbon dioxide from the atmosphere.

It empowers landowners, organisations and businesses to address climate change by creating and supporting woodland projects across the UK. 

Backed by government, the forest industry and carbon market experts, the Woodland Carbon Code provides independently verified carbon units which landowners can use to generate income and organisations and companies can use to offset their emissions.

It is delivered by Scottish Forestry on behalf of the Forestry Commission, Welsh Government and the Northern Ireland Forest Service.

To maintain a professional and respectful environment, users engaging with our content on LinkedIn are asked to adhere to our acceptable use policy. You can view the policy in the news and events section of our website.

Name: BWP FLORESTAL
Description:
A BWP FLORESTAL, empresa do grupo BWP TRADING, não é apenas uma referência no setor florestal; é uma empresa de gestão florestal completa, abrangendo desde o planejamento até a execução de serviços especializados em corte, baldeio, carregamento e transporte. Nossa paixão e comprometimento vão além dos serviços de alta qualidade: estão profundamente enraizados em práticas sustentáveis e de respeito ao meio ambiente. Reconhecemos a imensa responsabilidade que temos ao interagir com nossas preciosas florestas, e é por isso que todas as nossas operações são pautadas em metodologias que visam minimizar impactos e garantir a renovação dos recursos.
 Na BWP FLORESTAL, unimos eficiência operacional e consciência ecológica, porque entendemos que um futuro sustentável é construído com ações conscientes no presente. Junte-se a nós e caminhe em direção a um mundo mais verde e responsável.

Name: Boscor Gruppe
Description:
Die Boscor Gruppe ist Deutschlands führender Dienstleister für nachhaltiges Forst- und Agrarmanagement. Mit unserem Dienstleistungsspektrum decken wir den kompletten Bedarf eines auf Nachhaltigkeit orientierten land- und forstwirtschaftlichen Betriebes ab und schaffen Mehrwert auf allen Ebenen sei es in der Produktion, in der Vermarktung und dem Handel wie auch im administrativen Bereich. 
Unsere Dienstleistungen erbringen wir für alle land- und forstwirtschaftlichen Eigentumsformen, sei es privat, staatlich oder kommunal. 
Hinter der Boscor Gruppe stehen die Familien Reitzenstein und Rotenhan, die seit über 700 Jahren Land- und Forstwirtschaft an den Stammsitzen ihrer Familie betreiben. 
Aus dieser Tradition der nachhaltigen Landbewirtschaftung und der langfristigen Vermögensentwicklung sowie Besitzerhaltung ist die Boscor Gruppe entstanden. Aus dieser Tradition leitet sich unser Wertegerüst und unser Dienstleistungsversprechen ab.

Name: BONUS HARVEST ( BH )
Description:
Bonus Harvest est une entreprise à capitaux chinois, spécialisée dans l'exploitation forestière, la transformation, le transport et le commerce des produits en bois tropicaux. 
Engagée dans le processus de certification forestière depuis 2019, Bonus Harvest gère à ce jour une concession forestière de 128 000 Hc sous Aménagement Durable dans la province de l'Ougooué-Lolo ( Lastourville/Koulamoutou) et fournit des produits en grumes au marché local et en débités aux clients internationaux.

Name: Ukrwoodprom LPK / "ULPK" LLC
Description: Production and sale of Ukrainian lumber from oak and pine. By choosing us as partners, you get significant advantages. We have a large raw material base in Ukraine and an active production network. We manufacture, order, ship products according to the customer's specifications Each batch of goods is checked for the customer's technical requirements before shipment. We reserve specific real volumes and release according to the schedule. We process and clear cargo for export. We provide all accompanying documentation. We offer high-quality lumber: Oak: edged board, beam, frieze, lamella, parquet blank. Pine: pine frieze, pallet blank, edged board, planed board, construction board, beam, rail, pallets.

Name: Forestry Sector Council
Description:
The Forestry Sector Council believes that Nova Scotia’s forestry sector is as strong as its people. 

We are dedicated to cultivating a sustainable, diverse workforce for forestry in our province, by focusing on our strategic priorities: talent attraction and retention, skill development, and HR planning.

Connect with us here to learn more about how we find, retain, and build the skills of people in our industry, making forestry a sector of choice, now and into the future.

Name: Generation Forest Invest
Description:
We are an impact forestry manager channelling capital to solve global environmental and social problems, through building permanent, resilient, and profitable "Generation Forests" at scale. 

We reengineer and regenerate forests to help reverse the climate crisis, recreate habitat for biodiversity, rebuild soil, improve water quantity and quality, and reduce rural poverty. 

Over almost three decades, we have developed an integrated and innovative reforestation concept to produce sustainable timber, to sequester carbon and enable nature to rebuild itself.

MISSION: To create as many permanent, biodiverse, and profitable Generation Forests as possible, as soon as possible, to maximize CO2 sequestration, ecosystem restoration, habitat for biodiversity, regeneration of soils and water resources, and rural development.


VISION: We aim to become the Nr. 1 impact forest manager through the facilitation of the creation of large numbers of hectares of Generation Forests together with key partners.

Name: Bosques y Ríos
Description:
En Bosques y Ríos contamos con más de 25 años de experiencia en el cultivo del chopo, gestionando en la actualidad 2.300 hectáreas de choperas en las cuencas del Ebro y del Duero. 

Las choperas son un actor clave en el S.XXI para producir madera, un material renovable con el que construir un mundo más sostenible. Además son inmensos sumideros de CO2, crean corredores verdes para las aves y la fauna y protegen nuestros ríos. También generan empleo y riqueza en el entorno rural en el que se cultivan.

Creemos en la innovación como herramienta para garantizar el futuro de nuestro sector, por eso colaboramos activamente con los principales centros de investigación españoles y europeos implicados en la investigación del chopo. 
Tenemos la mayor red de parcelas de ensayo clonal de España y en ellas analizamos la adaptación de los distintos clones de chopo a las condiciones de la populicultura española. También estudiamos las distintas técnicas selvícolas que nos ayuden a producir madera de alta calidad.

Somos referente en cuanto a gestión forestal sostenible. Muestra de ello, es que todas nuestras plantaciones están certificadas conforme a los dos principales sistemas de certificación forestal: FSC y PEFC.

Name: Programa Más Mujer
Description:
El año 2019, desde la Corporación Chilena de la Madera surgió la pregunta de cuántas mujeres componen el sector forestal chileno. Desde un diagnóstico inicial se conoció que del total de trabajadores del rubro, un 13,5% correspondían a mujeres.

Desde ese momento se planteó la meta de alcanzar un 20% de participación laboral femenina al año 2026, mediante la implementación del Programa Más Mujer. Este programa lo componen algunas de las empresas asociadas a Corma y trabaja en base a tres comités.

Name: Finsilva Oyj
Description:
Finsilva Oyj on suomalainen metsä- ja luontopääomayhtiö. Olemme yksi Euroopan suurimmista yksityisistä ja itsenäisistä metsänomistajia. Omistamme n. 137 000 hehtaaria hyvin hoidettua suomalaista metsää.

Yhdistämme ympäristöarvot ja markkinatalouden laittamalla luontopääoman tuottamaan kestävällä ja kannattavalla tavalla. Liiketoimintamme muodostavat metsätalous, uusiutuva energia ja maanjalostus. Kehitämme metsä- ja maankäytön muotoja, jotka sopivat ihmisen ja yhteiskunnan muuttuviin tarpeisiin.

Keskitymme arvokkaan puuraaka-aineen tuottamiseen ja luomme edellytyksiä puupohjaisten biotuotteiden monipuoliselle tuotannolle. Luomme ympäristömarkkinoista aitoa liiketoimintaa ja tarjoamme houkuttelevan kehittämisympäristön uusiutuvan energian hankkeille. Myymme ja vuokraamme maata aurinko- ja tuulipuistoille.

Osallistumme maa-alueiden hyöty- ja virkistyskäytön suunnitteluun sekä luomme yhteisiä edellytyksiä uusiin ansaintamalleihin. Mökkivalmiit rantatonttimme ja tuottavat metsätilamme sijaitsevat elinvoimaisissa metsissä, joita on hoidettu asiantuntevasti jo yli 100 vuoden ajan.

Finsilvan omistavat CapMan Natural Capitalin hallinnoimat rahastot ja Metsärahasto II Ky (Ilmarinen).

--

The Finnish forest and nature capital company Finsilva plc is one of the leading private and independent forest owners in Europe. Finsilva owns roughly 137,000 hectares of well-managed forest, most of which is located in Southern and Central Finland. Finsilva is owned by funds managed by CapMan Natural Capital, and Metsärahasto II Ky (Ilmarinen).

Finsilva specialises in the responsible and diverse utilisation of forest and natural capital. We provide economic, social and ecological wellbeing by developing sustainable forestry and creating profitable business from renewable energy and environmental compensation.

The core of our business is in forestry, renewable energy and land refinement. We develop new ways of using forests and land based on the changing needs of people and society.

Name: 3P Florestal
Description:
3P Florestal is a company headquartered in Belém (State of Pará - Brazil) that provides consulting services in forest investments and international trading of timber to several countries around the globe.

Operating since 2001 in the industry, the company’s partners are highly technically and strategically skilled in managing operations, including legal substantiation, control of possible gaps, punctuality in delivery and maximization of financial results of investments.

In this period, several projects were developed for companies and investors located in North America, Europe and Asia, which allowed the company to consolidate a broad base of clients and partners.

Name: Vitli KRPAN
Description:
The company PIŠEK-Vitli KRPAN was founded in 1977. It all began in a few square meters large workshop and is today the largest manufacturer of forestry winches in the world. With a wide distribution network of over 900 sales points, we are present in more than 40 countries worldwide. The production program also includes other forestry machinery such as forestry trailers with cranes, log splitters, firewood processors, circular saws with conveyor belts, firewood bundlers, tractor tipper boxes, grabs and other machinery indispensable for working in the forest. All machines, intended for professional as well as home users, are the result of our own development, many years of experience and testing of operation in the most difficult circumstances. 

A high-tech company invests a lot of sources in digitalization and automation. The production process is robotized and computer controlled with the latest technology.  

In the field of intellectual property, KRPAN owns several international patents, registered designs and marks. Every year we expand the range of products that foresters need for their work.

The KRPAN brand is synonymous with strength, reliability and durability.

Name: Sequoia Plantation
Description:
Sequoia Plantation is a leading sustainable agribusiness firm, committed to revolutionizing forestry practices for a sustainable future. 

As an integral part of the Equitane Group, we specialize in the development and management of sustainable plantation projects that prioritize environmental health, economic viability, and social equity. Our approach combines innovative agricultural techniques with a deep respect for natural ecosystems, aiming to produce high-quality, sustainable crops while enhancing biodiversity and conserving water. 

Sequoia Plantation is not just about agriculture; it's about creating a sustainable legacy for future generations.

Name: Silviculture Innovation Program
Description: The Silviculture Innovation Program aims to accelerate the growth of innovative silviculture by improving knowledge of these systems in British Columbia through a research and extension program. The program is carried out by the Bulkley Valley Research Centre.

Name: Laania Oy
Description:
Laania on metsäsi hoitaja

Laaniaan tiivistyy metsänhoidon ja puukaupan perinteet ja nykyaika - vuosikymmenten kokemus ja innovatiivinen tapa ajatella. Teemme tätä työtä vanhaa hyvää vaalien ja uutta vehreää kasvattaen. Metsänomistajan tarpeita tarkalla korvalla kuunnellen. Pitkäjänteisesti ja sitoutuen, vastuumme tuntien.

Name: PF Olsen Australia
Description:
PF Olsen (Aus) Pty Ltd is Australian's largest independent forestry services provider and is a subsidiary business of PF Olsen in NZ.

The business provides a broad range of forestry related services in Australia (see profile Specialties) in addition to ecological consulting services through its controlling interest in Abzeco (an ecological consulting & land management practice based in Melbourne)

Name: ArbrePaulownia.fr - WeGrow France
Description:
Avec nos variétés d'arbres Paulownia hybrides brevetés, nous proposons une solution rentable et durable pour vos terrains inexploités, ou vos terrains en friche. Un moyen intéressant de diversifier vos activités et de générer des revenus complémentaires, tout en faisant un geste écologique fort.

Nous sommes là pour vous accompagner et conseiller tout au long de votre projet de plantation en France, de l'achat des jeunes arbres, jusqu'à la vente du bois. 

#arbre #paulownia #bois #France #kiri #durable #co2 #boislocal #sylviculture #planterdesarbres #agriculturededemain

Name: STUBOGGREN
Description:
Vi er en ”GRØN” virksomhed der udfører en bred vifte af forskellige opgaver inden for den grønne sektor. 
Vores kerneydelser er blandt andet skov- og træpleje, byggerydninger, eng- og moserydninger, naturpleje på vådområder, opførsel af OCR baner og naturlegepladser og skovrejsning.
Vi foretager også risikovurderinger af træer samt konsulentrådgivning ved eksempelvis skovrejsning og landskabsdannelse.

Name: Forsilvitech
Description: Information on modern silviculture technology developments

Name: Texas Forestry Association
Description: Today, the Texas Forestry Association, still guided by a conservation philosophy, has become more than just an association of forest-minded landowners, businesses and professionals. It has reached far beyond the original concept of TFA in 1914, and today offers programs for almost every Texan interested in conservation, business, history, education, wildlife and more.

Name: Discovering Forestry Podcast
Description: The industry’s only podcast focused on all things tree and landscape. Joe Aiken & Korey Lofy combine over 60 years of industry knowledge and experience and will discuss some of the trends, concerns, and opportunities in the fields of forestry and arboriculture.

Name: HolzBauWerk Schwarzwald GmbH
Description: Brettsperrholzwerk

Name: BETTER GLOBE FORESTRY
Description: Better Globe Forestry Ltd (BGF) was incorporated in Kenya in 2004 and in Uganda in 2009. Its core expertise lies in commercial dryland afforestation and in-depth knowledge of living & environmental conditions in semi-arid areas. As such it is well-positioned to anticipate & mitigate the effects of climate change in East Africa, in a commercial and sustainable way. Head Office is in Nairobi, with field operations in Kenya’s Eastern and Coast provinces, as well as in Northern Uganda. The BGF model consists of vertical integration of all activities, from seed & seedling production to plantation establishment, maintenance, exploitation, and processing. Its flagship species are Melia volkensii (mukau) dryland mahogany uniquely adapted to low-rainfall areas, indigenous to East Africa, and maturing in 15 to 20 years, Acacia senegal producing gum arabic and Melia azedarach (Chinaberry, giant lira), another fast-growing mahogany species planted with partner farmers in Northern Uganda. BGF is the publisher of Miti magazine, a platform for the exchange of forestry knowledge between forest professionals & entrepreneurs. https://miti-magazine.betterglobeforestry.com/

Name: RC FLORESTAL
Description: Qualidade no Segmento Florestal | Desde 1994.

Name: Florext
Description:
A Florext, empresa do Grupo Ouro Safra, atua de forma integrada no setor florestal — do plantio à entrega industrial — com foco em segurança, eficiência e geração de valor sustentável para produtores e indústrias.

Especialistas em compra de madeira em pé, formação de maciços florestais, colheita mecanizada e logística estruturada, entregamos qualidade, escala e previsibilidade para quem consome, e valorização real para quem produz.

Resultado da união entre a solidez da Ouro Safra e a experiência da PFC Florestal, a Florext tem base financeira forte e conhecimento técnico de campo, operando com ética, contratos claros e relacionamento de longo prazo.

Atuamos com equipes técnicas dedicadas em diversas regiões do Brasil, com agilidade para estruturar operações completas para indústrias que buscam iniciar ou expandir projetos florestais com segurança.

Nossos diferenciais:

- Avaliações técnicas confiáveis e imparciais
- Compra direta e pagamento seguro
- Colheita eficiente, sem degradação da propriedade
- Fornecimento contínuo com contratos estruturados
- Atendimento técnico, próximo e transparente

Nosso propósito: profissionalizar o setor florestal com seriedade, combate à informalidade e compromisso com resultados duradouros.

Vamos conversar? 
A Florext está pronta para atender produtores e indústrias em busca de soluções seguras e rentáveis no setor florestal. Nos mande um e-mail: braulio.campos@florext.com.br

Name: JJK FOREST
Description: With over two and a half decades of expertise, JJK FOREST specializes in the wood trading industry within the Baltic region and Scandinavia

Name: DIVERSE Research
Description: DIVERSE is a Pan-Canadian research initiative dedicated to advancing forest management through an innovative approach emphasizing functional diversity and ecological connectivity. The project seeks to enhance forest resilience to global changes while fostering social acceptance and sustainable forest stewardship.

Name: Grupo Núcleos de Madera
Description:
Somos el Grupo Núcleos de Madera, grupo forestal y empresarial que forma parte de la Organización Ardila Lülle y que está conformado por Cipreses de Colombia S.A., Núcleos e Inversiones Forestales de Colombia S.A. y TM Codemaco S.A.S.

Contamos con más de 45 años de experiencia cultivando y produciendo maderas para uso industrial.

Cada una de nuestras empresas es una línea de negocio completamente desarrollada que puede ser vista como ente separado, pero que, a la vez, hacen parte de todo el proceso que conlleva la producción de maderas completamente confiables.

Name: Asociación Forestal Argentina AFoA
Description: AFoA es la única entidad nacional que representa al sector forestal de la Argentina. Está integrada por empresas, productores forestales, estudiantes y profesionales independientes vinculados al sector forestal y a la industria y servicios asociados. La Asociación Forestal Argentina posee regionales en zonas de máximo desarrollo forestal. AFoA Misiones, AFoA Corrientes, AFoA Río Uruguay (sur de Corrientes y corredor del Río Uruguay de Entre Ríos), AFoA Delta y Pampeana (Provincia de Buenos Aires, Delta bonaerense y Entre Ríos.

Name: Forest360
Description:
Forest360 is a full forestry value chain consultancy and management business that is focused on building a generational client base across a range of different forest assets types.   

Forest360 creates value for your production or permanent forest asset through astute management of the entire supply chain. The business has a fully integrated skillset - from initial land-use assessments to potential harvest and re-establishment or ongoing stewardship, we aim to ensure you get the best return on your investment.

Forest360 provides a complete suite of services including:

- Professional forest management with a holistic perspective on species and land use.
- Specialist Emissions Trading Scheme (ETS) advice 
- Forest investment financial analysis 
- Valuations and due diligence
- Land use assessments 
- Forest operations 
- Establishment and tending
- Pre-harvest inventory, growth and yield modelling
- Harvesting and engineering management
- Domestic and Export log marketing and sales
- Forest sales and purchases
- Providing general forestry advice client working with professional service firms
- Mapping and GIS services.

Name: F4 Tech
Description:
We help keep forestry viable • We innovate • We help foresters work more efficiently • We are dedicated to long-term relationships • We always follow through • We are committed to customer service

DATA-DRIVEN NATURAL RESOURCE MANAGEMENT 
Our team of professionals have agency and private industry experience. With this knowledge and background, F4 Tech understands the obstacles, goals, processes and technology involved in all aspects of natural resource management.

Name: Constructora Huequecura Ltda
Description: Constructora Huequecura Ltda is a facilities services company based out of 2338 Gral Bonilla, Concepción, Chile.

Name: Hiram Wald&Holz
Description:
Hiram is a reputable timber trading company based in southern Germany, serving both domestic and international markets. We specialize in providing high-quality timber products and logistical services. Our product portfolio has significantly expanded in recent years to include premium round logs of all qualities and sizes, utility poles, log cabin timber, and timber for building and restoring boats & ships.

In addition to our core timber business, we are also actively involved in the renewable energy market through our French subsidiary, Hiram-Forêt-et-Bois (HFB), which sells biomass and wooden waste materials. With a well-established and widespread network of suppliers and distributors throughout Europe, we are committed to ensuring a constant supply of timber to our valued clients.

Name: Eesti Metsameister
Description:
Eesti metsanduse uus põlvkond - kehtestame uusi jätkusuutliku metsamajandamise standardeid, olles teadlikule maaomanikule parim partner Eesti metsas.

Eesti Metsameistris mõistame, et mets on meie rahva suurim varandus – vähesed riigid saavad öelda, et nende territooriumist üle poole on rohelise kullaga kaetud. Lisaks majanduslikule kasule on metsal oluline koht ka meie kultuuripärandis. 

Seetõttu usume Eesti Metsameistris, et metsa tuleb majandada järeltulevatele põlvedele. Loodussõbralikult, iga raiutud puu asemel uut istutades ning metsa eluringi austades.

Name: JRM Resources
Description:
JRM provides innovative, cost effective solutions to the civil, forestry and mining industries in Western Australia. JRM Resources are renowned for their reliability, quality of work and support of local communities.

JRM is passionate about providing full timber utilisation for client mine site expansions across the following functions:

Harvesting Operations
Land clearing and residue solutions
Bulk earthworks

Name: Quatrotablas
Description:
Quatrotablas es una empresa enfocada al desarrollo de productos en madera aplicados a la construcción de edificaciones. Hemos integrado un equipo humano compuesto por carpinteros profesionales con una amplia experiencia y por un estudio de ingeniería vanguardista enfocado al diseño de edificaciones de consumo de energía casi nulo.

Para ello, se dispone de una infraestructura en pleno impulso e innovación para ofrecer una amplia gama de productos de calidad, sostenibles y con la más alta eficiencia energética.

Name: Confederación de Forestalistas del País Vasco | Euskadiko Basogintza Elkarteen Konfederakundea
Description:
La Confederación de Forestalistas del País Vasco está integrada por las asociaciones de forestalistas de Araba, Bizkaia y Gipuzkoa. La confederación defiende los intereses de la propiedad forestal a través de participación en debates normativos y proyectos forestales innovadores. Además, ofrece servicios integrales de ayuda y asesoramiento a todas las personas asociadas.

Euskadiko Basogintza Elkarteen Konfederakundea Araba, Bizkaia eta Gipuzkoako basogintza elkarteek osatzen dute. Konfederakundeak baso-jabetzaren interesak defendatzen ditu arauzko eztabaidetan eta basogintza-proiektu berritzaileetan parte hartuz. Gainera, laguntza eta aholkularitza zerbitzu integrala eskaintzen die bazkide guztiei.

Name: Meraskog AB
Description: Meraskogs verksamhet bedrivs i Härjedalen, Hälsingland, Dalarna, Värmland och Småland. Vi är ett dotterbolag till Norra Skog som har omkring 650 anställda, hos Meraskog arbetar idag 23 personer. Vi är ett nytänkande, modernt tjänsteföretag som verkar självständigt med affärsidén att skapa ett långsiktigt, hållbart och lönsamt skogsägande för våra kunder. Vårt kompassverktyg gör det möjligt för oss att se till helheten utifrån kundens förutsättningar, genom att ringa in målsättningen med skogsägandet och analysera nuläget så sätter vi en vass strategi för att genomföra rätt aktiviteter. Läs mer om oss och vårt verktyg kompassen här.

Name: Stowarzyszenie Leśników i Właścicieli Lasów
Description: Stowarzyszenie Leśników i Właścicieli Lasów powstało w 2013 r. Od początku powstania, naszym głównym celem jest reprezentowanie interesów leśników i właścicieli lasów oraz integrowanie tych obu środowisk. Poprzez prowadzenie działalności kulturowej, edukacyjnej i naukowo-technicznej w zakresie wydawania specjalistycznych opinii oraz doradztwa w zakresie leśnictwa, drzewnictwa i ochrony środowiska – nasza działalność rozrosła się na teren całego kraju. Zapraszamy do współpracy!

Name: Remixed Nature
Description: Vi driver Danmarks første naturbaserede CO2-selskab og et bæredygtigt skovejendomsselskab. Vil du være med som investor?

Name: Multiteak
Description:
Somos una empresa Ecuatoriana creada en el 2013 dedicada a la exportación de maderas tropicales principalmente de la especie teca. Nuestro producto forestal proviene de plantaciones comerciales con las mejores practicas ambientales.
#teca #ecuador #ambiental #plantacionescomerciales #exportaciones

Name: Brooks Land & Timber
Description:
Brooks Land & Timber is full service forestry consulting, land management, & real estate company serving clients throughout the Southeastern US. Our focus is to meet our clients wants, needs & dreams by using sound practices that are scientifically backed. 

 Since being established in 2020, Brooks Land and Timber is your one stop shop for anything land.  BLT can help you do everything from purchase land, design/establishing a forest and or wildlife management plan, then execute the plan that meets your goals and objectives. We look forward to meeting you and helping make your dreams a reality!

Name: LJR Forestry
Description: Forestry

Name: Pike Consultora Forestal
Description: Nos dedicamos a potenciar el desarrollo de la industria forestal en Uruguay, guiados por los valores de integridad, confidencialidad y confianza.

Name: FG Elagage Cordiste
Description:
Chez FG Élagage, nous mettons notre savoir-faire et notre passion au service de vos projets de travaux en hauteur. Basés à Négrondes, nous sommes spécialisés dans l'élagage, l'abattage et l'entretien des arbres, ainsi que dans les interventions de cordistes pour les zones difficiles d'accès.

Nos Services Incluent :

Élagage et Abattage : Interventions sécurisées pour la taille et l'abattage d'arbres, même dans les zones les plus complexes.
Entretien de Bâtiments : Nettoyage, dévégétalisation et maintenance des façades, toitures et autres structures en hauteur.
Sécurisation des Sites : Mise en sécurité des zones à risques, inspection et réparation des infrastructures.
Pourquoi Choisir FG Élagage ?

Expertise Technique : Une équipe de professionnels qualifiés et équipés pour les travaux les plus exigeants.
Sécurité Avant Tout : Des protocoles de sécurité rigoureux pour protéger nos équipes et vos biens.
Service Personnalisé : Des solutions adaptées à chaque projet, avec un accompagnement de proximité.
Nous collaborons avec des mairies, des collectivités locales et des entreprises pour offrir des services fiables et de qualité. Chez FG Élagage, nous sommes engagés à maintenir les plus hauts standards de professionnalisme et de satisfaction client.

Contactez-nous pour discuter de vos besoins en élagage et travaux en hauteur !

Name: Proyecto LIFE Alnus Taejo
Description:
Proyecto LIFE para proteger y restaurar los ríos y riberas dominados por bosques aluviales de alisos en el oeste de la cuenca internacional del río Tajo. 
El proyecto LIFE20 NAT/ES/000021 ha recibido fondos del Programa LIFE de la Unión Europea

Name: Timber Research and Development Institute, Prague, s.e.
Description: Authorized Body no. 222 on conformity assessment and certification of products entering the Czech market. The Notified Body no. 1393 commissioned to assess the products placed on the European market. Testing laboratories for testing products and whole buildings.

Name: Northern Tier Hardwood Association
Description: NTHA is a non-profit organization serving the wood industry throughout Bradford, Lackawanna, Luzerne, Pike, Sullivan, Susquehanna, Tioga, Wayne, and Wyoming counties. Our mission is to promote long term economic development in the Northern Tier of Pennsylvania through intelligent forest management, careful expansion of secondary wood processing, improved manufacturing methods, regional hardwood promotion and education.

Name: Forest Vision
Description: Forest Vision uses patented vision and image processing techniques to measure and scale logs for the forest industry. Our technology improves log scaling accuracy and relieves truck bottlenecks at the weigh station. We are headquartered in the Pacific Northwest and founded by industry veterans.

Name: LIPHOOK TREE SURGEONS LIMITED
Description:
Liphook Tree Surgeons was established in 2010 by James Enticknap-Green after working as a freelance arborist.

The company was started locally to promote a balanced approach to Tree surgery and arboricultural services in the area, with conservation and best modern practices within arboriculture always being at the forefront of our work.

James has 20 years experience in the industry and we operate with a highly skilled and knowledgeable team of operatives.

Our clients include both domestic and commercial customers covering Hampshire , Surrey and West Sussex .

Name: Lavrimadeiras
Description:
A lavrimadeiras, Lda, fundada em 2005, é uma empresa que atua nas áreas de exploração florestal, silvicultura e trabalhos de maquinaria agrícola para os mais diversos fins, construção civil, obras públicas, entre outros.
A empresa conta com uma experiente equipa de operadores orientados pelo profissionalismo e proximidade com o cliente.

Name: VANDERVELDEN - ALGEMENE BOSBOUW - Van boom tot stroom
Description: Een hart voor hout. Van boom tot stroom! Als het met hout te maken heeft is Vandervelden in de buurt. Als erkend bosexploitant, groenvoorzieningen en cultuurtechnische werken hebben wij opdrachtgevers in alle segmenten van de sector: natuurinstanties, Federale en Lokale overheden, collega's,...

Name: Skov-Link
Description:
Skov-Link blev stiftet den 1. april 1991 med det formål at være handelsvirksomhed med udgangspunkt i dansk råtræ og danske industrier. Vores hovedformål er at sikre en optimal aptering og afsætning af vores danske nåletræ til glæde for både kunder og leverandører.

Siden den 15. marts 2022 har Skov-Link været en del af Atlas Timber & Hardwood Gruppen.

Skov-Link ønsker et tæt samarbejde med alle led i vores branche. Vi tilstræber en god dialog med industrierne, vognmændene, skovejerne, forvalterne, entreprenørerne og vores omverden.

Vi arbejder for, at dansk råtræ har en stor rolle at spille i fremtidens forsyning.
Sporbarhed og gennemsigtighed er indarbejdet i vores faste processer.

Name: Fall River Logging
Description:
Fall River Logging, a Meraki Company, found its roots in Courtenay BC in 2010. From day one, they dedicated themselves to refining their coastal harvesting and road construction expertise, setting the stage for their ongoing success.

Central to their achievements is the formation of a dedicated team of high-performing individuals who share their core values. Today, Fall River Logging continues to thrive, expanding its service offerings while remaining firmly rooted in strong family values and employee well-being.

Above all, safety is their top priority. Fall River Logging maintains strict adherence to the highest standards in secure logging and construction practices, ensuring the well-being and sustainability of the communities they serve.

Reliability, commitment, and professionalism are the hallmarks of Fall River Logging, making them the trusted partner for projects of all sizes.

Name: Holzmühle Westerkamp GmbH
Description:
Das international tätige Unternehmen Holzmühle Westerkamp GmbH ist fest im Oldenburger Münsterland verankert. Seit hier vor über einem Jahrhundert die erste Mühle, noch als Getreidemühle, entstand, hat sich viel bewegt. Heute sind unsere innovativen Produkten wie Holzmehl, Holzfasern und Holzgranulate und Rezepturen in der Holzmehlverarbeitung in der ganzen Welt gefragt und wir sind ein moderner Industriebetrieb, der mit viel Know- How und modernen Anlagen, vielfältige Basisprodukte für die Weiterverarbeitung zu hochwertigen Qualitätsprodukten anbietet.
Daher lautet unser Leitspruch: „Produkte von Westerkamp – Von Norddöllen in die ganze Welt!“ Die Produktpalette reicht von Holzmehl für die Glukose-, Stärke-, Wasser- und Fettfiltration bis hin zu Holzfasern für die Herstellung von Biokunststoffen, Faserverbundstoffen und WPC. Außerdem werden die Holzfasern in ökologischen Reinigungsprodukten, der Herstellung von Bodenbelägen und für Angelbedarf eingesetzt.
Eine Besonderheit ist die patentierte Aufbereitung des Holzmehles zu Lignocellulose. Hieraus entstehen Einzelfuttermittel, Mischfuttermittel oder Vormischungen in der Tierernährung. Eine Einstreu für Nutztiere ergänzt diese Produktlinie, die durch unseren Vertriebspartner AGROMED AUSTRIA GMBH exklusiv vermarktet wird. 
Die hohen Qualitätsansprüche an die Rohwarenbeschaffung und den Herstellungsprozess sowie der effiziente Umgang mit den Ressourcen stehen im Vordergrund unserer Arbeit. Die Einhaltung der Kundenvorgaben durch zufriedene, gut qualifizierte Mitarbeiter mit hohem Verantwortungsbewusstsein für die hergestellten Produkte hat oberste Priorität. Wir sind offen für neue Projekte, Produkte, Prozesse und Wege, das zeichnet uns aus. Denn nur wer nicht stehen bleibt, schafft Raum für neue Ideen und entwickelt sich weiter.

Name: Ekos Forestal
Description:
Más de 20 años creando un futuro verde para Paraguay.

Desde nuestras operaciones en todo el país, combinamos tecnología avanzada e innovación con experiencia para gestionar proyectos forestales que regeneran la naturaleza, crean empleos y promueven un desarrollo sostenible para el Paraguay.

Iniciamos nuestras actividades en 1994 y desde entonces hemos trabajado con objetivos claros y alcanzables, respaldados por una estructura organizativa sólida que prioriza la capacitación continua de nuestro equipo de expertos en el sector forestal. Nuestras actividades de abastecimiento de madera no solo generan valor, sino que también optimizan el ciclo de manejo forestal, abarcando todas las etapas del proceso: desde la planificación, implantación y mantenimiento silvícola, hasta la cosecha, logística y comercialización.

Desarrollamos nuestras operaciones siguiendo las mejores prácticas del sector, con actividades forestales certificadas por el Forest Stewardship Council (FSC), lo que refleja nuestro compromiso con una gestión forestal sostenible y responsable.
En Ekos Forestal, hemos plantado más de 20.000 hectáreas de eucalipto en Paraguay y somos pioneros en mecanización operativa, liderando la innovación en el país para la producción de productos y subproductos forestales destinados tanto a fines maderables como energéticos.

Nuestro compromiso con la calidad, la sustentabilidad, la innovación y la seguridad se refleja en nuestra infraestructura avanzada, que incluye maquinaria forestal de última generación. Además, contamos con un equipo altamente capacitado de operadores, ingenieros y especialistas, quienes lideran nuestras operaciones de manera eficiente, responsable y segura.

PYMEMAD NACIONAL A.G.
Description:
PymeMad Nacional A.G. es una Asociación gremial sin fines de lucro, creada en el mes de agosto de 2009. Nace por la poca representación de las Pymes del sector forestal y para promover el desarrollo y fomento del sector como palanca fundamental para el desarrollo del país.

PymeMad, es creada para ser la vocera natural de la problemática de sus empresas asociadas, ya que ellas son un pilar fundamental en el desarrollo y crecimiento del país, aportando con trabajo y estabilidad a miles de familias chilenas.

Para esto, contribuye en la generación de políticas públicas, representando a sus asociados ante cualquier entidad pública o privada y dando a conocer la existencia del “otro sector forestal”, el cual está inserto en los territorios, contribuyendo al desarrollo social, económico y medio ambiental.

Hoy nos encontramos en un interesante punto, donde los actores se han dado cuenta de la importancia del trabajo colaborativo para enfrentar los grandes desafíos del sector forestal. En este sentido, PymeMad está orientado al desarrollo y fomento de las actividades que le son comunes para fortalecer su desarrollo y potenciar su crecimiento.

Name: Association AIF
Description:
L’association vise à promouvoir l’échange entre les membres de la communauté forestière francophone partout dans le monde, ainsi qu’à soutenir, développer et transmettre un esprit forestier. Il n’y a pas de limites sur la formation ou la compétence, le lien entre les membres se retrouve dans le terme de « forestier » !

Tous les membres des services travaillent bénévolement. Nous sommes convaincus qu’un fonctionnement basé sur la confiance et la solidarité est le plus adapté. Chaque forestier qui décide d’adhérer peut choisir librement le montant de sa cotisation à l’association en fonction de ses possibilités et de la valeur qu’il accorde aux services rendus par l’association.

Nous vous offrons l’accès à des offres d’emplois et de stages, nous organisons des évènements et partageons les actualités et nous vous permettons d’interagir grâce à un annuaire interactif et à un forum.

L’association vit grâce à ses membres et non l’inverse. Ils sont le poumon de l’association et en entretiennent le dynamisme. Ce sont les membres qui proposent et organisent les évènements. Vous avez une idée, une envie ? Lancez-vous, nous vous soutiendrons !

Name: Waldaffe
Description:
Wir bei Waldaffe sind überzeugt, dass die Zukunft darin liegt, bestehende Ressourcen neu zu denken. Was für viele nur Abfall oder Nebenprodukt ist, ist für uns der Ausgangspunkt für Innovation. Wir verwandeln Roh- und Reststoff aus der Land- und Forstwirtschaft in nachhaltige Produkte, die nicht nur leichter und effizienter sind, sondern auch Transportwege, CO₂-Ausstoß und Plastikmüll reduzieren.

Doch unsere Mission geht über Technik hinaus. Wir wollen zeigen, dass sich Wirtschaftlichkeit und Umweltschutz nicht ausschließen müssen – im Gegenteil: In der Verbindung von Kreislaufwirtschaft, moderner Technologie und mutigem Unternehmertum entsteht echte Wertschöpfung. Mit unseren Substratpellets, der Veredelung von Hackgut und der Entwicklung neuer Baustoffe schaffen wir Lösungen, die Märkte verändern können.

Unser Antrieb ist es, einen Beitrag zu leisten – für Gartenbau ohne Torf, für Städte, die grüner gebaut werden, und für eine Gesellschaft, die verantwortungsvoll mit ihren Ressourcen umgeht. Waldaffe versteht sich dabei als Impulsgeber: Wir suchen bewusst die Zusammenarbeit mit Partnern, die wie wir bereit sind, Neues zu wagen und nachhaltige Innovationen groß zu machen.

Name: Forest'InnLab
Description:
Le Forest’InnLab est un laboratoire collaboratif pour créer, expérimenter et déployer des solutions innovantes pour répondre aux enjeux forestiers. AgroParisTech, l’INRAE (UMR SILVA) et l’Université de Lorraine (ENSGSI/ERPI) ont créé le Forest’InnLab en 2020. Ses missions visent à contribuer à répondre à 4 grands enjeux: 
•	Faire dialoguer pour permettre différents usages de la forêt. 
•	Accompagner les professionnels forestiers dans ces évolutions. 
•	Aider les territoires forestiers à faire face aux défis économiques, environnementaux et sociaux. 
•	Co-construire des solutions pour adapter la forêt aux changements climatiques. 
Le Forest’InnLab s'inscrit dans les paradigmes living lab (conception centrée utilisateur) et open innovation avec les acteurs de la quadruple helix (gouvernement, société civile, industrie, académique).

One of the ways to demonstrate that wood comes from sustainably managed forests is through certificates. FSC ensures that forests are properly and sustainably managed.

For information or inquiries please contact us at info@unilogs-europe.com

Name: Eye On The Rainforest
Description:
Established in 1983, Las Casas de la Selva is the home of Tropic Ventures Sustainable Forestry & Rainforest Enrichment Project, located in the southern mountains adjacent to the Carite State Forest, in the municipality of Patillas, on the island of Puerto Rico in the Caribbean.

The aim of the project is to research and demonstrate the economic use of rainforest land using methods that do not destroy the rainforest ecology. Members of The Institute of Ecotechnics initiated this unique project pioneering experiments in sustainable rainforest ecology, through line-planting of valuable timber trees. Nearly 300 acres of the 1000-acre property have been planted with over 40,000 native and exotic hardwood trees with extremely promising results. Since 2003, plantation areas have been experimentally thinned, timber sold, and scientific research carried out all over the land.

700 acres remains as a wilderness preserve for watershed protection, research, and educational ecotourism. The project is certified as a Stewardship Forest, has an approved ‘Sustainable Forestry Stewardship Management Plan’, and is registered as an Auxiliary Forest.

‘Ready, willing and able’ apprentices from all over the world have worked and lived here. Our motto is “learning by doing”. Tropic Ventures Research & Education Foundation was incorporated in 1998 as a non-profit in Puerto Rico to support the project’s research and education activities. The Earthwatch Institute has been a key collaborator in assisting in the scientific mission.

Para esto se implementa un Sistema de Gestión orientado a los siguientes puntos:

1. Cumplir con la legislación vigente y otros compromisos adquiridos voluntariamente en temas de Seguridad y Salud Ocupacional.

2. Establecer dentro de la organización una cultura preventiva y exigir una conducta responsable y proactiva en materias de Seguridad y Salud Ocupacional de tal forma de reducir en forma continua y progresiva los riesgos de la operación. ‘

3. Prevenir los Incidentes y Enfermedades Profesionales en todos sus Procesos y Actividades esto identificando evaluando y controlando los factores de riesgos que conllevan a esto.

4. Difundir esta política dentro del personal de Petrohué Ltda. y capacitar en forma permanente a todos sus integrantes para poder cumplir nuestros objetivos.

5. Implementar esta Política a través de un sistema de Gestión. Nuestro personal y la Gerencia se comprometen a implementar esta política bajo el concepto de EXCELENCIA OPERACIONAL
