Name: Skov-Natur-Landskab ApS
Description:
Skov – Natur – Landskab ApS, blev etableret i 2009. Hovedformålet er at rådgive ejere af skov og naturarealer om driften af disse. Rådgivningen vil have udgangspunkt i den enkelte ejers formål for arealerne. Det kan være arealets fremtidige udseende, træartsvalg, hensynet til vildt og natur, eller optimering af økonomisk udbytte.

Rådgiverne er uddannede inden for feltet og har en bred erfaring. Se mere herunder:

Rådgiverne
Skovfoged Jørgen Langdahl Olesen, der siden 1984 har arbejdet i dansk skovbrug, både for godser og rådgivningsfirmaer og har dermed en solid basis for, at yde kompetent rådgivning.

Skovfoged Thøger Glinvad Hansen, der siden 2013 har arbejdet i dansk skovbrug, blandt andet som afdelingsleder, og har dermed opbygget en viden indenfor skov og natur, der giver en solid base for kompetent rådgivning.

Skovfoged Lasse Steen Bach, der siden 2024 har arbejdet i dansk skovbrug, og har en bred viden på alle aspekter inden for skovbrug og har stort fokus på den enkelte kundens behov og ønsker.

Firmaet ønsker at opfattes som ejerens forlængede arm, hvorfor der lægges vægt på troværdighed og gennemskuelighed.

“Uafhængig skovbrugsrådgivning”

Name: VIDA SERVICIOS FORESTALES
Description:
Somos una empresa joven que se dedica a los inventarios forestales, estamos comprometidos con la excelencia en cada uno de nuestros trabajos. Buscamos mantener altos estándares de calidad y nos esforzamos por mejorar continuamente.

Name: Benevides Madeiras
Description:
Benevides Madeiras: Sustentabilidade e Inovação na Amazônia

Benevides Madeiras é uma referência em manejo florestal sustentável na Amazônia, unindo rentabilidade e responsabilidade ambiental. Nosso foco é preservar a matéria-prima para futuras gerações através de práticas ecologicamente corretas, economicamente viáveis e socialmente justas.

Destaques da Empresa:

	1.	Sustentabilidade:
	•	Operamos com práticas que garantem a regeneração das florestas.
	•	Utilizamos somente matéria-prima legal, protegendo o ecossistema.
	2.	Eficiência e Expansão:
	•	Capacidade atual de extrair 120 mil metros cúbicos de madeira por ano, com planos de expansão para 240 mil metros cúbicos.
	•	Estrutura robusta com transporte fluvial próprio, linhas de produção modernas e proximidade estratégica com o Porto Vila do Conde.
	3.	Impacto Social:
	•	Parcerias com comunidades locais, beneficiando mais de 1.500 famílias através do Projeto Aflora.
	•	Investimentos em infraestrutura comunitária, incluindo estradas, água encanada, escolas e postos de saúde.

Inovação e Pesquisa:

	•	Investimento em usinas de energia solar e biomassa, reduzindo custos e aumentando a eficiência energética.
	•	Parcerias com universidades para pesquisas ecológicas, contribuindo para a preservação da biodiversidade.

Name: BALTU KOKS
Description:
Mēs zinām kā no mazas sēklas izaug stalti koki. Kā mežs plešas, un kad pienācis īstais laiks to cirst. Kā pareizi izstrādāt mežu, lai dabai nenodarītu postījumus, un ko iesākt ar kokmateriāliem, lai vairotu jūsu labklājību.
Mēs, “BALTU KOKS”, saprotam meža spēku un koka vērtību. Apzināmies, cik vērts ir katrs gredzens koka stumbrā. Tāpēc maksāsim par jūsu mežu pašu augstāko cenu, padarot to par jūsu kapitālu. Vai arī palīdzēsim jums vairot tā vērtību, ļaujot pelnīt jūsu bērniem, jūsu nākotnei.

Mežkopības nozarē mēs darbojamies kopš 2005. gada,  mēs piedāvājam visus ar meža apsaimniekošanu un izstrādi saistītos pakalpojumus visā Baltijā. 
Mēs cienām tradīcijas un zinām seno baltu zīmju spēku. Skuja no jūsu meža var kļūt par jūsu Laimas slotiņu, kas atnesīs laimi un izdošanos. Ļaujiet mums par to parūpēties!

TAVA MEŽA SPĒKS. LAI AUG!

Name: OTMETKA
Description:
OTMETKA develops technology to digitize the timber flow directly during felling for the world's forestry. The method is based on a special tool stamping a code that can be set in endless series of numbers and stamped on each log. 

The code is unique and also encrypted, which means that all production data can be stored directly during felling linked to the right log. The method, which is specially developed for felling in mechanized forestry, is also completely unique and has been developed by forestry professionals over several years. Many advantages are achieved, for example:

•	The timber industry can plan its timber production better.
•	Traceability, which is becoming an increasingly pronounced certification requirement, can be done completely automatically. GPS technology makes the log automatically trackable.
•	Digitization can be introduced at log level directly during felling. All incoming data can be connected in a single flow of digital information.
•	All production data can be effectively uploaded to a cloud service. Data is protected by encryption technology. 

Since its inception in 2005, OTMETKA has signed 55 patents in the world's largest and most forested countries. Several new patents are pending.

Name: Associació Dones de Bosc
Description:
Dones de Bosc és la primera associació de propietàries forestals del sud d’Europa, creada amb l’objectiu de donar veu a les dones en la gestió forestal i impulsar una gestió activa i sostenible dels nostres boscos. Som un grup de dones compromeses a trencar el sostre de vidre i promoure la presència femenina en els llocs de decisió dins del sector forestal.
A través de la nostra tasca, volem visibilitzar el paper de les dones com a agents de canvi en el món rural i forestal, oferir formació, fomentar la creació de referents i establir xarxes de col·laboració entre les propietàries forestals. El nostre propòsit és sumar esforços per incrementar la gestió forestal sostenible i contribuir a la conservació dels boscos, un dels recursos més valuosos per a la lluita contra el canvi climàtic.
Amb 18 sòcies fundadores, Dones de Bosc està en creixement i busca nous membres compromesos amb la gestió forestal responsable. Ens centrem en la cooperació i la creació de sinergies per augmentar la gestió forestal i protegir els nostres ecosistemes davant els desafiaments actuals, com els incendis forestals.

𝗢𝘂𝗿 𝗖𝗼𝗿𝗲 𝗔𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘀 𝗼𝗳 𝗙𝗼𝗰𝘂𝘀:

Name: Chambre des Bois de l'Ouest Vaudois
EO4SDG Forest
Description:
The Sustainable Development Goals are meant to assist countries to manage and monitor progress on the components of sustainable development: economic growth, social inclusion and environmental sustainability. The aim is to integrate the principles of sustainable development into national policies and processes.
The 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development clearly stressed the importance of Geospatial Information and Earth Observation for achieving the SDG Targets and reporting on the SDG Indicators.
Within this context, ESA’s FutureEO-1 program, the EO4Society programmatic element and its activities related to “EO for Sustainable Development Goals” (including SDG EO Pathfinders) focuses on the development of innovative and robust EO methods to monitor progress against SDG targets and report on indicators and addressing new areas of EO uptake in SDG methodologies. 
In partnership with the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO), the custodian agency of SDG indicator 15.2.1, EO for Sustainable Forest Management develops and showcases innovative EO approaches for the production of indicators on the sustainable management of natural, semi-natural and planted forests, addressing the changes in forest extent and conditions for use in national and global forest assessment.

Im Verband organisiert sind die Waldbauern mit Kleinprivatwäldern, die mit ca. 16 Tsd. Mitgliedern in den 25 Waldbauvereinen zusammengeschlossen sind. Hinzu kommen die Eigentümer größerer Privatwälder und 400 waldbesitzende Gemeinden im ländlichen Raum sowie schließlich einige großstädtische Forstbetriebe. Sie alle bewirtschaften ihre Wälder eigenverantwortlich, im Sinne einer nach den Waldgesetzen ordnungsgemäßen Forstwirtschaft, auf eigene Rechnung. Oberste Prinzipien sind die gesetzlich garantierte Nachhaltigkeit und der Walderhalt, sowie der Generationenvertrag und die Verantwortung für den eigenen Waldbesitz.

Name: Cooperatie De Groene Kolenboer U.A.
Description:
Wie kent nog de kolenboer? Lange tijd was het heel gewoon dat kolen aan de deur werden afgeleverd om huizen te verwarmen. Niet duurzaam, wel warm. De Groene Kolenboer is ontstaan met een knipoog naar dit verleden. De Groene Kolenboer biedt warmte in de vorm van pelletkorrels gemaakt van landschapshout. 

Nu en in de toekomst komt landschapshout vrij waar nu nog geen duurzame bestemming voor is. De Groene Kolenboer gaat er voor zorgen dat het landschapshout weer lokaal en duurzaam kan worden ingezet. Simpel gezegd draag je door het stoken met een pelletkachel straks op duurzame wijze bij aan de instandhouding en verbetering van het landschap.

De Groene Kolenboer is een coöperatie en staat garant voor het duurzaam verzamelen en transporteren van landschapshout naar een Pelletfabriek, maar neemt ook de verkoop van pellets en plaatsing, beheer en onderhoud van pelletkachels voor zijn rekening.

Name: Foire des Produits Forestiers Non-Ligneux - Tchad
Description:
La Foire des Produits Forestiers Non Ligneux (PFNL) est un événement majeur dédié à la promotion, la valorisation et la mise en réseau des acteurs du secteur des produits forestiers non ligneux au Tchad.

Organisée sous le Haut Patronage du Ministère de l’Environnement, de la Pêche et du Développement Durable, en collaboration avec le Ministère du Commerce et de l’Industrie et le Projet de valorisation des Produits Forestiers Non Ligneux (PFNL), cette première édition se tiendra du 20 au 24 février 2025 au Palais des Arts et de la Culture, à N’Djamena.

Cet événement unique réunira des producteurs, coopératives, entreprises, investisseurs, décideurs politiques et organisations techniques pour créer une plateforme d’échange et de collaboration. À travers des expositions, des ateliers pratiques, des panels thématiques et des rencontres B2B, la foire mettra en lumière l’importance des PFNL pour l’économie locale, la sécurité alimentaire et la biodiversité.

L’édition 2025 vise à valoriser les richesses naturelles du Tchad, à renforcer les capacités des acteurs du secteur et à faciliter des partenariats stratégiques pour un développement durable.

UNTERSTÜTZUNG

BÜRGERRECHT
Der BWSO trägt aktiv bei zur Entwicklung einer Gesellschaft mit lebendigen, erneuerungsfähigen Gemeinwesen. Er fördert die Zusammenarbeit zwischen den Bürgergemeinden. Er übernimmt eine führende Rolle im Bürgerrechtswesen und in der Gestaltung einer gerechten und offenen Einbürgerungspolitik.

NACHHALTIGKEIT
Der BWSO setzt sich aktiv ein für eine nachhaltige Nutzung der Vermögenswerte seiner Mitglieder, für die Erhaltung von regionalen und lokalen Kultur- und Naturgütern und für die Wahrung von Traditionen.

ÖFFENTLICHKEITSARBEIT
Der BWSO informiert die Bevölkerung aktiv, um die Bedeutung und die Leistungen der Bürgergemeinden und der Waldeigentümer für das öffentliche Wohl bekannter zu machen. Zur Erreichung seiner Ziele nutzt er aktiv seine vielseitigen Kontakte zu Partnerverbänden, Behörden und politischen Interessengruppen.

Lawinds is a professional tree and land management specialist operating across the UK and Ireland, delivering arboricultural, vegetation management, and full site services to commercial, domestic, infrastructure, and renewable energy clients.

In the UK, we deliver commercial and domestic tree and land management services across a wide range of environments. Our work includes arboricultural surveying and reporting, tree pruning and removal, hedge management, tree planting, site clearance, commercial-scale grass cutting, and planned maintenance programmes. We support residential properties, commercial estates, development land, and operational sites, delivering structured, safety-led works with a strong focus on quality, compliance, and site presentation.

Our teams are experienced in working within live environments, managing access, public interfaces, and operational constraints. All works are carefully planned and delivered to protect surrounding assets, maintain safety standards, and minimise disruption.

For the solar sector, Lawinds delivers full Solar O&M services for operational solar assets across the UK. This includes vegetation and land management, access and perimeter maintenance, surveying, drone mapping, and reactive works to support safety, compliance, and asset performance. Our directors and senior leadership team bring many years of experience delivering commercial and utility-scale solar projects, enabling us to manage sites holistically under a single, coordinated O&M framework.

In Ireland, Lawinds operates within the utilities sector, delivering structured, compliance-driven vegetation management and line-clearance works in support of critical infrastructure.

At Lawinds, we pride ourselves on being reactive, reliable, and reasonable, providing clear communication, consistent delivery, and professional results across all sectors.

Name: Errez Koop. Elk. Txikia
Description:
Gu, Errez Koop. Elk. Txikia gara. 2018. urtearen hasieran sortu zen ingurumen proiektu bat. Ekimen honek, Euskal Herrian basogintzak, eta oro har ingurugiroak, bizi duen egoerari irtenbide ezberdin bat ematea du helburu. 

Basoek, klimak, bioaniztasun galerak eta espezie exotiko inbaditzaileek arduratzen gaituzte batez ere, baina gizarteak ere bai. Eta, guk, ingurumenaren kudeaketa egin dugu gure ogibide.

Errez hitzak esan nahi hirukoitza du euskaraz. Lehenik, erraztasunez egiten denari esaten zaio, eta gu, aurkezten zaizkigun arazo edo planteamendu ezberdinei erantzun errazak ematen saiatzen gara. Erretzearen ekintzari ere errez esaten zaio, eta guk kudeaketa eredu klasikoak alboratuz, ekologia aplikatuan oinarritutako eredu ezberdinak garatzen ditugu. 

Azkenik, “R” hizkiz osatzen denari ere, errez esaten zaio. Neurri handi baten R deituriko estatistika lenguaia eta programazio ingurunea erabiliz, datuen analisiari arreta berezia eskaintzen diogu. Horrela, software aske eta erreproduzibleen bitartez, ekologia aplikatuaren teknologiak ustartzen ditugu.

Notre vision est de contribuer à une filière bois moderne, transparente et compétitive, respectueuse des écosystèmes et porteuse de valeur pour les communautés, les entreprises et les investisseurs.

Notre mission est d'accompagner les acteurs forestiers – entreprises, administrations, communautés et bailleurs internationaux – dans la mise en œuvre de pratiques responsables, axées sur la traçabilité, la légalité, la certification, la numérisation des flux, et la transformation locale du bois.
Nos domaines d’expertise
a. Gestion forestière durable
Élaboration et mise en œuvre de plans d’aménagement.
Inventaires forestiers géoreferencés, cartographie et analyses SIG.
Optimisation de l’exploitation et réduction des impacts.

b. Conformité & réglementation

Élaboration de dossiers de traçabilité et systèmes de gestion du risque.
Accompagnement des entreprises à la certification FSC, PAFC, ISO.

c. Traçabilité du bois & digitalisation

Systèmes de traçabilité de l'arbre au port.
Numérisation des chaînes d’approvisionnement forestier.
Mise en place de tableaux de bord, SIG, et solutions de contrôle interne.

d. Ingénierie & transformation du bois

Valorisation des essences et sous-produits.
Appui technique sur les normes qualité.

e. Formations & renforcement des capacités

Formations techniques pour exploitants, contrôleurs, ouvriers forestiers et gestionnaires.

Name: Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) Bassin du Congo
Description:
Le Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) est une organisation mondiale à but non lucratif qui se consacre à la promotion d'une gestion des forêts du monde qui soit respectueuse de l'environnement, socialement bénéfique et économiquement prospère. En tant que solution de gestion forestière la plus fiable, le FSC a été créé en 1993 pour aider les consommateurs et les entreprises à identifier les produits issus de forêts bien gérées et fixe des normes de certification des forêts, offrant ainsi une vérification crédible aux personnes qui achètent du bois et des produits du bois.

Dans le Bassin du Congo, les sociétés d'exploitation forestière se sont rapidement intéressées à la certification FSC. Le problème de la déforestation et la question de la durabilité des sources d'approvisionnement sont apparus comme un enjeu majeur pour garantir l'accès des bois tropicaux africains aux marchés internationaux.

Le premier Bureau régional du FSC pour le Bassin du Congo est établi à Brazzaville depuis 2015, et dispose d'un accord de siège avec le gouvernement de la République du Congo. Ce Bureau régional du Bassin du Congo, qui dépend directement du Programme régional du FSC pour l'Afrique dont le siège est à Nairobi, a jusqu'à présent servi de base d'opérations pour le FSC dans les autres pays du Bassin du Congo.

Le FSC a pour objectif d'ouvrir un deuxième bureau régional au Gabon suite à la signature d'un protocole d'accord avec le Ministère des Eaux et Forêts, de la Mer, de l'Environnement en charge du Plan Climat et du Plan d’affectation des terres.   (MINEF).

Créée en 2010, l’entreprise JC Lejeune n’a eu de cesse de se développer pour offrir aux sylviculteurs des services complets, de l’exploitation à la livraison du bois.

Le Groupe est l’interface entre la forêt et l’industrie du bois.

Aujourd’hui il représente une quarantaine de collaborateurs.

Des spécialistes de l’exploitation forestière toutes essences (résineux et feuillus), des chauffeurs d’engins forestiers et une flotte d’engins spécialisés dans les travaux forestiers (abatteuses, débardeuses, porteurs, skidders, déchiqueteuse, porte-engins et des véhicules écoles) et des chauffeurs de camions remorques de transport de bois (camions en fond mouvant, camion bois rond avec grue et plateau).

Nos équipes dynamiques sont des acteurs incontournables de la récolte forestière et de l’approvisionnement des industries locales. 

Le Groupe Forestier Lejeune est innovant, réactif, répond aux attentes de ses clients en fournissant un travail de qualité, soucieux de respecter l’environnement.

Name: Society of Irish Foresters
Description:
The Society of Irish Foresters is an all-island organisation which was founded in September 1942.  Its main aims are to spread knowledge of forestry and to improve professional standards in the Irish forestry industry.  
To that end the Society publishes an annual scientific journal and a twice yearly newsletter, organises four field days, two public lectures, conferences and an international study tour each year.

The Society regularly makes submissions to government on policy initiatives which are likely to impact on the forestry industry and it is represented on several interdepartmental working parties.  Our Continuous Professional Development (CDP) programme provides an opportunity for members to engage in the lifelong acquisition of knowledge and skills.

The Society currently has almost 700 members, most of whom are professional foresters who work across the whole spectrum of Ireland’s forest industry.  There are five categories of membership: Technical, Retired Technical, Associate, Student and Honorary.

Name: Council of Western State Foresters
Description:
The Council of Western State Foresters (CWSF) is a nonpartisan, nonprofit membership organization comprised of 17 western State Foresters and six U.S.-Affiliated Pacific Island Foresters.

CWSF promotes the conservation, protection, and sustainable management of forests for today and generations to come by leading collective action, fostering learning, facilitating resource sharing, providing credible expertise and information, carrying out outreach and advocacy, and engaging with partners.

Name: Aratu Forests Limited
Description:
Aratu Forests Limited is a high-quality forestry estate and asset management business based in the Gisborne District of New Zealand’s North Island. We are committed to providing responsible, effective and efficient forest management solutions.
We seek to ensure our social, cultural, environmental and economic practices deliver long term, sustainable outcomes.
Respect, integrity and trust are at the heart of Aratu Forests Limited’s business philosophy.
We are proud to operate with the principles of active, honest and transparent engagement, and are committed to seeking excellence through ongoing improvement.
Aratu Forests Limited is one of the largest forestry estates in the Gisborne District of New Zealand’s North Island and a significant contributor to the regional economy. We manage around 27,000 hectares of radiata pine plantation on 35,000 hectares of freehold, forest rights and leasehold land.
Aratu is a combination of two Māori words, ‘ara’ which means path and ‘tu’ which means to stand. The name captures our business’ intention and values.
• We are on a path (ara) to actively pursue improvement and manage for the long term.
• We stand (tu) to protect and invest in our people and act in an open and honest manner.
Our name shows our respect for the traditional owners of the land on which the business operates and the personal and professional ties our staff and contractors have to the Māori community.
Aratu Forests Limited is owned by New Forests (https://www.linkedin.com/company/new-forests), an Australian-based, international and sustainable forestry investment manager, on behalf of its institutional investment clients.

Name: Forestry, Rail & Civils Ltd
Description:
Forestry, Rail & Civils Ltd was founded in September 2021, bringing together a team with over 100 years of combined expertise in vegetation management. Our commitment to safety and customer satisfaction drives everything we do.

At FRC, we specialise in delivering complex vegetation management solutions across various sectors, including Railways, Highways, Powerlines, Major Projects, and Site Clearances. Our in-house team is highly skilled in Forestry and Tree Surgery, with a proven track record of exceptional results achieved within tight timeframes.

Our services include (but are not limited to):

- Emergency response for storm-damaged trees, landslips, and other geotechnical challenges
- Railway vegetation clearance and safety-critical operations (including Engineering Supervisor, Controller of Site Safety, Strapping, Testing, and Switching)
- ISO Level 3 Rope Access (Supervisory Competencies)
- Comprehensive tree surgery, including elevated working and rigging
- PA6 Herbicide Spraying

We are proud to hold several industry-specific accreditations, including:

RISQS
CIRAS Membership
Alcumus Safe Contractor
Constructionline Gold

Additionally, we are a member of the Lighthouse Charity, supporting the emotional, physical, and financial wellbeing of those working within the construction industry.

We are always ready to deliver outstanding results with a focus on safety, professionalism, and customer satisfaction. Let's connect and explore how we can collaborate.

Name: Stein Lumber Corp
Description:
Stein Lumber Corp was founded in 2022 with the goal to connect both local and global markets with the unique fiber supply that British Columbia has to offer. Whether you look at the majestic trees in the coastal rainforests or the vast stretches of the Interior woodlands enduring hot summers and freezing winters: BC’s forests produce some of the world’s most outstanding softwood qualities. 

Our purchase of a remanufacturing plant in 2025 reflects our ever-growing commitment to deliver our customers at home and abroad exactly the products they need. Strategically located in the heart of interior BC and surrounded by rich species such as Douglas fir, Western larch, and Western red cedar, our facility positions us at the source of premium raw material.

Our meticulous grading process ensures the production of high-quality lumber, delivering consistent value across the lumber industry. No matter if you're seeking specialty cuts, custom solutions, or simply top-tier softwood, our team of dedicated lumber professionals is here to deliver. We see every customer relationship as a long-term partnership, built on trust, reliability, and a shared respect for the incredible natural resource we all work with. 

At Stein Lumber, we understand that our success is tied to the success of our partners, so we invest the time to listen, adapt, and deliver with integrity. Whether you're sourcing for a single project or building a global supply chain, we approach every collaboration with care and accountability. Guided by a deep appreciation for the forests we rely on, we’re committed to doing business the right way: sustainably, transparently, and with the long view in mind.

Name: Koalicja na Rzecz Polskiego Drewna
Description:
Koalicja na Rzecz Polskiego Drewna to oddolna inicjatywa przedsiębiorców i organizacji, które reprezentują przemysł meblarski, tartaczny, płytowy i papierniczy. Jej celem jest ochrona i wspieranie rozwoju polskiego przemysłu drzewnego, zrównoważonej gospodarki leśnej i promowanie drewna jako ekologicznego surowca.
Koalicja na Rzecz Polskiego Drewna nie jest organizacją, ale rodzajem porozumienia o charakterze otwartym – może do niej przystąpić każdy podmiot, którego cele są zbieżne z misją KnRPD. 

Nasze priorytety to:
•	Zapewnienie dostępności do surowca drzewnego dla polskiego przemysłu.
•	Ograniczenie eksportu i spalania drewna.
•	Promowanie zrównoważonej gospodarki leśnej i kaskadowego zużycia drewna.
•	Budowanie świadomości społecznej znaczenia drewna jako surowca ekologicznego, odnawialnego i przyjaznego dla środowiska.

Koordynatorem działań Koalicji na Rzecz Polskiego Drewna i jej Członkiem jest Ogólnopolska Izba Gospodarcza Producentów Mebli. Wśród podmiotów, które przystąpiły do porozumienia, są także, między innymi: Stowarzyszenie Producentów Płyt Drewnopochodnych w Polsce, a także firmy reprezentujące sektor papierniczy i tartaczny.

Name: Zollikofer Group
Description:
Zollikofer is your reliable and sustainable source for all aspects of processing, recycling, storage and transportation of by-products from wood based material industries. With our headquarter in Bad Wurzach and 6 other locations all over Germany, we can react quickly and smoothly manage all of your supply-chain requirements from short term to long term basis.

We have a wide range of wood products (wood chips, wood shavings, sawmill residues, barks etc.) for further processing in the wood based material industries and provide services related to wood recycling, storage and transport of various sortiments of reycling woods. Our long history and market presence have also made us more competitive and innovative, and we are committed to supply the growing wood energy market with our quality products on a just-in-time basis. 

Zollikofer is being a part of Koehler Renewable Energy Group and has the vision and commitment to promote more sustainable resources for the renewable energy market.

We stand for best quality, highest reliability and reasonable prices.

ZOLLIKOFER - IDEAS, WOOD, ENERGY

https://www.koehlerrenewableenergy.com

Name: Luchtenberg Meesters in bomen
Description:
Ik ben Ruben Luchtenberg. Als kleine jongen was ik altijd buiten en maakte ik de mooiste (boom)hutten. Die liefde voor natuur en bomen zit er nog altijd in. Waarom? Omdat bomen gewoon gaaf zijn. Ze geven karakter aan een tuin, dragen bij aan de luchtkwaliteit en zijn ook nog eens super uitdagend om mee te werken. Een plantje dat het niet goed doet vervangt u gewoon, een boom niet. Snoeit u verkeerd of haalt u wortels op een onhandige manier weg? Dan kan de boom daar na jaren last van krijgen.

 

Werken met bomen is dus vooral een kwestie van vooruitkijken en geduld hebben. Wat is er nodig om ervoor te zorgen dat de boom het goed blijft doen? Nu én in de toekomst. Samen met een vast team en een aantal vaste zzp'ers sta we voor u klaar!

Name: IMFOREST
Description:
Proyecto que contribuye a la promoción de la bioeconomía forestal, la transición ecológica y al reto demográfico a través del desarrollo, la innovación y la gestión sostenible de los Productos Forestales No Madereros (PFNM): resina, corcho, plantas aromáticas y medicinales (PAM), piñón, setas, trufa, castaña y miel.

El proyecto identifica la potencialidad productiva del conjunto de bioproductos y servicios asociados a los PFNM, diseñando herramientas de gestión sostenible y realizando proyectos innovadores que hagan frente a las amenazas asociadas al cambio climático y al abandono rural.

Igualmente caracteriza las cadenas de valor de los PFNM identificando los obstáculos que impiden transformar el recurso en oportunidad, diseñando herramientas legales y de gobernanza para garantizar su aprovechamiento sostenible y la generación de valor asociado y, de esta forma, transformar los activos que suponen los PFNM en realidades que generen empleo verde resiliente, promuevan el tejido productivo y contribuyan a la lucha contra la despoblación.

Además, IMFOREST promueve el fortalecimiento de capacidades, fomentando la participación y la igualdad de género.

Financia @FBiodiversidad #ProyectosPRTR #NextGenerationEU

Name: waldwissen.net
Description: waldwissen.net ist die führende Informations- und Kommunikationsplattform für forstliche Fachleute und die am Wald interessierte Öffentlichkeit. Als Gemeinschaftsprojekt renommierter Forschungsinstitutionen stellt die Plattform qualitätsgesicherte Fachinformationen zu Wald, Mensch und Forstwirtschaft bereit. Sie vernetzt Forschung, Forstverwaltung und Praxis, bietet Zugang zu Experten und fördert den Austausch innerhalb der Branche. Unser Ziel: die zentrale Anlaufstelle für Forstpraktiker und alle Waldinteressierten zu sein.

Name: S.A.F Empreendimentos Florestais
Description: Atividades de apoio à produção florestal

Name: FIREPOCTEP+
Description:
FIREPOCTEP+ es un proyecto cofinanciado por Unión Europea a través de Fondo Europeo de Desarrollo Regional (FEDER) en el marco del Programa de Cooperación Transfronteriza Interreg VI-A España-Portugal 2021-2027 (POCTEP).

Tiene como objetivo fortalecer los sistemas de prevención y extinción de incendios forestales en la región transfronteriza entre España y Portugal conocida como La Raya.

Name: WSL - Sustainable Forestry
Description: The research group investigates how forest ecosystem services can be ensured through multifunctional forest management in the face of climate change and changing socio-economic demands. It develops decision-support tools for planners to promote biodiversity and forest performance. Additionally, it optimizes timber harvesting to make processes more environmentally friendly, safer, and economically sustainable. A key focus is on digitalization: using remote sensing data and AI-supported tools to enhance the forest wood value chain and support the sustainable use of our forests.

Name: North East Community Forest
Description: The community forest for Newcastle, Gateshead, North and South Tyneside, Sunderland and County Durham

Name: Georg Gunreben GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Traditionsreiches Familienunternehmen mit eigener Parkettproduktion, modernem Sägewerk und leistungsstarkem Holzgroßhandel. Spezialisiert auf hochwertige Produkte für Terrassenbau, Parkett, Landhausdielen, Schnittholz, Leimholzplatten, Holzbau und Gartenholz – seit 1895.
Ihr kompetenter Partner für nachhaltige Holzlösungen im In- und Ausland.

Name: Hyggligt
Description: Avverka din skog hyggesfritt med Hyggligt. En hållbar lösning för din ekonomi, skogen och planeten. Framtidens skogsbruk.

Name: Walden srl
Description:
Foreste, idee e comunità a forma di futuro.

Crediamo che il futuro dei nostri territori passi attraverso la diffusione di sistemi energetici rinnovabili, la migliore gestione delle risorse agroforestali e la valorizzazione delle filiere ad esse legate.

Le radici delle nostre attività sono rappresentate dal lavoro con le comunità locali, il ricorso a soluzioni innovative e l’attenzione verso la sostenibilità ambientale, economica, sociale e culturale.

Name: Refloresca
Description: Empresa peruana especializada en el desarrollo de plantaciones forestales comerciales y en la restauración de áreas degradadas, con presencia a nivel nacional. Ejecuta proyectos integrales junto a comunidades locales y empresas privadas, promoviendo buenas prácticas silvícolas, sostenibilidad ambiental y gestión forestal responsable, con un equipo técnico multidisciplinario y experiencia en proyectos de gran escala.

Name: Komatsu Forest UK Ltd
Description:
Komatsu Forest UK Ltd. is one of the world's leading forestry equipment manufacturers, offering its customers unique quality, peace of mind, knowledge and support.

Komatsu Forest has been part of Komatsu Group since 2004. However, the company has been synonymous with sustainable forestry innovations and solutions since 1961. As one of the world's leading manufacturers of forest machines, we operate in all important forestry markets worldwide. We are a partner you can trust, a partner who can offer you a complete range of machines, services, maintenance and spare parts for modern forestry.

Our joint commitment to improving the working day in the forest helps to create the solutions required to pursue sustainable forestry. Together, we create value not only for you but also for future generations.

Name: Roga Group
Description:
Founded in 1971 by Pat Young in Williams Lake with a single truck, today ROGA Contracting has evolved into the expansive ROGA Group. Now commanding a workforce of over 200 dedicated employees and a fleet exceeding 150 pieces of machinery, we proudly deliver a diverse array of services across numerous natural resource sectors.

Embedded in our DNA is a commitment to sustainable growth, steadfastly prioritizing safety and environmental stewardship. This principle guides our industry-leading production methods and practices, ensuring that our services are consistently delivered with utmost safety and cost-effectiveness.

Under the leadership of Troy Young since 2015, ROGA maintains its eminent position as a paramount contractor across natural resource industries. Our success blooms from robust collaborations with Indigenous communities, fostering long-term, impactful relationships. Our expansive portfolio includes critical projects such as TC Energy's Coastal GasLink Pipeline and BC Hydro's Telkwa Pass power line upgrade, reinforcing our industry credibility.

In essence, ROGA Group is not just a contractor; we are a dedicated partner championing reconciliation, certainty, and sustainability both in the boardroom and the field. We seamlessly blend economic value creation, career development, and capacity-building, solidifying our commitment to communities, crews, and partner Nations, making a meaningful difference one project at a time.

Name: North Karelia Finland BIOSYS Japan - Ecosystem for Forestbioeconomy & Unique Food
Description:
BIOSYS Ecosystem for International Growth and collaboration of North Karelia, Finland and Nagano, Ina and Hokkaido, Sapporo prefektures and cities. Accelerating collaboration on forestbioeconomy, forestmanagement, wood construction, forest technologies, digital and sustainable solutions and building new bridges for regions unique food producers. 

Funded by the EU’s Just Transition Fund and Powered by Natural Resources Institute Finland (Luke), Regional Council of North Karelia, University of Eastern Finland (UEF) and ProAgria Itä-Suomi ry/ Maa-ja kotitalousnaiset 

BIOSYS-Hankkeen tavoitteena on kasvattaa Pohjois-Karjalan alueen metsäbiotalouden sekä ruoantuotannon tutkimus-kehitys-innovaatio-koulutus-yhteistyötä, elinkeinojen elinvoimaisuutta sekä kansainvälisyyttä ja kilpailukykyä yhteistyössä Japanin alueiden (Nagano, Hokkaido) kanssa. Hanke ankkuroi muodostuvan Ekosysteemin aktiiviseksi ja molempiin suuntiin toimivaksi sillaksi ja verkostoksi sekä vahvistaa aikaisemmassa hankkeessa (Pohjois-Karjalan ja Japanin Naganon metsäbiotalousyhteistyön kehittäminen 2020–2022) rakennettua tiivistä yhteyttä Pohjois-Karjalan ja Japanin Naganon prefetuurihallinnon, Inan kaupungin sekä Hokkaidon ja Tokion alueen metsä-biokiertotalouden sekä elintarvikesektorin toimijoiden välillä.

Verkostoon ja sen tiedon virtaan ovat tervetulleita kaikki yhteistyöstä kiinnostuneet toimijat. 

Contact Information: 
Jutta Kauppi, Ecosystem Lead, jutta.kauppi@luke.fi

Name: RC Serviços Florestais
Description: Qualidade no Segmento Florestal | Desde 1994.

Name: FramTre
Description:
FramTre er et skogeiersamvirke, som tilbyr lønnsom tømmeravsetning og faglig gode skogtjenester til rundt 8700 medlemmer i Telemark, Agder, Rogaland og Vestland. Vi er en kompetansebedrift som jobber med et bærekraftig skogbruk i det grønne skiftet. FramTre er organisert som et konsern, der AT Skog SA er morselskap.

Konsernet har et bredt spekter av selskap i hele verdikjeden – fra sagbruk til ferdig trelast. Skogressursene representerer store muligheter i fremtidens fornybare samfunn. FramTre har ambisiøse mål og gode forutsetninger for å løfte skognæringens omfang og lønnsomhet, både for våre eiere og egen virksomhet.
Hovedkontoret er i Porsgrunn.

Name: Resineves Agronegócios
Description: Fazendo da terra um campo de oportunidades!

Name: Van Stipdonk Landschapsinrichting
Description:
Van Stipdonk Landschapsinrichting al 55 jaar uw partner op het gebied van natuurbeheer, cultuurtechniek én groenvoorziening.

Onze missie is helder: wij maken landschappen met passie, vakmanschap en maatwerk.

Van de eerste aanleg tot het onderhoud en de renovatie – wij regelen het.
Waar anderen eindigen, gaan wij door. De perfecte samenwerking tussen mens en machine maakt het verschil.

Onze Landschapsinrichters (ons team) en uniek machinepark zijn de sleutel tot uw én ons succes. Doordat we ons eigen uitgebreide machinepark onderhouden, optimaliseren, modificeren én de deskundigheid van onze mensen, springen wij maximaal in op de wensen van de klant en het project.


Hoe wij zijn:
Van Stipdonk Landschapsinrichting is een familiebedrijf waarbij we collegialiteit belangrijk vinden. We zijn een hecht team waar iedereen zichzelf kan zijn, waarbij de bereidheid is om van elkaar te leren en elkaar te helpen. We nemen allen onze eigen verantwoordelijkheid. Er wordt hard gewerkt, maar er is ook ruimte voor gezelligheid.

Gecertificeerd:
- ISO 9001
- VCA**
- BRL Groenvoorziening
- PSO trede 3
- CO2 prestatieladder niveau 5
- ErBo
- NTA8080 Biomassa

Van Stipdonk Landschapsinrichting is lid van de branchevereniging CUMELA.

Name: COMPANHIA SOUZA - SERVIÇOS FLORESTAIS E TRANSPORTES
Description:
Na Companhia Souza, atuamos nos setores de florestal, transporte, colheita, industrialização e florestamento, oferecendo soluções completas e de alta qualidade para nossos parceiros. Nosso compromisso vai além dos serviços: valorizamos as pessoas, a segurança, o meio ambiente e a confiança, pilares que sustentam nossa atuação e nos conectam ao progresso sustentável.

Combinamos tecnologia, experiência e empatia para entregar resultados que impactam positivamente nossos clientes e a sociedade.

Companhia Souza – Conectando pessoas, natureza e progresso com respeito e propósito.

Name: wood*versity
Description: Wood*versity ist ein Netzwerk in der DACH-Region. Wir machen die Beiträge und Erfolge von Frauen in der Forst- und Holzwirtschaft sichtbar, fördern den Austausch in einer inklusiven Gemeinschaft und unterstützen die persönliche wie berufliche Weiterentwicklung. Unsere Vision ist eine gleichberechtigte Branche, die gemeinsam eine nachhaltige Zukunft gestaltet.

Name: The Scottish Forestry Trust
Description: The Scottish Forestry Trust is a charitable Trust, a Scottish Charitable Incorporated Organisation (SCIO) registered in Scotland (Scottish Charity Number SC053147). The Trust’s purpose is to support forestry related education, training and research. From a research perspective the focus has been contributing to the scientific, technical and economic information required by forestry to enable it to develop its role in the countryside and in the UK economy.  “Forestry” is defined as the forestry industry as a whole to include the growing, marketing and processing of home-grown timber, and forestry’s contributions to people, landscape, biodiversity and the environment.

Name: SR Forestry
Description: SR Forestry is devoted to meeting the quickly developing wood needs of the Asian market by effectively taking an interest in the timberland product value-chain. This incorporates owning and collecting timberland resources, planning mid-stream coordination, chartering vessels and collaborating with destination ports and logistics suppliers for product conveyance to the end-users. Our products include Logs & Lumber.

Name: Líl̓wat Forestry Ventures Ltd.
Description:
Líl̓wat Forestry Ventures Ltd. is a leading forestry management corporation within the Líl̓wat Nation, managing an Annual Allowable Cut (AAC) of 100,000 cubic meters of timber. This accounts for approximately two-thirds of the AAC across the entire Líl̓wat Traditional Territory. 

The corporation is strategically divided into two primary operations: contracting and harvesting. Their extensive portfolio includes tree planting, spacing, brushing, slashing, and falling, alongside road rehabilitation and construction. Additionally, Líl̓wat Forestry Ventures handles BC Hydro transmission slashing contracts, firefighting, fuels management, and other specialized tree service work. 

or more information, visit: www.lilwat.ca

Name: ADAPT-Wald-Holz
Description: Im Projekt ADAPT-Wald-Holz wird ein adaptives, also anpassungsfähiges, Wald-Holz-Managementsystem für die Region Brandenburg-Berlin am Beispiel der Waldkiefer entwickelt. Im Fokus steht eine ökosystem- und ressourcenschonende regionale Wertschöpfungskette – von der Waldbewirtschaftung über die Holzbereitstellung bis zur Holzverarbeitung. Im transdisziplinären Innovationsforum werden gemeinsam mit der Praxis  Forschungsbedarfe identifiziert, bearbeitet und Ergebnisse der Öffentlichkeit transdisziplinär vermittelt.

Name: Skogspartner
Description:
Skogspartner erbjuder skogsrådgivning som är helt transparent och ovillkorligt på skogsägarnas sida.  

Vi är en etablerad och strategisk rådgivare med uppdrag för skogsägare och förvaltare över hela Sverige. Målet för vår verksamhet är fortfarande detsamma som när vi bildades 2008: att erbjuda fristående råd som ger skogsägaren insyn i affären och möjlighet att fatta informerade beslut.

Name: Central Chilcotin Rehabilitation Ltd.
Description:
Central Chilcotin Rehabilitation Ltd. (CCR) is a joint venture company owned by the Tŝideldel First Nation, the Tl’etinqox Government and the Yunesit'in Government. The focus is to coordinate and implement large scale forestry programs and initiatives within our traditional territories to provide sustained economic opportunities for our communities and to ensure the long-term sustainability of our traditional forest land-base.

CCR is recognized as an innovative organization —a catalyst that creates new economic opportunities. We are leaders in the forestry sector, with a proven reliability to carry out large-scale forest rehabilitation work.

Name: Asociación Colombiana de Ingenieros Forestales - ACIF
Description: La Asociación tiene como misión fundamental trabajar por la dignificación del ejercicio profesional forestal, a través del apoyo para la actualización de aspectos académicos, técnicos y científicos nacionales e internacionales de acuerdo con los objetivos y fines que se definen adelante.

Name: Rajasthan Forestry and Biodiversity Development Project (RFBDP)
Description:
RFBDP aims to undertake interventions to mitigate biodiversity conservation and resolve human-wildlife conflict and limit the risk of severe ecological losses. The Rajasthan Forestry and Biodiversity Development Project (RFBDP) 
addresses the need for a greater understanding of the impacts of human 
activities on biodiversity, and on the levels of sustainability of ecosystems and 
species. The activities undertaken will strengthen the protected area network 
to secure habitat for wildlife and lead to adoption of innovative methods to 
ensure effective conservation.

Name: AT Skog SA
Description:
- Skogeiersamvirke for skogeiere i Vestland, Rogaland, Agder og Telemark.
- Ca. 9200 medlemmer
- Totalleverandør innen skogbrukstjenester
- Årlig omsetning nær 1,5 million m³ tømmer
- Omsetningen er 1,1 milliard kroner
- 76 ansatte fordelt på 15 kontorer

I AT Skog ligger det en dyp forpliktelse til å være skogeiers førstevalg. Det er et løfte og skal vises gjennom våre handlinger. AT Skog tar del i hele verdikjeden, fra frø til industri. Dette engasjementet viser vi gjennom vår lokale delaktighet, innovasjon, utvikling og våre tradisjoner i et langsiktig perspektiv gjennom en miljøvennlig og bærekraftig skognæring.

Name: Forstbetrieb Altberg-Lägern GmbH
Description:
Unsere Aufgabe ist die nachhaltige Waldpflege für die Gemeinden Boppelsen, Buchs, Dällikon, Dänikon, Dielsdorf, Geroldswil, Hüttikon, Oetwil an der Limmat, Otelfingen und Weiningen sowie den Staatswald Katzensee. Dies um die gesellschaftlichen Ansprüche an den Wald wie den Rohstoff Holz, Erholungsraum, Luft- und Wasserfilter und Artenvielfalt, langfristig erfüllen zu können.
Für private Waldbesitzende übernehmen wir die Holzernte und Waldpflege.
In Gärten, Parkanlagen und entlang von Strassen schneiden wir Bäume zurück oder fällen sie ganz.
Wir sind Ihr Partner für alle Fragen und Arbeiten rund um Wald und Baum.

Name: Geoterra IRS
Description:
Geoterra Integrated Resource Systems Ltd. is a British Columbia based company that provides consulting services to the natural resource sector and related industries. We are a leader in the provision of technical expertise and information within the industry, and we pride ourselves in the provision of safe, efficient, and effective services.

Proudly Part of the CCI Group of Companies.

Name: Paulownia Ltd - iPaulownia, investors in paulownia
Description:
Paulownia Ltd is a European forestry investment management company specialising in paulownia timber plantations.  Based in London with administrative and operational offices in both UK and Spain, we provide managed paulownia timber investments. Plantations under development include our own €4M paulownia project and further major projects across Europe within our investment community.

Timber demand far exceeds supply and the deficit on the supply side shows no signs of abating for years to come.

Paulownia is the fastest growing hardwood on the planet which means that it can be harvested in shorter growth periods than other timber and provide quicker returns for an investor.  Not all paulownia is the same and our paulownia, a trademark protected variety, is cultivated for excellent timber quality to enhance its value as a quality timber investment.

Our paulownia plantations are managed under the supervision of our agroscience advisors and are stamped with the QWF Quality Wood Forestry Certificate regulated by Spain’s Ministry of Agriculture and recognised by the European Union (Department of Agriculture).

Paulownia Ltd’s strategy is to promote ethical, cash generative timber investments. We aim to deliver double-digit percentage growth for investors, irrespective of wider financial market gyrations.

We offer new or mature, professionally managed paulownia plantations. We facilitate timber investment in a flexible way.  We source land and provide a complete management service including land preparation, irrigation, planting and full care of the plantation through to cropping and delivery to timber processors.

Excellent safe and secure investment returns. Join us!

Name: Inova Forest
Description: Nossa expertise está na gestão e execução de operações de colheita com alto desempenho, segurança e respeito ao meio ambiente. Acreditamos que inovação e sustentabilidade caminham juntas — por isso investimos continuamente em tecnologia, capacitação de equipes e melhoria contínua dos nossos processos.

Name: SLS A/S
Description:
SLS A/S er et skovadministrationsfirma ejet af vores kunder dvs. skovejere og producenter af pyntegrønt og juletræer.

SLS A/S har naturnær skovdrift og PEFC certificering som kernekompetencer.

SLS A/S tilbyder totaladministration af skovejendomme beliggende i Jylland i en afstand af ca. 1 til 1,5 timers kørsel fra vores kontor ved Brædstrup.

Name: ARDSON VOLVO Mons

Name: LIFE Climate Forest
Description:
LIFE Climate Forest laat zien hoe je met kleinschalig, klimaatslim bosbeheer de veerkracht van bossen op arme zandgronden kunt vergroten. In dit zeven jaar durende project (met co-financiering van de Europese Unie) gaan projectpartners Staatsbosbeheer en de Bosgroepen aan de slag met al deze aspecten van klimaatslim bosbeheer. Samen met bosbeheerders, eigenaren, beleidsmakers en andere belanghebbenden. Onder andere in demobossen en referentiebossen en via trainingen, veldexcursies en symposia. Kennis delen is een van de belangrijkste onderdelen van het project.

Op deze manier draagt LIFE Climate Forest gericht bij aan het uitdragen van de kansen van klimaatslim bosbeheer en daarmee de ontwikkeling naar veerkrachtige en vitale bossen, die ook in de toekomst hun waardevolle producten en diensten kunnen blijven leveren.

**ENGLISH**
LIFE Climate Forest shows how climate-smart forest management can increase the resilience of forests on sandy soils, so that the forest can continue to fulfil its crucial role for plants, people, and animals, also in the future.

In this seven-year project (co-funded by the European Union), the partners Staatsbosbeheer and de Bosgroepen are working on all these aspects of climate-smart forest management. Together with forest managers, owners, policy makers and other stakeholders. For example, in demonstration forests and reference forests, and through training sessions, field trips and symposia. Sharing knowledge is one of the most important parts of the project. This is how LIFE Climate Forest contributes to spreading the word about the opportunities of climate-smart forest management and thus to the development of resilient and vital forests that can continue to provide valuable products and services in the future.

We own and manage more than 150,000 acres of forest lands for the long term. We plant and grow trees, maintain a healthy ecosystem, and harvest and sell timber.

At Dendotron, we pride ourselves on our commitment to delivering end-to-end solutions, ensuring the successful completion of every project. Our overarching objective is to optimize the value of trees through meticulous planning and the implementation of efficient harvesting techniques.

Name: Holz-21-regio
Description:
Die Vision von Holz-21-regio:
Der Thüringer Wald ist europäisches Vorbild für eine Bioökonomieregion mit regionalen, resilienten und nachhaltigen Wertschöpfungsketten basierend auf dem heimischen Rohstoff Holz.

Unsere Ziele:
- Lösungen zur Erreichung der Klimaziele der Europäischen Union entwickeln und umsetzen
- Unternehmen in traditionell bedeutsamen regionalen Wirtschaftsbereichen stärken
- Bürgerinnen und Bürger über Wachstums- und Beschäftigungschancen im Modellprojekt für den innovationsbasierten regionalen Strukturwandel mitnehmen

Das Thüringer WIR!-Bündnis Holz-21-regio ist ein interdisziplinäres Bündnis, das sich der Förderung nachhaltiger Innovationen im Bereich Wald und Holz verschrieben hat. Durch die Zusammenarbeit von Expertinnen und Experten aus Wissenschaft, Wirtschaft und Gesellschaft strebt das Bündnis an, den Thüringer Wald zur Vorzeigeregion für holzbasierte Innovationen zu machen, die sowohl zur regionalen Strukturentwicklung als auch zum globalen Klimaschutz beitragen.

Holz-21-regio agiert unter der Leitung der Fachrichtungen Forstwirtschaft der FH Erfurt und Qualitätssicherung und industrielle Bildverarbeitung der TU Ilmenau und verfolgt eine umfassende Entwicklungsstrategie zur aktiven Gestaltung des Strukturwandels im Thüringer Wald, basierend auf den traditionell starken Wirtschaftsbereichen Forst- und Holzwirtschaft, Digitalisierung und Sensorik sowie Sondermaschinen- und Fahrzeugbau.

Das Bündnis erhielt eine Förderung von ca. 8 Mio. Euro aus dem WIR!-Programm des Bundesministeriums für Bildung und Forschung (BMBF). Nach erfolgreicher Zwischenevaluierung des BMBF Ende 2024 strebt es weitere 7 Mio. Euro Fördergeld für die Umsetzung seiner strategischen Forschungsprojekte an.

Name: Kaingaroa Tipu

Name: Pedersen Group
Description:
The Pedersen Group name has been synonymous with forestry processing solutions for nearly 40 years.  Ten years after the company was established to produce roundwood for New Zealand Forest Products, the business expanded to include chip mills, supplying high quality wood chip to New Zealand's major pulp and paper companies.

The Pedersen Group business strategy was simple; streamline the chip process and deliver a better product more economically.

Over the next twenty years, Pedersen Group's ability to refine and improve the recovery process gave our clients precisely the desired results. Our operations became significantly more cost-effective and efficient.  During that period, Pedersen Group also became the only company in the world to successfully implement and run in-line to pulp mills.

Through this success, the company earned the reputation of being the one to turn to if you needed an innovative capital solution.  That's precisely what happened as some of the Southern Hemisphere's largest pulp mills engaged Pedersen Group to deliver export debarking and chip solutions.

Pedersen Group employs more than 170 people in two countries and handles over 8 million tonnes of fibre annually for major global forestry organisations.

De er begge uddannet skov- og landskabsingeniører i hhv. 2001 og 2021.
 
LiebhaverSkovfogeden ser muligheder i landskabet

Med flair for at se muligheder i landskabet har Claus og Line specialiseret sig i at skabe natur og liebhaveri på skov-, jagt- og landejendomme.
Ved at udarbejde og gennemføre en lang række af naturplaner og skovrejsningsprojekter har de været med til at forandre vidt forskellige landskaber.
 
Hos LiebhaverSkovfogeden rådgiver vi om, hvordan I får det optimale ud af naturen ved jeres landejendom og skovejendom. Vi har succes med at spørge ind til jeres drømme og idéer for ejendommen. Derfor udmønter vores samarbejde sig i en løsning, der skaber vedvarende glæde for jer som kunder.

Description:
TRAPA Forest Products, known in the industry as TRAPA, was established in 1954 and is a wholly owned subsidiary of Hampton Lumber, headquartered in Portland, Oregon.

Over the past decade, TRAPA has concentrated its efforts on expanding its supply base and global customer base. Production comes from Hampton’s nine sawmills, our coastal custom cuts, our partner sawmills, and remanufacturing plants in Canada, the USA, and Europe, as well as from partner loggers. Name: Tree Geo Data

Our Mission

We're dedicated to solving the challenges of desert afforestation by combining sustainable planting practices with AI-enhanced monitoring to validate plant growth. Our goal is to increase vegetation's survival rate in challenging environments significantly.

Cutting-Edge Technology

Our AI-powered solutions offer:

- Real-time monitoring and analytics dashboards
- AI-driven landscape planning and management tools
- Predictive modeling for plant growth and survival rates in desert conditions
- A user-friendly platform for project tracking and environmental impact assessment

We're proud to achieve 98% accuracy in tree species identification using our AI-enhanced monitoring software.

Comprehensive Services

We offer a holistic approach to desert afforestation:

- Expert planting advice to maximize survival rates
- Pre-financing options for tree planting projects
- Assistance in obtaining Biodiversity or Carbon Credit Certificates
- Regular, detailed reporting on plant health, growth rates, and biomass
- Third-party verification services for sustainability claims

Join Our Green Revolution

As we work to kickstart the green economy in the Middle East, we invite you to join us on this transformative journey. Whether you're a large corporation, a government entity, or an environmental enthusiast, there's a place for you in our growing community.

Ready to make a difference? Schedule your complimentary 30-minute planting project review (https://zcal.co/gastonbilder ) and discover how Tree Geo Data can revolutionize your afforestation efforts.

Together, we can turn deserts into thriving ecosystems, one tree at a time.

Name: Alberta Regional Caribou Knowledge Partnership (ARCKP)
Description:
Woodland caribou are a cultural and ecological icon of Alberta’s forests. However, they are also a threatened species and represent a significant conservation challenge. In response to this challenge, and to the additional challenge of managing woodland caribou across different ecological ecosystems, the Government of Alberta and the province’s forest sector formed the Alberta Regional Caribou Knowledge Partnership (ARCKP) in 2018-2019. Together, we are committed to finding on-the-ground solutions that balance forestry activities with woodland caribou conservation.

The partnership is a forum between government and industry to discuss research outcomes, alternative practices and various implementation options. We work collaboratively with stakeholders to identify knowledge gaps and draw on the expert knowledge to identify priority topics and projects for the ARCKP to fund. To further our commitment to knowledge sharing and getting important information into the hands of our practitioners, the ARCKP also funds a regular knowledge exchange program. This consists of high-quality, accessible science publications, infographics, learning seminars, workshops and more.

Mission: To support the development and sharing of innovative tools, techniques, strategies and understandable scientific knowledge to enhance sustainable forest management and caribou recovery efforts.

Vision: A collaboration promoting self-sustaining caribou populations and a viable forest sector.

Name: Currier Forest Products
Description:
Currier Forest Products is a small, family owned and operated sawmill located in Danville, Vermont. We produce timbers, flooring, lumber, wide boards, and exotic specialty woods for builders and timber framers, architects and interior designers, furniture makers, and luthiers, boat builders and historic preservationists – all sustainably harvested and custom milled to order.

We harvest a wide variety of wood types, such as tamarack, cedar, hemlock, spruce, maple, ash, yellow birch, beech, butternut, and cherry and add value to our timber through processes such as charring. We carefully select and mill our wood products to meet the specific needs of our clients.

Both the forest management and the sawmill in Danville are Forest Stewardship Council Certified Chain of Custody. The FSC is an independent, non-governmental, not for profit organization established to promote the responsible management of the world’s forests. The lumber, timbers and boards produced by Currier’s from these well-managed forests meet the highest standard of approval for ensuring a “sustainable” forest product. For instance, we do not drag or skid logs through the woods. Instead, we build roads through the forest for rolling the fallen trees out on forwarders. This greatly minimizes the erosion within the forest.

For nearly 200 years, the Currier family has been committed to the sustainable management of our forest and farmland in the Northeast Kingdom of Vermont. Six generations later, that love and commitment to the land continues and grows. Please reach out to us today to see how we can assist you with your next project. Learn more about us at https://currierforestproducts.com/.

Name: FSC România
Description:
Forest Stewardship Council (FSC) este o organizație internațională, non-guvernamentală și non-profit, care are misiunea de a promova un management forestier corespunzător din punct de vedere ecologic, ce aduce beneficii sociale și este viabil economic. De la înființarea sa în 1994, FSC a crescut și a ajuns cel mai respectat și mai cunoscut sistem de certificare din întreaga lume.

Sistemul de certificare FSC, care acoperă astăzi mai mult de 160 milioane ha de pădure, permite organizațiilor și consumatorilor să aleagă produse din lemn certificate, având garanția că acestea provin din păduri gestionate durabil pe criterii sociale, economice și de mediu.

Name: Round For A Reason LLC
Description:
Round For A Reason LLC is the owner of the patented technology.

Old and even new stoves are wasting heat out the chimney. The wasted heat - is wasted fuel and the heat can cause chimney fires. People are trying to fix the problem themselves and putting themselves at risk. 

Our technology is a better combustion chamber and heat transfer design.  Square and box shaped stoves are just outdated technology. A vertical cylinder combustion chamber is better than a box shaped combustion chamber.

Our design can be used for any solid biomass fuel and you can build many different styles - boiler, stove, furnace - 2 feet tall or over 20 feet tall.

For the square companies... how are you going to explain to your customers that your box is better? A traditional shape (and look) isn't going to make anyone warmer and especially doing it with more fuel.

We are round for a reason.

Das Forstrevier umfasst die Waldungen der sechs Revierpartner der Bürgergemeinden Aesch (Kopfbetrieb), Duggingen, Grellingen, Pfeffingen, Therwil, Reinach und der Immobilien Basel-Stadt. Es ist das Ziel des Reviers, grenzüberschreitende Bewirtschaftungsformen auszuführen. Der Kopfbetrieb stellt das Personal, sowie die nötige Infrastruktur zur Verfügung und verrechnet den Revierpartnern die erbrachten Leistungen auf Grund von in der Revierkommission beschlossenen Ansätzen. Die Bürgergemeinden als Waldbesitzer sind FSC und Q/PEFC zertifiziert.

Nosso diferencial está em controlar todas as fases, desde a escolha da matéria-prima até a entrega do produto final, garantindo padrão, resistência e satisfação total do cliente.

Na FortWood, acreditamos que a madeira é mais do que um recurso: é um ativo estratégico que sustenta negócios e impulsiona cadeias produtivas. Por isso, investimos continuamente em práticas responsáveis, inovação e melhoria de processos, sempre com foco em oferecer soluções sob medida para cada necessidade.

Description:
Bienvenido a Blumen Botánica, una empresa comprometida con la transformación ambiental a través de servicios forestales, jardinería y paisajismo. Desde nuestros inicios, hemos adoptado la pasión por la naturaleza y la sostenibilidad como principios fundamentales, guiando cada iniciativa que emprendemos.

En un contexto donde la urbanización a menudo nos aleja de la naturaleza, nació nuestra visión: convertir espacios grises en oasis de vida y serenidad. Nos esforzamos por crear entornos verdes que no solo embellezcan, sino que también contribuyan al bienestar global.

Hemos tejido una historia rica en pasión y compromiso. Cada proyecto que emprendemos se convierte en un testimonio palpable de nuestro amor por la naturaleza y nuestra firme determinación para generar un impacto positivo en el medio ambiente y la comunidad.

En Blumen Botánica, no solo cultivamos jardines, sino también un compromiso sólido con la preservación ambiental y la creación de espacios que no solo satisfacen las necesidades estéticas, sino que también nutren la conexión humana con la naturaleza. Con cada paso que damos, reafirmamos nuestro propósito de ser catalizadores de un cambio positivo y sostenible en el mundo.

Our Private Landowner Assistance (PLA) program is here to listen to your unique goals and help guide a thoughtful, customized approach to achieving them.  We offer the full-spectrum of forestry & land services. Management planning – timber sale establishment – timber inventory & valuation – GIS & mapping – harvest operations administration & execution – forest products marketing – forest road projects – wildlife habitat enhancement – forestland investment advising – industry consulting.

SWCo, LLC serves landowner clients in a consulting capacity as their dedicated forest management advisor.  We strive to build lasting relationships focused on the long-term vitality of the family and small business land holdings which are crucial to the socioeconomic well-being of America's Heartland. SWCo, LLC continues to steward a number of family offices and NIPF clientele that have grown through the last decade in our PLA program.

Please inquire directly with SWCo, LLC regarding forest certification standards that the firm adheres to.

Name: Klimapositive Waldwirtschaft
Description:
Unsere Mission und Vision: Das Bewusstsein für eine klimapositive Waldnutzung schärfen!

Unser Engagement:
Wir setzen uns mit Nachdruck dafür ein, die positiven Wirkungen einer nachhaltigen Bewirtschaftung von Wäldern zu kommunizieren und zu fördern. Unser Ansatz umfasst den Klimaschutz durch die effiziente CO2-Bindung, die Sicherung des Grundwassers, die Erhaltung der Bodenqualität, sowie den Schutz der Biodiversität. Wir sind überzeugt, dass die Förderung von wirtschaftlichem, sozialem und ökologischem Mehrwert Hand in Hand gehen kann und muss.

Unsere Strategie:
Wir betonen die Bedeutung von Waldeigentum als Grundlage für eine positive Entwicklung der Wälder. Es ist unser Ziel, die Herausforderungen und Chancen der Zukunft des Waldes im Kontext des Klimawandels aufzuzeigen. Unsere Webseite dient als Informationsplattform, um die Zusammenhänge zwischen Wald- und Wegenutzung, Tourismus, Einkommensgenerierung und CO2-Einsparungen durch die Substitution konventioneller Ressourcen zu verdeutlichen.

Unsere Vision:
Wir möchten den Wald und seine Produkte für alle erlebbar machen. Durch Bildung, Information und aktive Förderung einer klimapositiven Waldnutzung streben wir danach, einen bedeutenden Beitrag zum Umweltschutz und zur nachhaltigen Entwicklung unserer Gesellschaft zu leisten.

Name: FLORANET
Description:
Floranet é uma empresa especializada na fabricação de madeira serrada e carvão, com foco em qualidade e sustentabilidade. Nossa operação é direcionada para o aproveitamento completo dos recursos florestais, incluindo os subprodutos valiosos gerados durante o processo, como serragem e cavaco.

Selecionamos cuidadosamente árvores de eucalipto provenientes de reflorestamento, garantindo a renovação contínua dos recursos naturais. Nossas práticas de colheita são realizadas de forma consciente, respeitando os ciclos de crescimento das árvores e minimizando o impacto ambiental.

Com essa matéria-prima de alta qualidade, produzimos madeira serrada de eucalipto com precisão e eficiência. Utilizamos tecnologia avançada de corte e processamento para oferecer uma ampla variedade de tamanhos e especificações, atendendo às necessidades específicas dos nossos clientes.

Além disso, valorizamos os subprodutos resultantes da nossa operação. A serragem proveniente do processo de serragem é utilizada de forma inteligente e sustentável. 

O cavaco, por sua vez, é uma fonte valiosa de biomassa, sendo utilizado na geração de energia renovável, como combustível em caldeiras industriais e em processos de cogeração.

Na Floranet, acreditamos que nossa operação vai além da fabricação de produtos. Buscamos promover uma economia circular, em que cada recurso é aproveitado de forma inteligente, minimizando o desperdício e maximizando o valor.

Nosso compromisso com a qualidade, sustentabilidade e inovação nos guia. Estamos empenhados em fornecer produtos de alta qualidade, desenvolvidos de forma sustentável e adaptados às demandas do mercado. Conte conosco como seu parceiro confiável no fornecimento de madeira serrada e carvão, além de uma abordagem inteligente para os subprodutos gerados em nossa operação. Juntos, podemos construir um futuro mais sustentável e resiliente.

Description:
A Madeireira de Eucalipto Tratado Eucaminas é uma empresa que se preocupa com a qualidade dos serviços prestados desde o primeiro momento, desde o cuidado com o plantio de cada muda, manutenção da floresta, colheita, imunização da madeira, análise, logística e garantia. Tudo é claro seguindo um rigoroso processo de qualidade e proteção ao meio ambiente. 

Nossa madeireira de eucalipto conta com uma ampla área de secagem e armazenamento, onde a madeira é dividida e selecionada separada por comprimento e espessura. Passado o período de secagem o eucalipto passa por teste de umidade para certificar que está perfeitamente em condições para o início do processo de imunização, que é feita em autoclave, se desejar conhecer o processo clique aqui e confira como é feito o tratamento do eucalipto em autoclave.

Nosso time

Nossa empresa é formada e dirigida por membros da mesma família onde sempre prezamos pela transparência nos negócios, e que temos como principal foco o atendimento, qualidade e preço justo em todos os nosso produtos e serviços. Em nossa equipe contamos também com diversos colaboradores que consideramos como parte de uma grande família em que o objetivo é o excelência na produção do eucalipto tratado com cumprimento dos prazos estabelecidos, respeito ao meio ambiente e principalmente a integridade física de todos os envolvidos, afinal somos a família Eucaminas onde um cuida do outro.

Name: Minnesota Forestry Association
Description:
Our goal is to be a valuable resource for Minnesota’s more than 200,000 private woodland owners. In addition to woodland owners, our constituents include foresters, loggers, educators, businesses, sportsmen/women, conservation organizations, and concerned citizens.
     We host workshops and field tours where woodland owners can learn about how to be a good steward of their land, and network with other like-minded landowners and forestry professionals. We try to share the latest information through our newsletter, annual meeting, and website. We also work with the state and local partners to advocate for responsible forest stewardship, and provide tools and technical assistance to landowners.
     Call Before You Cut (CBYC) is a free program for all Minnesota’s family and individual woodland owners who want guidance and advice on determining if a woodland timber harvest is the right for them. With the support of the Minnesota DNR, the Minnesota Forestry Association provides up to a half-day walkthrough of your woods by a professional forester at no cost to you.

Norsk Juletreservice AS er eit produsenteigd salselskap som sel juletre til kunder over heile Noreg og Europa. Juletrea våre er produsert lokalt i Noreg av våre mange juletreprodusentar. Tilbakemeldingane frå våre kunder er særs gode.

Selskapet blei stifta i 1998, og vårt hovudkontor er i Hjelmeland i Rogaland. Juletreprodusentane er i hovudsak lokalisert på vestlandet og sørlandet. Me har mykje erfaring med bransjen og marknaden, og har over tid opparbeidd høg kompetanse innan juletreproduksjon.

Hovudprodukta våre er Nordmannsedelgran og Fjelledelgran. Me tilbyr også juletreplanter til juletreprodusentar. Hjå oss finn du kvalitetssikring i alle ledd med besøk i plantasjane, merking av tre, palling og transport.

Me engasjerer oss i heile produksjonen frå planter til ferdige tre, og tilbyr fagsamlingar og studieturar til våre produsentar. Eit stort og aktivt produsentmiljø er viktig i utviklinga av Norsk juletreservice.  Årleg set me av midler til forskning og utvikling av næringa, og me samarbeider tett med NIBIO om forskingsprosjekt.

 

About us: Since 1998 Norsk juletreservice AS has sold Christmas trees grown in the fjords of Norway. Our primary sale products are Nordmann fir and Lasiocarpa. We offer high quality trees for export and wholesale. The trees come from experienced producers across the west and southern part of Norway. Please contact us to learn more about our Christmas trees and our production.

Name: Tischlerei Wiggers GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Seit über einem halben Jahrhundert dient uns die Liebe zum Naturwerkstoff Holz als Inspiration. Unser Ziel als Tischlerei in Nordhorn war und ist es stets, die Menschen mit Holzunikaten von einzigartiger Qualität und Schönheit zu begeistern. Spezialisiert auf den Möbelbau, den Bau von Holztreppen, die Errichtung von Holzparkett und den Innenausbau glauben wir fest daran, dass unser persönlicher Holzweg der richtige ist. Dieser Holzweg führt uns zu den kleinen und großen, den überraschenden und charmanten Wünschen unserer Kunden, die wir individuell umsetzen.

Gerne verwenden wir einheimische Hölzer. Neben Ehrlichkeit, Pünktlichkeit und Wirtschaftlichkeit haben wir die Nachhaltigkeit zu einem festen Grundsatz unserer Philosophie als Tischlerei gemacht. Rund 90% der Energie, die wir verbrauchen, erzeugen wir über unsere Solaranlage selbst. Wir fertigen heute schon klimabewusst, um uns auch morgen noch an der Natürlichkeit und Lebendigkeit von Holz  erfreuen zu können.

Unser Neubau mit moderner Fertigungshalle und großem Ausstellungsraum an der Ernst-Heinkel-Str. 17 in Nordhorn ist ein Ausdruck unserer zukunftsorientierten Entwicklung als traditionsreiches Familienunternehmen. Unsere Ausstellung lädt dazu ein, Ideen aus Holz zu entdecken, zu fühlen und zu erfahren. Von praktischen und schönen Wohnzimmerschränken bis zu einzigartigen Couchtischen als i-Tüpfelchen vor dem Sofa gibt es viele Anregungen zu bestaunen. In unserer Halle lassen unsere Mitarbeiter mit sehr viel Leidenschaft und Können die Träume unserer Kunden Realität werden.

Name: Woodz R US
Description:
At Woodz R Us, we're passionate about providing top-quality firewood for an elevated fireside experience. Our sustainably sourced, naturally seasoned hardwood logs ignite warmth and create unforgettable moments.

With a focus on excellence, we carefully select the finest hardwood logs and naturally air-dry them for a minimum of three years. This meticulous seasoning process ensures an ideal moisture content, typically under 12%, resulting in efficient, clean-burning fires with consistent heat output.

We prioritise environmental responsibility, sourcing our firewood from responsibly managed forests and fallen trees, contributing to the preservation of natural resources.

Whether you have a wood-burning stove, fireplace, fire pit, or outdoor bonfire, our hardwood logs cater to all your fire needs. Enjoy cosy nights indoors or enchanting gatherings under the stars with the ambiance and warmth provided by our firewood.

Our easy ordering process, fast delivery options, and friendly customer service ensure a seamless experience. Trust Woodz R Us to meet your firewood needs with professionalism and care.

Ignite the charm of a real wood fire with our premium firewood. Discover the crackle, aroma, and comfort that only natural hardwood logs provide. Choose Woodz R Us for an unparalleled fireside experience and create lasting memories with family and friends.

Name: LOGGERS COMMUNITY COMPANY LTD

Our operations span from forest restoration and selective harvesting to the production of high-quality exotic wood slabs, logs, lumber, and finished furniture.

With a deep commitment to environmental stewardship, we actively manage both young and old-growth forests, promoting regeneration and biodiversity through sustainable practices. Every tree harvested is part of a long-term forest care plan aimed at restoring balance, protecting wildlife habitats, and ensuring the forest continues to thrive for future generations.

Our skilled team and modern facilities — including advanced manufacturing plants in the UAE and Italy — transform raw tropical hardwoods into elegant, durable, and timeless furniture pieces admired around the world.

At Loggers Community Company Ltd, we believe in the balance between development and conservation. Our mission is to deliver world-class wood products while promoting reforestation, sustainability, and community growth across the regions where we operate.

Name: Forestal El Quillay
Description:
Somos Forestal El Quillay!

Empresa chilena dedicada a la prestación de servicios forestales. 

Contamos con una amplia experiencia en el sector y un equipo de profesionales altamente calificados. 

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios forestales, que incluyen:

- Plantaciones forestales: Realizamos plantaciones de alta calidad que cumplen con los estándares de sostenibilidad.

- Riego de plantaciones: Proporcionamos un riego eficiente y sostenible que ayuda a las plantaciones a alcanzar su máximo potencial.

- Fertilización de bosques: Asesoramos y realizamos servicios de fertilización que ayudan a los bosques a mantenerse sanos y productivos. 

- Desbroce: Realizamos desbroces de terrenos forestales para prepararlos para plantaciones o otras actividades. 

- Corta fuegos: Prestamos servicios de corta fuegos para proteger los bosques de los incendios forestales.

- Fajas manuales: Realizamos fajas manuales para prevenir la propagación de incendios forestales. 

- Vigilancia predial: Brindamos servicios de vigilancia predial para proteger los bosques de la delincuencia y otros riesgos. 

- Cerco: Realizamos cercos para proteger los bosques de animales y otros riesgos.

- Limpieza de líneas eléctricas: Realizamos limpieza de líneas eléctricas para evitar incendios forestales. 

- Arriendo de vehículos: Ofrecemos el arriendo de vehículos forestales para empresas y particulares.

- Transporte de personal: Brindamos servicios de transporte de personal para empresas forestales.

Nuestros servicios están dirigidos a propietarios de bosques, empresas forestales y otras organizaciones relacionadas con el sector forestal.

Estamos comprometidos con el desarrollo sostenible de la industria forestal y trabajamos para ofrecer servicios de alta calidad que contribuyan a la conservación de los bosques.

Somos un grupo de jóvenes ingenieros forestales comprometidos con la protección y recuperación del ambiente, enfocados en brindar soluciones con una visión de paisaje, de forma integral y personalizada para cada escenario. Nuestro compromiso garantiza el máximo profesionalismo, motorizado por la pasión que tenemos por el ambiente, las actividades económicas sostenibles y socialmente responsables. Ofrecemos asesoría técnica, capacitaciones y planes de forestación a nuestros socios empresariales que se encuentran en la búsqueda de la armonización de la producción y el desarrollo con la sustentabilidad y protección del ambiente.

En Punto Verde brindamos un abanico de servicios dirigido a entidades que deseen incorporar el enfoque ambiental a sus actividades y asumir el compromiso de sustentabilidad que caracteriza a las organizaciones más modernas.
