Name: Forestry For Life VZW
Description:
Forests are an essential solution to climate change, they convert CO2 to oxygen, protect biodiversity, cool the earth, and regulate ecosystems.
Forestry For Life helps businesses and families to compensate their carbon emissions by planting trees and gives them the opportunity to invest in sustainable forestry.

Name: Stabos
Description:
STABOS is the Polish trading family company of well established position in the market. Since 2003, the beginning of its activity, STABOS plays important role in satisfying the needs of our customers. Highly motivated and committed team as we are sets itself ambitious targets to extend continuously the range of offered products and to find new outlets. We cooperate with companies in many countries across all continents in the world. The areas of our biggest activity comprise: bioenergy and forage products. STABOS’s areas of activity comprises production, acquisition and sale of agro biomass and biomass for power and heat generating sectors and covering the needs of the pulp-paper industry plants, manufacturers of fiberboards and chipboards. We are the strategic supplier of agro biomass and biomass for power and heat generating plants in north-western Poland. Since 2013 STABOS successfully operates in the fodder market.

STABOS in north-western Poland owns 2 hard-surfaced, enclosed and monitored twenty-four hours storage yards of 7,5 ha total area outfitted with electronic weighbridge, loading equipment (telescopic loaders and forklifts) allowing for the delivery of products in time and to the agreed location. In September 2016 in the locality of Przelewice (zachodniopomorskie) we have put into service the professional storehouse for supplements for fodders that has allowed us to increase our competitiveness in the market.

STABOS collaborates with 132 transport companies across Poland and Europe. Our suppliers for the biomass are 24 large and medium size sawmills, 12 manufacturers of the garden accessories, 4 furniture industry factories, 10 biomass producers including energy plant growers. We also cooperate with the Regional State Forest Administrations. As regards forage supplements we cooperate only and exclusively with dependable companies operating internationally.

Name: Ingeniería Verde Integral IVI S.A.S
Description:
En Ingeniería Verde Integral I.V.I S.A.S, estamos comprometidos con la creación de un futuro más verde y sostenible. Nos gustaría invitarles a conocer más sobre nuestros servicios y a unirse a nosotros en esta misión. 

Nuestros servicios:
 Reforestación y Restauración de Ecosistemas:
Nos especializamos en la recuperación de áreas degradadas mediante la plantación de especies nativas, la restauración de suelos y la mejora de la biodiversidad local.

 Gestión y Planificación Forestal:
Desarrollamos planes de manejo forestal sostenible que equilibran la producción con la conservación, asegurando la salud a largo plazo de los bosques.

 Servicios de Silvicultura:
Proveemos servicios técnicos para el cuidado y mantenimiento de árboles, incluyendo poda, fertilización, control de plagas y enfermedades y siembras.

 Consultoría Ambiental:
Ofrecemos asesoría experta en temas de impacto ambiental, legislación forestal y ambiental y estrategias de sostenibilidad para proyectos industriales y agrícolas.

 Capacitación y Educación:
Impartimos programas de formación para comunidades y empresas, promoviendo prácticas sostenibles y la importancia de la conservación de nuestros recursos naturales. Desarrollamos planes de siembras corporativas.

 Proyectos Comunitarios:
Colaboramos con comunidades locales en iniciativas que combinan el desarrollo económico con la conservación ambiental, fomentando el uso responsable y sostenible de los recursos forestales.

Gracias a nuestra metodología, aportamos al cumplimiento de indicadores de sostenibilidad empresarial a través de la contratación de mano de obra local, producción de insumos en el terreno y el protocolo de siembra orgánico aplicado al sector forestal, siendo pioneros en este campo.

 Contacto:
Para más información, envíenos un mensaje directo o contáctenos en [iverdeintegral@gmail.com/ +573004867265].

Name: Amazon Restoration Company
Description:
Amazon Restoration Company (ARC), active in Ucayali and Huanuco - Peru, restores deforested lands (mainly pasture) in the Peruvian Amazon with a combination of mixed native tree plantations, natural forest restoration and smallholder agroforestry in partner communities. 

From the productive areas, ARC will in some years from now harvest and process the timber from planted trees and then replant. From the growing forests the sequestered CO2 generates carbon credits for the international voluntary carbon markets.

ARC has been developed since 2020 by Form International, was incorporated in 2022 and since then further scaled with support from Treevive. Today, ARC is being managed and further developed by Keystone Forestry Partners and Treevive.

Name: ICD Contracting Ltd

Name: Arbor Noord Nederland
Description:
Arbor Noord Nederland is een bedrijf gespecialiseerd in de boomverzorging. Dit bedrijf bestaat al vanaf 1985. Wij zijn VCA gecertificeerd en wij hebben ook een co2-bewust certificering niveau 3. 

Wat wij doen:

- Nazorg van de bomen (water geven)

- Bomen verplanten

Name: European Network of Forest Extension Organisations  - FOREXT
Description:
Forest extension covers activities of state administration directed towards supporting private forestry that goes beyond just advising them. The network of forest extension organizations in Europe (FOREXT) ensures international cooperation in the field.

Our members represent 21 organisations in 16 European countries. Together we aim to to build their capacities in training and education of private forest owners, supporting the development of their associations, inventorying and marking of private forests, preparation of forest management plans for private forests, enforcement of forest legislation in private forests, providing subsidies for more sustainable forest management, organizing sale of wood from private forests, capacity building for private forestry, etc.

Name: División de Ciencias Forestales - Universidad Autónoma Chapingo
Description:
Somos una institución educativa líder en México en la formación de profesionales en el campo forestal. 

Desde nuestros orígenes precolombinos hasta hoy, hemos evolucionado continuamente para adaptarnos a las demandas del sector.

Nuestros programas de estudio han sido pioneros en equilibrar teoría y práctica, colaborando con expertos internacionales y ofreciendo una educación de calidad en el manejo sostenible de los recursos forestales. 

Únete a nosotros y sé parte del futuro de la conservación forestal en México.

Name: Beheerlyckheid
Description:
We willen onze positieve bijdrage aan de wereld zo groot mogelijk maken. Onze manier daarvoor is  het aantal voedselbossen te helpen uitbreiden door grondeigenaren te enthousiasmeren, kennis te delen en samenwerkingsverbanden aan te gaan. ‘Zien is geloven’, dus ons eigen bos stellen we open voor zoveel mogelijk mensen als bron van inspiratie en uitnodiging tot actie. 
Met meer dan 500 verschillende soorten bomen, planten, struiken en paddenstoelen zorgen we voor een zeer gevarieerde productie, waardoor er het grootste deel van het jaar kan worden geoogst. Dit zorgt voor een continu aanbod van eerlijk, seizoensgebonden voedsel van goede kwaliteit en grote diversiteit.
Daarnaast bieden we een scala aan op maat gemaakte events, coaching- en trainingsprogramma's voor een ieder die met én voor de natuur wilt werken. Denk hierbij aan opstart voedselbos, ondersteuning subsidieaanvraag voedselbos, advies verdienmodel m.b.t. voedselbos etc.
Daarnaast bieden wij ook diverse programma's aan om je te ontwikkelen op het gebied van persoonlijke groei en/of leiderschap. Dit alles vindt plaats in ons voedselbos in den Osse/Brouwershaven op Schouwen-Duiveland.

Name: FH Boom&Landschap
Description:
Welkom bij FH Boom&Landschap! 
FH Boom&Landschap is gespecialiseerd in boomverzorging, bosbouw en landschapsverzorging. Met deskundigheid en toewijding leveren wij hoogwaardige diensten voor het beheer, onderhoud en de ontwikkeling van groene buitenruimtes.

Onze kernactiviteiten:
 Boomverzorging – vakkundig snoeien, kappen en verzorgen van bomen.
 Bosbouw – duurzaam beheer en inrichting van bosgebieden.
 Landschapsverzorging – professioneel onderhoud van natuur- en cultuurlandschappen.

Wij staan garant voor kwaliteit, veiligheid en respect voor de natuur.

Name: Skogfondet
Description:
Skogfondet viser hvordan 120.000 skogeiere forvalter Norges skoger for å sikre at den gir verdier – både i dag og for kommende generasjoner. Takket være en aktiv forvaltning har vi i dag tre ganger så mye skog som for 100 år siden.

Skogen er Norges grønne pensjonsfond. Der Oljefondet tar seg av investeringene utenlands, tar vi oss av alt innenlands. Vi investerer i fremtidens skog – både for verdiskaping, klima, naturmangfold og folks livskvalitet.

Skogen er verdifull på mange måter. Den er et karbonlager, en kilde til fornybare byggematerialer, et hjem for utallige arter, en arbeidsplass og et fristed. Å forvalte skogen handler om å balansere disse verdiene til det beste for deg og meg, nå og for neste generasjon

Notre entreprise familiale oeuvre avec passion et engagement depuis bientôt 30 ans pour une exploitation forestière durable, responsable et respectueuse de pratiques vertueuses, tant pour la forêt que pour nos salariés et nos nombreux partenaires.

Spécialistes de la récolte et du transport de bois résineux, nous maîtrisons toute la chaîne de production depuis l'achat des coupes de bois sur pied jusqu'à la livraison finale chez nos clients dans tout le quart sud-est de la France.
Nous achetons des coupes de bois sur pied à tous types de propriétaires situés en PACA, Occitanie et sud AURA. Tous les produits récoltés sont commercialisés sur les mêmes secteurs, dans une logique de circuits courts.

Créée en 1997, l'entreprise a su se développer grâce à une mécanisation assumée et compte aujourd'hui une vingtaine de collaborateurs aux compétences variées, fiers de participer chaque jour à la récolte raisonnée des forêts et de produire le bois indispensable aux besoins de notre société.

Description:
Brampton Valley Group Ltd, based in Northamptonshire, is a leading provider of comprehensive arboricultural services, forestry operations, and specialised training programs. With over 12 years of experience, our team of highly trained and qualified arborists is equipped to handle all aspects of tree work to the highest professional standards.  ￼

Our Services:
	•	Tree Surgery: We offer a full range of tree surgery services, ensuring the health and safety of trees in various environments.  ￼
	•	Arboricultural Consultancy: Our certified consultant arboriculturalist provides expert tree consultations, comprehensive surveys, and detailed reporting to assist clients in making informed decisions about their tree management needs.  ￼
	•	Training and Assessments: As an independent training provider and a leading Lantra Awards & City & Guilds (NPTC) Approved Centre, we specialise in forestry, arboriculture, tree surgery, and land-based training. Our courses are designed to equip participants with up-to-date skills and knowledge, preparing them for successful careers in the industry.  ￼

At Brampton Valley Group Ltd, we pride ourselves on our extensive range of tools and resources, enabling us to undertake projects of any scale efficiently and effectively. Our commitment to excellence is underscored by our recent five-year full reassessment, allowing us to wear our Arboricultural Association badge with pride, ensuring our clients know we adhere to the highest compliance standards.  ￼

We are dedicated to delivering exceptional service and fostering long-term relationships with our clients, contributing to the sustainable management and preservation of our natural environment.

Name: ARD Sycomore
Description: To address the ongoing and upcoming climate changes, forest managers must rethink their forestry practices: it is essential to prevent and manage forest dieback, as well as to imagine, evaluate, and recommend new management practices (especially at the crucial moment of stand renewal). For this, they can rely on research, always with the aim of maintaining the multifunctionality of forests: a healthy forest, properly renewed, rich in quality timber and biodiversity for future generations. Sycomore is a scientific research, innovation, and socio-economic development program focused on smart, connected, and precision forestry. As the leader of Sycomore, the INRAE Val de Loire center coordinates the contributions of 20 regional academic and socio-economic partners working on trees and forests.

Name: Citizens for Sensible Forest Management
Description:
Citizens for Sensible Forest Management, (CSFM), is a non-partisan, social medium attempt to build a large base of individuals, regardless of political party affiliation, to gain the attention of government leaders to the overwhelming desire for pragmatic forest management. We acknowledge this is a complex issue, with much history, however, we believe urgent action is required and are confident we can find the answers if leaders are open to change. 

While acknowledging the science of climate change and recognizing that is a long-term issue, we believe it is necessary that citizens who believe government policies and laws must change take action now. We must use all the means we have available for the immediate health and restoration of the forests. We must build a movement for positive change that will not be muted by special interest political groups. 

Our priorities 
- To ensure the protection of communities in the wildlife-urban interface, by advocating for adaptive forest management and fire-resilient communities 
- To promote healthy and sustainable forest management practices through private and public lands that support local communities and a balanced approach to all resource management 
- Return our wilderness forests to their natural, self-sustaining state

Name: Forestry and Wood Industries Training Centre
Description:
Competence-based vocational education and training with other types of short term worker-level training are essential for any sector to grow and develop. This is particularly true in the developing countries, where worker-level training has been largely neglected. In Tanzanian many forestry and wood processing companies and employers face major difficulties in finding trained, competent and skilled employees. Employers’ concern is that too often graduates have only theoretical knowledge, but they do not have skills and experiences needed in real working situations.

Critical to Tanzania’s forestry and forest industry expansion is skilled labour force. Currently labour force and workers in forestry sector are largely trained on job. Often this is done by trainers who are under-trained themselves. In the absence of formal vocational education and training (VET), skills and capacity of workers are still limited. To improve the situation there is a need to have comprehensive training programmes, especially short courses training. Way forward is to establish a skills development training centre that trains workers for their skills necessary on their jobs. These workers then returning to their work places can transfer new skills also to other workers of the company.

The Forestry and Wood Industries Training Centre (FWITC) was established by the Private Forestry Programme (PFP) in 2016 to answer to the need for comprehensive and appropriate practical forestry and wood technology short courses close to the heart of the industry in the Southern Highlands. The centre is equipped with key sawmilling and forestry equipment and tools. Staffing includes personnel specialized in sawmilling and harvesting operations and management.

FWITC is located in Mafinga town, Mufindi district, about 75 km from Iringa. The centre is strategically well located and easily accessible to all forestry and wood industry companies operating in the Southern Highlands of Tanzania.

Name: Powerlonia
Description:
The Story of Powwerlonia - (Arreda doo)
Our journey began in 2017 in the town of Titel, Republic of Serbia, where we planted our first Paulownia trees on our land. What started as a vision has now grown into something much bigger—the number of trees we’ve planted has reached five digits, and our ambitions continue to grow.

Every year, we expand our plantations, refining our expertise and pushing the boundaries of what’s possible with fast-growing, high-quality timber. Paulownia has proven to be a game-changer in sustainable forestry, offering unmatched growth speed, carbon absorption, and versatility in various industries.

Why Paulownia?
 Rapid growth – reaching over 5 meters in a single season.
 Sustainability – a renewable resource that helps reduce CO₂ levels.
 Light yet strong – often called the "aluminum of wood" for its durability and fine texture.
 Versatile applications – used in furniture, musical instruments, boats, aircraft, and more.

This project has grown beyond just planting trees—it has become an ambitious, evolving mission. We continue to move forward, to learn, and to innovate, all while making this planet a better place to live.

The future of Paulownia is wide open, and as we explore new possibilities, we welcome fresh perspectives and opportunities to take this journey even further.

 Viva Paulownia!

Name: Puspa Warna Cemerlang
Description:
Empowering Sustainable Forestry and Community for a Greener Future

PT Puspa Warna Cemerlang adalah perusahaan yang bergerak di bidang kehutanan dengan komitmen tinggi terhadap keberlanjutan (sustainability), penyediaan energi ramah lingkungan, serta pemberdayaan masyarakat sekitar. Kami percaya bahwa kelestarian alam dan kesejahteraan komunitas adalah kunci untuk menciptakan masa depan yang lebih baik bagi Indonesia dan dunia.

Dengan visi “Menjadikan Indonesia sebagai pemimpin dalam produksi bahan baku energi yang ramah lingkungan dengan mengedepankan prinsip keberlanjutan,” kami tidak hanya fokus pada pengelolaan sumber daya hutan secara bertanggung jawab, tetapi juga pada pengembangan kapasitas masyarakat lokal untuk tumbuh bersama kami.

Misi Kami:

1. Mengelola sumber daya hutan secara optimal dengan prinsip keberlanjutan.
2. Mengembangkan bahan baku energi ramah lingkungan yang mendukung transisi energi hijau.
3. Berkontribusi terhadap pengurangan jejak karbon melalui praktik inovatif dan teknologi hijau.
4. Memberdayakan masyarakat sekitar melalui program peningkatan kapasitas, pelatihan, dan peluang kerja.
5. Menjalin kemitraan dengan komunitas lokal untuk mendukung kesejahteraan sosial dan ekonomi.

Kami percaya bahwa pelestarian hutan tidak dapat terwujud tanpa kolaborasi dengan masyarakat setempat. Oleh karena itu, PT Puspa Warna Cemerlang terus mengintegrasikan pendekatan berbasis komunitas dalam setiap aspek operasional kami, mulai dari pelatihan pengelolaan lingkungan, akses pendidikan, hingga mendukung usaha mikro dan kecil di wilayah sekitar.

Bersama PT Puspa Warna Cemerlang, mari tumbuh bersama menuju masa depan hijau yang lebih cerah dan masyarakat yang lebih sejahtera.

Name: Safety On Site, Inc.
Description:
Safety on Site helps loggers and others in the forest products industry stay safe, stay legal, and get home.
For more than 27 years, we’ve been out in the woods meeting crews where they are, rain or shine. We speak their language. We know the work. And we know the rules: OSHA, DOT, FMCSA, we are a bridge to that world for our customers.
Our services include:
On site safety meetings in the woods
CPR/First Aid certification
DOT drug and alcohol testing (non DOT too)
Random Drug and Alcohol testing program management
A very “hands on” FMCSA Clearinghouse compliance program

We handle the paperwork, the follow-up, and the fine print so our customers can focus on running their business and keep their crews moving. We are not affiliated with any insurance company, but we work with a lot of agents and their underwriters to make sure our customers are a good fit. On site safety meetings, company plans and policies, driver safety, and trucking compliance are just some of the ways we help our customers to make progress.
Our goal is to make things easier. We believe if we can make safety and compliance easier for our customers, more workers will stay safe, family businesses will be protected, and they can carry on working with peace of mind.
Safety shouldn’t be complicated. It should be consistent. Practical. That’s what we deliver every day.

Every tree we plant is part of a vision: 10,000 trees each year, grown with care, science, and respect for nature.

We don’t just plant; we build ecosystems. We mix native and adaptive species to create balance, invite biodiversity, and prepare the soil for future generations.

This isn’t about planting for numbers. It’s about regeneration, purpose, and legacy — creating a forest that can stand on its own and give back to the planet.

Join us in this journey. Share, support, or simply spread the word.
Together, we’ll grow a forest that outlives us all.

 Be part of the forest. Be Untamed.

Name: Heer - Brennholz und Forstdienstleistungen GbR
Description:
--- Brennholz ---
Was gibt es Schöneres, als in den kalten Monaten des Jahres vor dem warmen Feuer des Kamins zu sitzen? Oder was gibt es schöneres, als einen lauen Sommerabend vor dem brennenden Lagerfeuer mit der Familie oder den Freunden ausklingen zu lassen?
Für jeden Anlass haben wir das richtige Holz!


--- Lohnspalten ---
Mit unserem Schneidspaltautomat sägen und spalten wir Stämme mit einer Länge von bis zu 5m und einem Durchmesser bis zu 55cm in ofenfertige Scheite mit einstellbarer Länge zwischen 20 und 50cm. Abhängig der Scheitlänge und Stammdurchmesser hat die Maschine einen Durchsatz zwischen 5 und 10srm pro Stunde. Das Spaltkreuz ist in Sektionen unterteilt, die je nach Stammdurchmesser das Holz in 2, 8 oder 18 Scheite teilen. Das Holz wird über ein 6m Förderband abtransportiert und kann von dort auch direkt in Anhänger oder Boxen verladen werden.


--- Baumfällarbeiten ---
Baum im Weg? Zu groß? Morsch? Bei Baumfällungen sind wir Ihr Partner. Wir kümmern uns um eine schnelle, sichere und kostengünstige Fällung des Baumes nach Begutachtung. Das anfallende Gehölz und der Stamm kann durch uns ebenfalls versorgt und abtransportiert werden. Mittels Seilklettertechnik oder mit der Hubarbeitsbühne tragen wir auch Bäume in eng bebauter oder geschützen Umgebungen ab.

Name: Seris Forest Analytics
Description:
Seris Forest Analytics is a consulting firm that provides expert support in forest resource analysis, carbon accounting, carbon project design, policy analysis, and decision support for natural climate solutions. We work with organizations across the forest products sector, conservation space, sustainability certification systems, and climate-tech firms.

Services:

Forest Resources Reporting and Sustainability Metrics
Analysis and synthesis of large-scale forest datasets such as FIA to inform sustainability reporting, policy compliance, and trade due diligence. Services include indicator development, reporting framework alignment (FAO, Montreal Process, SDGs), and technical authorship of forest sustainability reports.

Forest Carbon Quantification and Analysis
Comprehensive carbon stock assessment and growth analysis for voluntary and compliance carbon markets. Services include forest inventory design, application of allometric equations, biomass and carbon pool estimation, and long-term growth modeling to support project development and verification.

Forest Data Analytics and Platform Development
End-to-end technical support for the design, testing, and delivery of digital platforms that quantify greenhouse gas emissions and removals from forests and wood products. This includes methodology development, data and model integration, and user experience design.

Carbon Market and MRV Advisory
Strategic guidance for organizations developing or evaluating forest carbon initiatives. This includes national MRV system design, dataset evaluation for carbon feasibility studies, and alignment with Voluntary Carbon Market methodologies.

Science Delivery and Technical Communication
Bridging science and policy through clear, credible communication. Offerings include report authorship, stakeholder consultation, training materials, and data visualization tools designed to make complex forest and carbon science accessible to diverse audiences.

Description:
At Ole Man RB’s Tree Service, we believe tree care is about far more than cutting branches or grinding stumps—it’s about protecting families, preserving property, and strengthening the communities we proudly serve. Based in Belding and serving Montcalm County, and North Kent County, we’ve built our reputation as a trusted, locally rooted company that people can rely on in every season.

Our mission is simple but powerful: to serve families and communities with honest, dependable, and professional tree services. We show up when we say we will, we finish what we start, and we treat every property with the same care we would our own. Every member of our team is trained to lead with initiative, act with integrity, and deliver professionalism from the first handshake to the final cleanup.

We offer a full suite of residential and commercial tree care services, including safe tree removal, precision trimming, storm damage cleanup, crane-assisted removals, lot clearing, and stump grinding. Whether it’s an emergency call after a storm or a planned landscape improvement, our customers know they can count on us for quick response times, fair pricing, and meticulous attention to detail.

But what truly sets us apart isn’t just the equipment we bring or the skills we’ve mastered—it’s the heart behind the work. We see every job as a chance to protect homes, make neighborhoods safer, and help our clients feel proud of their property. Our five-star reputation has been earned one yard, one family, and one project at a time, through dedication to safety, transparency, and respect.

At Ole Man RB’s, trees may be our trade, but people are our purpose. We’re here to do the hard work, the right way, the first time—so our community can continue to grow strong, just like the roots we care for.

Name: Storm Trees
Description:
One day a tree fell down in a storm. It was the tree that changed everything. It was the tree that would lead to the recognition of a profound disconnect between the management of urban wood “waste” and the value and beauty of the materials being characterized as such.  A perfect storm brought about by the prevalence of tree disease, urban and suburban development and the saturation of the mulch market has created a problem and an opportunity simultaneously.  Municipalities and private companies tasked with the management of trees that come down face unprecedented volume and cost associated with the disposal of this waste.  Because of this there is both appetite and momentum amongst urban forestry professionals to think differently about other avenues to explore in their disposal operations. 

Storm Trees, Locally Salvaged Timber is obtaining downed trees and redeploying them as usable building materials but this is merely the beginning of our story.

Wood is a natural carbon sequestration vehicle.  Storm Trees quantifies every board foot produced and quantifies by species, the carbon and carbon dioxide stored within those board feet.  We then report this data back to municipalities, tribal organizations and private companies to aid their carbon and sustainability goals in addition to our own.

The goal of Storm Trees is not to simply build a successful company but to create an industry spawned from what was once classified as waste.  We believe that we are pioneers in this industry but we will hold no intellectual property, no patents.  Instead we will share our learning with anyone who cares to join us in our quest to optimize a largely untapped natural resource.

Die PEFC-Zertifizierung in Deutschland ist als regionale Zertifizierung aufgebaut. Durch dies wird es auch einzelnen kleinen Waldbesitzern in Bayern ermöglicht, an einer Zertifizierung teil zu haben und ihre nachhaltige Waldbewirtschaftung zu dokumentieren. Das PEFC-System in Deutschland wird durch den PEFC Deutschland e. V. aufgesetzt und getragen, weitere Informationen hier.

Name: Houston forest preservation society
Description:
Houston's beautiful forest and native species are being recklessly destroyed by developers and city council alike.
There appears to be no regard for the creatures displaced in clear felling nor any fore thought of preservation. 
I have watched in dismay as forest all over the city are cleared for building or flood retainment
Very soon there will be little remaining.
It is possible to develop land in a responsible manner, to have tree boundaries in front of factories and along freeways.
Small lots for the birds, insects and small mammals to thrive.
There are health benefits both physical and psychological to this approach. 
I want to bring awareness to this before its to late 
Join me in bringing an awareness before its all gone

Name: Métraux Entreprise Forestière Sàrl
Description:
Entreprise forestière familiale depuis 1935
L'entreprise a été créée en 1935 par Monsieur René Métraux. Les travaux sont, à l'origine comme aujourd'hui, essentiellement exécutés dans la région. L’abattage et le débardage sont alors effectués avec des chevaux, qui transportent aussi le bois jusque dans les scieries régionales. Un tracteur avec treuil est ensuite acquis dans les années 40.
À la fin des années 50, Monsieur André Métraux a rejoint son père pour les travaux forestiers.
Dans les années 80, les fils d'André viennent enrichir l'entreprise de leur savoir-faire dans la chaîne du bois. Plusieurs machines mécaniques viennent toutes ces années compléter le parc de véhicules, afin de suivre l’évolution des méthodes de récolte et de mécanisation en vigueur de nos jours.

From 1989 to 2014, Mr. Whipple focused primarily on banking operations, beginning with his leadership of Horizon Bank, which sold to Mercantile Bancorporation (now US Bank) in 1998 and following with the founding of Summit Bancorp in 2000, which sold to Bank of the Ozarks in 2014. We have worked closely with Woodsure, Hetas and the UK Forestry Commission to help protect the market and its users. Being on the front line of the industry, we are very pleased to be offering the quality products and services that we do. Along with our team and networks, We continue to grow while maintaining a personal and professional approach.
  We believe that the numerous options for our premium kiln dried logs are great value for money and provide high quality wood to our customers. We feel that it's the best way to buy your firewood. 
Timports have long established supply relationships with many stove centres and log suppliers across the UK and Ireland to ensure that the correct products are used on the varying stoves and fireplaces found in the British home. Kiln dried logs can be the most efficient way to heat your home, and buying kiln dried logs from Timports is the best way to get the quality of logs and service required.
In the continued effort to be as sustainable and ethical as possible, sawmills are now using heat exchanges (the excess heat from the production of electricity from biomass gas plants) to dry the wood most efficiently.

Name: Wat een tuin man
Description:
Bomen zijn een essentieel element in de leefomgeving. Ze zorgen voor schaduw, zuurstof en dragen bij aan een prettige, groene omgeving. Het beheren en onderhouden van bomen vraagt echter om specifieke kennis en kunde. Bij ons bent u aan het juiste adres voor boomverzorging, bomen snoeien, struiken snoeien en compleet boomonderhoud. Wij ontzorgen u volledig: van vakkundig advies tot zorgvuldige uitvoering. Zowel particuliere als zakelijke opdrachtgevers kunnen bij ons terecht. Ook voor complexe situaties of bijzondere uitdagingen draaien wij onze hand niet om.

Iedere boom en iedere situatie is uniek. Daarom vinden wij maatwerk belangrijk. Of het nu gaat om een oude monumentale boom in uw tuin of om een rij jonge bomen langs een bedrijventerrein: wij bieden altijd een oplossing op maat. Wij komen graag bij u langs om uw wensen te bespreken, de situatie te beoordelen en u passend te adviseren over de beste vorm van boomverzorging, bomen snoeien, struiken snoeien of boomonderhoud.

Meža inventarizācija: Kvalitatīvi veicam meža inventarizāciju, kas ļauj noteikt jūsu meža patieso vērtību un plānot nākotnes apsaimniekošanu.
Lauksaimniecības zemju iegāde un pārdošana: Palīdzam saskatīt neapgūto platību vērtību un sniedzam ekspertu rekomendācijas par labākajiem darījuma nosacījumiem.

Name: NASHLX
Description: NASHLX is an online marketplace that enables direct transactions in hardwood lumber, cross ties, pallets and other by-products between sawmills and buyers such as pallet manufacturers, construction companies, cabinetry companies, railways, etc. NASHLX offers both a spot market for immediate delivery and a forward market for future delivery. The seller creates a profile that informs NASHLX of its inventory and pricing preferences. The buyer creates a profile that informs NASHLX of its purchasing needs as well as its delivery and pricing preferences. NASHLX matches the sellers with buyers. Neither side needs to find the other. Based on inputs from both the sellers and buyers, NASHLX algorithms match the seller with like-minded buyers and enter them into pending contracts at a willing buyer-willing seller price that each side can accept, reject or counter.

Name: S&P Land Restoration
Description:
One of our specialties is tree mulching – a process that involves shredding trees into small pieces using powerful machinery. Not only does this save time and labor costs, but it also helps improve soil health by returning valuable nutrients back into the ground. Furthermore, mulching helps prevent soil erosion and reduce weed growth.
Stump grinding is another service offered by S&P Land Restoration. We understand how unsightly stumps can be on your property, not to mention posing potential safety hazards. Our team utilizes specialized equipment to safely remove stumps from your property without causing any damage. We also offer stump removal services for those who prefer complete eradication.
In addition to tree mulching and stump grinding, we are proud to provide hydroseeding as part of our comprehensive land clearing services. Hydroseeding involves spraying a mixture of seed, mulch, fertilizer, and water onto bare soil to promote fast and healthy grass growth. This method is not only cost-effective but also environmentally friendly, making it perfect for hunters and farmers who want to maintain their land's natural beauty.

“Vi fælder grønt” betyder at vi benytter bio benzin og bio kædeolie i vores maskiner og gennem udfasning vil motorsave og andet udstyr i videst mulige omfang blive erstattet af maskiner på batteri. De fleste maskiner er udskiftet til batteri på nuværende tidspunkt.

Vores målsætning er at blive den fagligt førende træplejevirksomhed i Danmark med den højeste kundetilfredshed.

Name: Bayerische Staatsforstverwaltung 1752-2005
Description: Die Bayerische Staatsforstverwaltung war in Bayern von 1752, verändert und mit anderem Zuständigkeitsbereich ab 1821 (inkl. Franken und der Pfalz) die staatliche Verwaltung die für alle Belange im Wald- und Forstbereich zuständig war. Dies umfasste die fiskalische Bewirtschaftung der Staatsforsten ebenso wie die Beratung der Privatwaldbesitzer und die Bewirtschaftung der meisten Stadt- und Gemeindewälder. Die Bayerisches Staatsforstverwaltung wurde 2005 im Zuge der Verwaltungsreformen aufgelöst und in die Bayerischen Staatsforsten AöR einerseits und die Bayerische Forstverwaltung andererseits aufgetrennt.

Name: Gemme la Forêt d’Aquitaine
Description:
L'association "Gemme la Forêt d'Aquitaine" a été fondée le 7 mars 2014 avec pour objectif de relancer l'extraction de la résine dans la forêt des Landes de Gascogne. L'association regroupe divers acteurs, dont des élus, des industriels, des responsables syndicaux, et des sylviculteurs, tous engagés dans la promotion et la recherche pour relocaliser la production de cette matière première renouvelable.

L'association mène des expérimentations pour moderniser les techniques de gemmage, en utilisant notamment des méthodes de récolte en vase clos qui permettent d'obtenir une résine de grande pureté. Ces efforts visent à réduire l'empreinte carbone liée à l'importation de résine et à créer des circuits courts pour la production locale.

Gemme la Forêt d'Aquitaine est également impliquée dans des projets européens comme "Incredible" et "SustForest plus", en collaboration avec des partenaires espagnols et portugais, pour promouvoir la conservation et l'emploi sur le territoire grâce à l'exploitation de la résine.

Nous bénéficions, depuis la création de l’association, du soutien actif du Conseil Départemental des Landes sous la forme d’une subvention annuelle.
La Région Nouvelle Aquitaine et le conseil Départemental de Gironde restent attentifs à nos travaux.

L’association a été reconnue d'interêt général en 2024.

Name: Campbell Forest
Description:
Specializing in large-scale mechanical forestry mastication (mulching) we reduce forest fuels to create Defensible Space between homes and critical infrastructure – so when a fire comes, it comes no further.

Our massive machines mulch brush and trees (up to 14 inches in diameter) faster than anything else on the planet. They are also engineered with low ground pressure that leaves minimal soil disturbance. Our hand crews can mulch sensitive or hard to reach places and will lop and scatter as required. 

Mastication leaves behind a layer of beneficial mulch that promotes healthy habitat recovery. Mulch helps prevent soil erosion by sealing in moisture, helping native grasses and desirable trees (like oaks) get the nutrients they need.

Name: Greenlight Vietnam
Description:
We are excited to announce a groundbreaking project in Laos, where we have been granted 3,000 hectares of land by the government. Our goal is to plant 825 trees per hectare, with each tree growing 3-5 cm per day and reaching maturity in 3-5 years. This rapid growth provides excellent returns for our investors and NFT holders, while also supporting an environmentally friendly and carbon-neutral initiative.

Currently, we are planting 150 hectares, with plans to extend to 3,000 hectares, in collaboration with the Government of Laos and the University of Agriculture in Laos. With adequate sunlight, our trees can grow up to 5-6 cm per day in the first three years. As their height growth slows, the trunk diameter increases. Additionally, the trees will start to blossom in the second year, reaching full bloom by the third year, when we will launch our honey production plan.

This project combines high growth potential with environmental sustainability, making it a compelling opportunity for forward-think investors

Seit über 100 Jahren arbeitet unser Familienbetrieb leidenschaftlich mit dem Rohstoff Holz. Holz gilt als CO²-neutraler Baustoff, der durch die in Europa betriebene nachhaltige Forstwirtschaft immer wieder nachwächst. Für die Umwelt gibt es kein gesünderes Baumaterial. Durch die Produkteigenschaften von Konstruktionsvollholz und Brettschichtholz ist Holz ein hervorragendes Material für Konstruktionen und Bauteile aller Art.

Merkle Holz achtet auf eine gleichbleibend hohe Qualität seiner Produkte. Dies gewährleisten wir durch unsere jahrelange Erfahrung im Umgang mit Holz. Gleichzeitig kommen bei uns modernste Maschinen für die Holzbearbeitung zum Einsatz. Wir liefern an Holzbauer, Bauunternehmen, Zimmerleute und den Handel neben KVH auch Duo-/Triobalken und BSH und kümmern uns um sämtliche computergestützte Abbund-Arbeiten.

Bei unserer täglichen Arbeit haben wir die Umwelt stets im Blick. Ein umweltbewusster Umgang mit dem Rohstoff Holz liegt uns ebenso am Herzen wie seine umweltschonende Verarbeitung. Darauf legen wir besonderen Wert ebenso wie auf höchste Qualität unserer Produkte, denn: jede Lieferung an unsere Kunden muss eine Empfehlung für weitere Aufträge sein.

In the continued effort to be as sustainable and ethical as possible, sawmills are now using heat exchanges (the excess heat from the production of electricity from biomass gas plants) to dry the wood most efficiently.

Join Snowy River Forestry on our mission to combat climate change, protect biodiversity, and build a resilient future. Name: Meir Environmental Solutions
Description:
Meir Environmental Solutions specialise in providing Forestry Mulching, Earthworks and other property maintenance services.

Forestry mulching is the process with the lowest impact to the ecosystem, versus other traditional land clearing methods, such as bulldozing or burning.  We use the process of taking small trees, scrub, brush and lantana and it gets processed down to a fine mulch finish that is able to break down in the soil and regenerate. A forestry mulcher is the most robust and versatile machine for land clearing. This leads to the best surface finish possible versus other land clearing techniques, which means rejuvenation is faster and the ability for that land to be serviced by other machinery is greatly improved.

Name: L'elagueuse EI
Description:
Il était une fois … un élagueur est venu travailler chez nous, … un an plus tard j’étais en début de formation CS Arboriste – Elagueuse mais aussi en train de casser mes propres convictions limitantes … encore un an plus tard j’avais monté ma propre boîte d’élagage.
Parce que, en ayant 43 ans, il était temps de devoir mon propre chef.

C’était un chemin imprévu ! Et parfois je me demande pourquoi je fais se métier trés dangereux, technique et hyper physique . Parfois je dis parce que la plupart du temps je me sens ultra reconnaissante de travailler avec et dans des arbres qui sont là déjà beaucoup plus longtemps que tout les gens que je connais.

Lasologia – Eksperci w inwentaryzacjach dendrologicznych i usługach leśnych

Lasologia to polska firma z 15-letnim doświadczeniem, specjalizująca się w inwentaryzacjach dendrologicznych oraz kompleksowych usługach leśnych dla dużych inwestycji. Wspieramy inwestorów, architektów krajobrazu i instytucje publiczne, dostarczając dokładnych analiz oraz ekspertyz przyrodniczych, które pomagają chronić i zarządzać zielenią.

Nasze usługi obejmują inwentaryzacje drzewostanów, pielęgnację zieleni, ekspertyzy dendrologiczne i przyrodnicze oraz wsparcie w procesach formalno-prawnych związanych z ochroną środowiska. Dzięki wiedzy i zaangażowaniu naszych specjalistów tworzymy raporty i opracowania najwyższej jakości, dbając o precyzyjne i rzetelne podejście do każdego projektu.

Zaufaj Lasologii – profesjonalizm, doświadczenie i pasja do ochrony środowiska są fundamentami naszej działalności. Skontaktuj się z nami, aby dowiedzieć się, jak możemy wesprzeć Twoją inwestycję.

Name: Canterbury West Coast Wood Council
Description:
The Canterbury West Coast Wood Council actively promotes the value and benefits of forestry and wood products across the region. We are proud to represent a wide range of companies across the industry including forest nurseries, growers, managers, contractors, sawmillers, processors, distributors, port companies and retailers.

We advocate for our members locally, nationally, and globally promoting an integrated, sustainable forestry industry recognised worldwide as a leading example of a bio-circular economy.
 
Through regular communication, and networking events, we keep members informed on key issues and champion stories of innovation, sustainability, education, and career opportunities.

The forest industry delivers lasting value to our regions creating skilled jobs, supporting local economies, enhancing biodiversity, and contributing to New Zealand’s low-carbon future. 

We proudly celebrate the people, projects, and achievements that make forestry a cornerstone of our region—recognising excellence in best practice, safety, environmental stewardship, innovation, and leadership. 

Follow us and be part of the journey. Together we’re growing a strong, sustainable future for forestry in Canterbury and the West Coast.

Name: M & L Mulching and land management ltd.
Description:
M&L Mulching & Land Management Ltd. is an Indigenous-owned forestry mulching and land management company based in Central Alberta, proudly serving clients across the province. We specialize in forestry mulching, brush mowing, selective clearing, right-of-way maintenance, and vegetation control for energy, utility, municipal, and private-sector clients.

Our mission is simple — Clearing the Way. We combine advanced equipment, environmental awareness, and professional service to deliver safe, efficient, and sustainable land-clearing solutions. From large-scale right-of-way projects to detailed acreage cleanups, every job is completed with precision, respect for the land, and a focus on long-term land health.

M&L operates modern, high-performance machinery including skid steers with drum mulchers, brush mowers, and specialized attachments, allowing us to process trees and vegetation quickly while preserving topsoil and minimizing ground disturbance. Our methods reduce the need for burning, hauling, and heavy excavation saving our clients time, money, and environmental impact.

We take pride in our commitment to safety and compliance, operating under a robust Health & Safety Program that aligns with Alberta OHS and COR/SECOR standards. Our crews are experienced, certified, and dedicated to maintaining the highest level of professionalism on every worksite.

M&L Mulching & Land Management works with energy companies, municipalities, landowners, and Indigenous communities to provide practical, modern land management services that support development while protecting Alberta’s natural environment.

Clearing the way

Description:
La nostra azienda è specializzata nella vendita di prodotti per i lavori in quota su fune. Ci siamo specializzati dopo anni di lavoro nel mondo del tree climbing, nell’ambito dei lavori forestali e di lavori in artificiale.
I nostri servizi spaziano dalla gestione del verde, in treeclimbing e non, ai lavori in quota in ambito edilizio.
Verdealberi è partner di Alberi Maestri per la formazione e l’aggiornamento professionale certificati. Su verdealberi.com puoi trovare tutti i migliori prodotti e le più moderne attrezzature per i lavori in quota su fune, interventi forestali e gestione del verde.

I nostri servizi in treeclimbing sono:
– abbattimento alberi
– potatura
– valutazioni di stabilità
– consolidamenti statici e dinamici della pianta
– cura e trattamento fitosanitario
– gestione del verde privato e pubblico
– realizzazione tavole dagli alberi abbattuti direttamente in loco
In ambito edilizio i professionisti Verdealberi sono in grado di effettuare:
– montaggio linee vita
– messa in sicurezza e pulizia di cornicioni e grondaie
– montaggio barriere antipiccione
– pulizia vetrate e grondaie
– affissioni pubblicitarie

Legno in città
Il progetto “Legno in città” nasce dalla volontà di alcuni professionisti del verde di non mandare sprecato il legno degli alberi abbattuti, ma anzi di ridargli una seconda vita, valorizzandolo. 
Per questo “Legno in città” intende promuovere il riutilizzo di legno di qualità derivante dagli alberi abbattuti per farne prodotti di artigianato, anche artistico, prodotti di design, accessori per la casa e arredamento da esterno sia per il privato che per il pubblico.
